name: Defend Repro Rights
subject: our country is facing a choice:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
reproductive rights are on the ballot
| | |
---
**Friend, in 2024, reproductive rights will be on the ballot in every single state — _and our country is facing a choice: _**
🔵 We can choose to move forward and elect leaders, like Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand, who will defend patient privacy, empower women and restore our constitutional right to privacy nationwide.
🔴 Or we can choose to elect leaders who will push us backward, attacking women and doctors, ignoring science, denying our fundamental rights and passing a nationwide abortion ban.
**The stakes are clear — and far-right megadonors will do whatever it takes to make sure they come out on top. We cannot let them win. But leaders like Kirsten need your help to defeat them.**

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73254987/437900162/1575385346?refcode=jtk4559-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTZhZDI0Ny1iODgxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e5stP1p4h800V2LWWhgBeVRadGdWNLbLTlfUpJWOBHg=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. clean_body: reproductive rights are on the ballot | | | Friend, in 2024, reproductive rights will be on the ballot in every single state — and our country is facing a choice: 🔵 We can choose to move forward and elect leaders, like Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand, who will defend patient privacy, empower women and restore our constitutional right to privacy nationwide. 🔴 Or we can choose to elect leaders who will push us backward, attacking women and doctors, ignoring science, denying our fundamental rights and passing a nationwide abortion ban. The stakes are clear — and far-right megadonors will do whatever it takes to make sure they come out on top. We cannot let them win. But leaders like Kirsten need your help to defeat them. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Fellow American -

While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, _the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before._

When America was struggling greatly in the late 1970s, Ronald Reagan stood strong before the people and [**called upon us to return to our nation’s founding principles and paint again with bold colors instead of pale pastels.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5bd0a6e1991e439fb49e513051a45eda&_e=SjOo2l-VNeXnPiXwBCZf3BolM9LIaUCh8FeUFTTGP46GpSQK8m9MgSFdvYdc-BPBsgPIc6rq8PRyhBMeCFiPeE1MnMCGZYfgsFlY9-aM7Q4NtnUwUp7of-mHQmt7C79Tr6XCNfTkP7dptu0-5bPfS4uCrAQEF3WrWLCxfTFgprr2T3TwXQrmvKQuJ1kVo1zg1oAHx-WFcsZvOVsLMJ8Gb6eVnM9x-AVXRg74g4VDIke0NIbXZaYFSKOz_q_8FtbnltQzQ-uxiPsAAghoimcSymDPM-XgQ5lTKWokSjdDFiZdQgJp35T_nOl7QVRAN9rIMuPAqEjfjClSIPA-L76vBlSAcWvtAzpeoQiQ6npEYvMEVciXtZCYWigK06n7kjNKBHsHyzrp3NElUQB02MNtjA%3D%3D)

[** RESTORE AMERICA > **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5bd0a6e1991e439fb49e513051a45eda&_e=SjOo2l-VNeXnPiXwBCZf3BolM9LIaUCh8FeUFTTGP46GpSQK8m9MgSFdvYdc-BPBsgPIc6rq8PRyhBMeCFiPeE1MnMCGZYfgsFlY9-aM7Q4NtnUwUp7of-mHQmt7C79Tr6XCNfTkP7dptu0-5bPfS4uCrAQEF3WrWLCxfTFgprr2T3TwXQrmvKQuJ1kVo1zg1oAHx-WFcsZvOVsLMJ8Gb6eVnM9x-AVXRg74g4VDIke0NIbXZaYFSKOz_q_8FtbngiqfURXukYtIwae6IYySfxLP92mtTgVC0nAGsC_BxK8G1dK6jGvrhaVvwgyHJeT5z270YSm6aZbVmpI-T9h1xtDSmRQFJUFnCiLkC5haafMwWIR9BoQmHJ5Ab_GYgI3x08Y6ZK341BQ6ZE_9U0fPRg%3D%3D)
_Republicans desperately needed that clarity and conviction,_ and Reagan understood that a well-articulated vision and public policy grounded in our timeless conservative principles were the keys to restoring our country and preserving freedom.

[**The principles that made America, and brought us back during the Reagan Revolution, must guide us still today:**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5bd0a6e1991e439fb49e513051a45eda&_e=SjOo2l-VNeXnPiXwBCZf3BolM9LIaUCh8FeUFTTGP46GpSQK8m9MgSFdvYdc-BPBsgPIc6rq8PRyhBMeCFiPeE1MnMCGZYfgsFlY9-aM7Q4NtnUwUp7of-mHQmt7C79Tr6XCNfTkP7dptu0-5bPfS4uCrAQEF3WrWLCxfTFgprr2T3TwXQrmvKQuJ1kVo1zg1oAHx-WFcsZvOVsLMJ8Gb6eVnM9x-AVXRg74g4VDIke0NIbXZaYFSKOz_q_8Ftbn8vXT_MpeI9VANLT61PSU3JsGuV9Ymwp-6ElsH5YmPBjOHkPLg20Ng2kgRulJ-dRBA-vtv-KNIqP8F_njYi9FVWUNF0BdbrR4xkmlaARvawcQTP6ixln6i_E1DkXCu1pbqZ_Cqbs-tzHvIiTzFjUd-Q%3D%3D)

* Individual freedom
* Limited government
* The rule of law
* Peace through strength
* Fiscal responsibility
* Free markets
* Human dignity
* The sanctity of human life

**I believe it is our duty as Americans to stand for conservative values without compromise.** I am fighting every day for the same vision that Ronald Reagan once had. As Speaker of the House, it is my job to unite our party on what it will take to win and save America. [**Are you with me?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5bd0a6e1991e439fb49e513051a45eda&_e=SjOo2l-VNeXnPiXwBCZf3BolM9LIaUCh8FeUFTTGP46GpSQK8m9MgSFdvYdc-BPBsgPIc6rq8PRyhBMeCFiPeE1MnMCGZYfgsFlY9-aM7Q4NtnUwUp7of-mHQmt7C79Tr6XCNfTkP7dptu0-5bPfS4uCrAQEF3WrWLCxfTFgprr2T3TwXQrmvKQuJ1kVo1zg1oAHx-WFcsZvOVsLMJ8Gb6eVnM9x-AVXRg74g4VDIke0NIbXZaYFSKOz_q_8FtbncY1spKwPdlLHcJTpbR-Dacy9D69KYqur9dudKOOktPbK_1wCZbQoNZ1EqkMPG-Ihf2FgxF1cXGlfF2U_IQK_MO34WlqZF94XTmFYHqt4V6qtzYeJPRY9N1OHfp6QooBvxxi1X-gZye9aN0mooj-gyQ%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON > **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5bd0a6e1991e439fb49e513051a45eda&_e=SjOo2l-VNeXnPiXwBCZf3BolM9LIaUCh8FeUFTTGP46GpSQK8m9MgSFdvYdc-BPBsgPIc6rq8PRyhBMeCFiPeE1MnMCGZYfgsFlY9-aM7Q4NtnUwUp7of-mHQmt7C79Tr6XCNfTkP7dptu0-5bPfS4uCrAQEF3WrWLCxfTFgprr2T3TwXQrmvKQuJ1kVo1zg1oAHx-WFcsZvOVsLMJ8Gb6eVnM9x-AVXRg74g4VDIke0NIbXZaYFSKOz_q_8FtbnoqhpnlpiGzwxvbcELyF9pLUr6WNh_WpvO6t_1Y-AyhQr8mV8Nb7fZte6R6L3_0YRx_giAlKTu-4NZGreVsq8QHFXi4vA8NoKXbVPr6TEl9281wsY-VP3F2GzONEspy8xO9KG075i11dUCckE81Pr0g%3D%3D)
As I lead the critical fight to restore our country and defend our values, [**I need to know I can count on you.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5bd0a6e1991e439fb49e513051a45eda&_e=SjOo2l-VNeXnPiXwBCZf3BolM9LIaUCh8FeUFTTGP46GpSQK8m9MgSFdvYdc-BPBsgPIc6rq8PRyhBMeCFiPeE1MnMCGZYfgsFlY9-aM7Q4NtnUwUp7of-mHQmt7C79Tr6XCNfTkP7dptu0-5bPfS4uCrAQEF3WrWLCxfTFgprr2T3TwXQrmvKQuJ1kVo1zg1oAHx-WFcsZvOVsLMJ8Gb6eVnM9x-AVXRg74g4VDIke0NIbXZaYFSKOz_q_8FtbnN7FFUClA77Cz8cy2F5pU-TxvBf869hLPKEBcqBSssqRx9QPT6wK7qxInZWHFKIjhcCG8R2EM523NeoMxvkElSf-cMGJus_OjtPL1vEHzh7ScqTntoSCZvtIY462D0I1mN5FDVxsLNifXXNNkROXZCg%3D%3D)

We have a chance to save America from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must act before it’s too late.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5bd0a6e1991e439fb49e513051a45eda&_e=SjOo2l-VNeXnPiXwBCZf3BolM9LIaUCh8FeUFTTGP46GpSQK8m9MgSFdvYdc-BPBsgPIc6rq8PRyhBMeCFiPeE1MnMCGZYfgsFlY9-aM7Q4NtnUwUp7of-mHQmt7C79Tr6XCNfTkP7dptu0-5bPfS4uCrAQEF3WrWLCxfTFgprr2T3TwXQrmvKQuJ1kVo1zg1oAHx-WFcsZvOVsLMJ8Gb6eVnM9x-AVXRg74g4VDIke0NIbXZaYFSKOz_q_8Ftbnhhpgi9K41MGCYoYZLI2nVe10CAQDVJa3M_pyWrlCuUG2UCaeJmOwAQF6elqRaOpCPBo2lY7bo7EANRvbNLbDetsKuBC1-nDU9hukZiI_Q4s1IsOQ0ad-_PtudzJ2aNmlDZ0oV_T8xjq8kAAZx84vSA%3D%3D)

[**Join me.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5bd0a6e1991e439fb49e513051a45eda&_e=SjOo2l-VNeXnPiXwBCZf3BolM9LIaUCh8FeUFTTGP46GpSQK8m9MgSFdvYdc-BPBsgPIc6rq8PRyhBMeCFiPeE1MnMCGZYfgsFlY9-aM7Q4NtnUwUp7of-mHQmt7C79Tr6XCNfTkP7dptu0-5bPfS4uCrAQEF3WrWLCxfTFgprr2T3TwXQrmvKQuJ1kVo1zg1oAHx-WFcsZvOVsLMJ8Gb6eVnM9x-AVXRg74g4VDIke0NIbXZaYFSKOz_q_8FtbnwyPaVVoBAOKJ3kEwu1t3NoFFj8uQBw_COaTFjTudWx3B20Ir0lojjqMi-2k2ET-Etsrx1WfZPsvN6-MABGQImDid9S1FAof89-KToXZNWgl0opNHAxwm_FNEwxR0NdWdB8NHPQ8bL1FOiPj4WOm3PQ%3D%3D)

For America,

[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5bd0a6e1991e439fb49e513051a45eda&_e=SjOo2l-VNeXnPiXwBCZf3BolM9LIaUCh8FeUFTTGP46GpSQK8m9MgSFdvYdc-BPBsgPIc6rq8PRyhBMeCFiPeE1MnMCGZYfgsFlY9-aM7Q4NtnUwUp7of-mHQmt7C79Tr6XCNfTkP7dptu0-5bPfS4uCrAQEF3WrWLCxfTFgprr2T3TwXQrmvKQuJ1kVo1zg1oAHx-WFcsZvOVsLMJ8Gb6eVnM9x-AVXRg74g4VDIke0NIbXZaYFSKOz_q_8Ftbn6YA4oQ2KvXPTYPc1_A3yi8b6g-mRwZJhEMztsYYA-7TzLG1Jyv6sxitgMeH9Aq3m6bsy-JMzQDmOTDji0C_9ytFYJ5B-X9bE7HFmymJFPNwr7J3HuUlfdu30oySXxy49nHlD-I2ytaRjlY3pqfqmlw%3D%3D)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

* * *

[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5bd0a6e1991e439fb49e513051a45eda&_e=SjOo2l-VNeXnPiXwBCZf3FGcL6bPPh2AVKKz4pBZbSh-XUxc7r7GuWt8uzMZuSuHDREmV3em-oluXYa19DN3NvekWyiLtzDPLn8HPE5RDr2j8asGirsdElFUiUybjqgHip4O7QJs8OrO-2eVA8K7UMPN9dOi5pWB7mT6XG9C5DWAkNni0aIFVYNi5jbCex3EHNFrWxMjIHS3YAQXTC1J1jA12YHaPz3dTnbciTiIUpNJVHpIAm8vFmXktR2ZMgEg1xtnuVoVJ9FSrcul4J8_wpLkM256IWORfPWlQFfE_24OO7FgfX81qZOL4XqT-j2txo54gmbpKlEF6iacHQJjKJxFP4WnaST3OflOsPuxkJPjSXm1WTUm4y3WL3pVA-m9wPnL9V3C1CrdtOnEGQJnaQ6wGYTK3HGehXdNALHdV-NuRPMmteWj5tMrrnFSyS2FDO9mc5nezr0GaEuax56c_R-tY9kv1VrLsIWmqTRITWYJPAhyWIAu7XdehyR31U2RpEqFhwnWMVx_Aaxx-4Kp-m1ViL2adepUr4vwaF33n-sXYjwfHJ0RMh4ap0pRqnovKbfR3K5VFegMLHpZ43mBqQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: Reagan understood that a well-articulated vision and public policy grounded in our timeless conservative principles were the keys to restoring our country and preserving freedom. | | Fellow American - While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before. When America was struggling greatly in the late 1970s, Ronald Reagan stood strong before the people and Republicans desperately needed that clarity and conviction, and Reagan understood that a well-articulated vision and public policy grounded in our timeless conservative principles were the keys to restoring our country and preserving freedom. Individual freedom Limited government The rule of law Peace through strength Fiscal responsibility Free markets Human dignity The sanctity of human life I believe it is our duty as Americans to stand for conservative values without compromise. I am fighting every day for the same vision that Ronald Reagan once had. As Speaker of the House, it is my job to unite our party on what it will take to win and save America. As I lead the critical fight to restore our country and defend our values, We have a chance to save America from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. For America, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people. Would you take a moment to complete my today? Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input. | SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? subject: Ciscomani is going after Tribal lands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Peter,
Juan Ciscomani is at it again.
This time, he’s teaming up with MAGA extremists to allow Big Oil to drill, mine, and pollute Tribal cultural lands.
In June, the Biden Administration protected the Chaco Culture National Historical Park from future leasing and mining claims. This land has deep historical and cultural value to Pueblo and Tribal Nations. It is home to structures that date back thousands of years — a living landscape that could be irrevocably damaged by mineral development.
Nonetheless, Ciscomani joined Paul Gosar, Eli Crane, and other MAGA extremists on an amendment to override the Biden Administration’s protections for this sacred Tribal land.
Ciscomani might not be willing to stand up to Big Oil — but we are.
We created a petition to protect the Chaco Culture National Historical Park from new polluting and mining projects. Will you join us by signing on now? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/aRIGQqKaCEqjbntaIFF05w2]
SIGN ON NOW [https://secure.ngpvan.com/aRIGQqKaCEqjbntaIFF05w2]

Thanks for being on our team,
Team Engel

And unlike Juan Ciscomani, Kirsten will focus on important issues, like protecting reproductive rights and bringing down the cost of living. In June, the Biden Administration protected the Chaco Culture National Historical Park from future leasing and mining claims. This land has deep historical and cultural value to Pueblo and Tribal Nations. It is home to structures that date back thousands of years — a living landscape that could be irrevocably damaged by mineral development. Nonetheless, Ciscomani joined Paul Gosar, Eli Crane, and other MAGA extremists on an amendment to override the Biden Administration’s protections for this sacred Tribal land. Ciscomani might not be willing to stand up to Big Oil — but we are. We created a petition to protect the Chaco Culture National Historical Park from new polluting and mining projects. Will you join us by signing on now? [] SIGN ON NOW [] SIGN ON NOW [] Thanks for being on our team, Team Engel P.S. Unlike Juan Ciscomani, Kirsten doesn’t accept a dime from Big Oil and corporate PACS. And unlike Juan Ciscomani, Kirsten will focus on important issues, like protecting reproductive rights and bringing down the cost of living. We’re a grassroots campaign, so anything you can donate now will make a big difference! [] DONATE NOW [] DONATE NOW [] [] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer. She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District. In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? Could I have just a few minutes of your time, folks? I'd like to explain something before **[I ask you to chip in toward my re-election campaign’s final mid-quarter goal of the year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73255459/437922205/-2075268260?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20231112_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGFiYzYwYy1jMDgxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W8YFXSnBH14l9e7ADAaRH9pr6FKHMLCzAwWKHdY-U4k=)** We are nearly halfway through the last fundraising quarter of 2023. In a matter of weeks, we'll report to the Federal Election Commission (FEC) how much we raised and how many folks pitched in over the last couple of months. Shortly after, the FEC will make our fundraising numbers public. **This will be the most important fundraising report of my re-election campaign so far** — because everyone from New Mexico Republicans to GOP dark money groups desperate to hand the Senate Majority to Mitch McConnell will be poring over our numbers to see if we have momentum going into the election year. Fundraising numbers aren't the only way to gauge the strength of our grassroots campaign. The passion this team has for our shared values — from protecting our public lands and waters to defending our fundamental rights — speaks volumes about the movement we're building together. **But a strong fundraising report will show National Republicans that we're coming into the election year ready to defend and expand our Democratic Senate Majority.** **[That's why I'm asking: Can you pitch in $10 or any amount right now to help us hit our mid-quarter goal and set our campaign up for success in 2024? clean_body: We are nearly halfway through the last fundraising quarter of 2024. Could I have just a few minutes of your time, folks? I'd like to explain something before = We are nearly halfway through the last fundraising quarter of 2023. In a matter of weeks, we'll report to the Federal Election Commission (FEC) how much we raised and how many folks pitched in over the last couple of months. Shortly after, the FEC will make our fundraising numbers public. This will be the most important fundraising report of my re-election campaign so far — because everyone from New Mexico Republicans to GOP dark money groups desperate to hand the Senate Majority to Mitch McConnell will be poring over our numbers to see if we have momentum going into the election year. Fundraising numbers aren't the only way to gauge the strength of our grassroots campaign. The passion this team has for our shared values — from protecting our public lands and waters to defending our fundamental rights — speaks volumes about the movement we're building together. But a strong fundraising report will show National Republicans that we're coming into the election year ready to defend and expand our Democratic Senate Majority. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for your support. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. subject: ATTENTION Patriots, you are ROCKING it!🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
The people of Nebraska are gaining momentum and national attention | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12662229?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=55aa7b634a&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | 🚨**The NEGOP is funded by 'We the People' and collectively you have shown your mightiness \- in just over 15 days you've raised an additional $21,000 in direct or pledged donations!**🚨
The leadership of the NEGOP cannot thank you enough for all your support. From prayers to finances, your effort is fulfilling. NEGOP Leaders from the Panhandle to Nebraska City are supporting through their networks! County Party's are engaging in fundraisers every week. Your success has even been noticed by the national level leaders who have praised the influx of donations through our current drive. In a time and season where it's hard to raise funds, where it's hard to believe that **$20 can make a difference** , and when we all are struggling with the increase of daily expenses...you have accomplished historic individual levels.

So again, thank you!

The financial reality is that we must _**raise an additional $14,000 within the next 20 days to continue state party campaign operations this year.**_
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=0d9ba721cc&e=25844e23a8)
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=ff290afa88&e=25844e23a8 "DONATE NOW")
---
| Peter, the NEGOP is funded by hard-working Repubicans like **__YOU,__** and again, nationally you are being noticed.

For the first time, the NEGOP has completed an infrastructure program designed at the national level called the GROW Program. This is the NEW NEGOP and you are the NEW leaders of change.

Your dollars are used for operations and resources, NOT direct contributions to politicians. Your dollars fund the county party growth and the resources to connect the Republican Values to the people of Nebraska. **For this grassroots movement to continue, for the NEGOP to stand for OUR VALUES, we need you and every person receiving this message to contribute $25 today. **

Remember, this is a _**true grassroots party**_. We are funded by the people of Nebraska and their **generous donations. **

**Your support is vital in this endeavor, and we will continue this GO FUND NEGOP campaign until we have achieved the TOTAL $35,000 goal. ** There are many different ways to help **_TODAY:_**
* Contribute $25 ([_CLICK HERE TO SEND YOUR DONATION_](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=7bef1b2e22&e=25844e23a8))
* If you’ve already donated, consider doubling or tripling your contribution.
* Become an [NEGOP+](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=fb50987076&e=25844e23a8) member or increase your [NEGOP+](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=3abda85ebb&e=25844e23a8) member level.
* Pray that thousands of Nebraska Republicans (there are 600,000 Nebraska Republicans) provide support to their NEGOP.

_**We can do this if we all work together.**_ **Your NEGOP needs your help now.**
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=ae6f643334&e=25844e23a8 "DONATE NOW")
---
| With prayers,

[Dawn Liphardt](mailto:admin@ne.gop?subject=How%20can%20I%20help%3F)
Executive Director
Republican Party of Nebraska

---
| | [PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
---
|

Nebraska Republican Party1610 N StLincoln, NE 68508-1871

| | Patriot,

---
History shows that evil only respects one thing: UNYIELDING STRENGTH.
---
So, it’s no surprise that evil is running wild now that the weakest man you could ever imagine occupies the White House.
---
Just 4 years ago, America was respected on the world stage, our allies paid their fair share, our enemies feared us, and instead of starting wars, we actually focused on improving the lives of _our own_ citizens. What a beautiful thing!

---
_**To remind Americans that our nation can be STRONG again, I just approved a brand new ad that I hope you’ll watch.**_

---

Peter, I’m proud to be following in the footsteps of great civil rights leaders who used nonviolent resistance to fight for justice. To disrupt the status quo and achieve progress, “good trouble” is necessary. I’ve been arrested twice while fighting for the most vulnerable among us. While standing up for the rights of the disenfranchised and downtrodden at the White House. And while acting as one of the lead organizers of the Black Lives Matter protests in Orlando, where I was tear-gassed, arrested, and jailed-- all for peacefully protesting on the frontlines against our broken system. [Peter, I ran and won my race in the face of the GOP who tried to relentlessly destroy the protections the generations before us achieved. But now, we need to ensure we can keep up the momentum year-round and raise $5,483 before midnight. Can I count on you to chip in and join me in this fight? >>](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/yh9gjb4y8UUBnlXJwzv55w~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnM_2RP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTExMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9nb29kdHJvdWJsZV9lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yWTZDSWpJVHRNdk1OZE5hYWZzcEowMmRUMFYmcmVmY29kZTI9Mlk2Q0lqSVR0TXZNTmROYWFmc3BKMDJkVDBWJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJZNkNJaklUdE12TU5kTmFhZnNwSjAyZFQwVlcDc3BjQgplRZF4UWXb13hKUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) | [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/yh9gjb4y8UUBnlXJwzv55w~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnM_2RP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTExMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9nb29kdHJvdWJsZV9lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yWTZDSWpJVHRNdk1OZE5hYWZzcEowMmRUMFYmcmVmY29kZTI9Mlk2Q0lqSVR0TXZNTmROYWFmc3BKMDJkVDBWJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJZNkNJaklUdE12TU5kTmFhZnNwSjAyZFQwVlcDc3BjQgplRZF4UWXb13hKUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)

I know that change can feel impossible and hope can be hard to come by.
John Lewis, civil rights icon, was arrested over 40 times in his lifelong fight for equality knew that progress requires forging on even in the difficult times:
_“Do not get lost in a sea of despair. Be hopeful, be optimistic. Our struggle is not the struggle of a day, a week, a month, or a year, it is the struggle of a lifetime. Never, ever be afraid to make some noise and get in good trouble, necessary trouble.”_
**As national organizing director at March for Our Lives I often thought of John Lewis, the youngest speaker at the March on Washington, and how we could honor his legacy. Even in the tough times.**
[I’m fighting in Congress as part of the next generation of leaders but I cannot do this alone. Will you join me in good trouble and support our fight? Even a couple of dollars gets us that much closer, please rush your donation now >>](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/yh9gjb4y8UUBnlXJwzv55w~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnM_2RP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTExMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9nb29kdHJvdWJsZV9lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yWTZDSWpJVHRNdk1OZE5hYWZzcEowMmRUMFYmcmVmY29kZTI9Mlk2Q0lqSVR0TXZNTmROYWFmc3BKMDJkVDBWJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJZNkNJaklUdE12TU5kTmFhZnNwSjAyZFQwVlcDc3BjQgplRZF4UWXb13hKUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)

clean_body: | ~~ Peter, I’m proud to be following in the footsteps of great civil rights leaders who used nonviolent resistance to fight for justice. To disrupt the status quo and achieve progress, “good trouble” is necessary. I’ve been arrested twice while fighting for the most vulnerable among us. While standing up for the rights of the disenfranchised and downtrodden at the White House. And while acting as one of the lead organizers of the Black Lives Matter protests in Orlando, where I was tear-gassed, arrested, and jailed-- all for peacefully protesting on the frontlines against our broken system. ~~ | ~~ I know that change can feel impossible and hope can be hard to come by. John Lewis, civil rights icon, was arrested over 40 times in his lifelong fight for equality knew that progress requires forging on even in the difficult times: “Do not get lost in a sea of despair. Be hopeful, be optimistic. Our struggle is not the struggle of a day, a week, a month, or a year, it is the struggle of a lifetime. Never, ever be afraid to make some noise and get in good trouble, necessary trouble.” As national organizing director at March for Our Lives I often thought of John Lewis, the youngest speaker at the March on Washington, and how we could honor his legacy. Even in the tough times. ~~ | | ~~ ~~ | ~~ ~ | ~ ~ Together in the fight, Maxwell ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. He isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to keep this seat for poor and working-class people. Will you become a Founding Donor of this movement today? | ~~ | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. You can .

| | Hi D. P., Parliamentarian Procedure/Robert's Rule of Order Training \- is giving leaders the skillsets they need to speak and voice their concerns at school board, city council, homeowners association and other organization meetings. New classes start Tuesday.
* November 14, 21, 28 or December 5, 12, 19. Please tell us which month you'll attend. If you miss any of the classes you may attend the equivalent class in the next month's course.Sign-up today for only $40 per course at [https://www.generationsforamericafoundation.com//_paylink/AYi2wefb](https://www.generationsforamerica.com/so/42Ol1EZj6/c?w=0lRsvo4AwpYqCs2bmnQ3TDqx9l0bfrY8Tl77dClbOGo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ2VuZXJhdGlvbnNmb3JhbWVyaWNhZm91bmRhdGlvbi5jb20vL19wYXlsaW5rL0FZaTJ3ZWZiIiwiciI6IjYyZjFiMDRhLTQ1ZGYtNDMwZC03YTRmLTgxOWQwYzQ5YzE4MCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjAzNzJiMzE5LWMzYWYtNGUxNS1hMjE2LTQ5MDFjYTVhZDUzZCJ9)

name: Tammy Baldwin via Alex-Padilla.com
subject: A tall order
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

_Hey there, I wanted to share this note from Sen. Tammy Baldwin._
_With Joe Manchin’s retirement, it’s become even more important to support Democrats like Tammy Baldwin — because if we lose Wisconsin, we lose our Senate majority. -Alex_
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Alex Padilla and Tammy Baldwin instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2337?c0=ap-em-nov23-baldwin.SCV4Lo&refcode=em231112-1-30&amount=5&t=1&akid=1600%2E159979%2EX2p5jI)**
---
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2337?c0=ap-em-nov23-baldwin.SCV4Lo&refcode=em231112-1-30&t=2&akid=1600%2E159979%2EX2p5jI)**
---

* * *

Hi folks, Tammy Baldwin here with an important update on our campaign:
**CNN just named my U.S. Senate seat in Wisconsin as one of the top 10 most likely to flip next year.**
[**If Republicans flip my seat in Wisconsin, it’s almost guaranteed that Mitch McConnell will reclaim the Senate majority. So if you can, please rush in a split donation to help us defend this battleground seat and protect our Democratic majority.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-nov23-baldwin.CRyV_Q&refcode=em231112-1-30&t=3&akid=1600%2E159979%2EX2p5jI)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Alex Padilla and Tammy Baldwin instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2337?c0=ap-em-nov23-baldwin.SCV4Lo&refcode=em231112-1-30&amount=5&t=4&akid=1600%2E159979%2EX2p5jI)**
---
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2337?c0=ap-em-nov23-baldwin.SCV4Lo&refcode=em231112-1-30&t=5&akid=1600%2E159979%2EX2p5jI)**
---
**The GOP spent a whopping $77 million to win last year’s Senate race in Wisconsin, and won by ONE percentage point.** It’s clear that they intend to do (and spend) whatever it takes to squeak by again to flip my seat red this time around.
Senate Republicans are looking to recruit candidates with massive personal wealth to jump into the race — including right-wing megamillionaire, Eric Hovde, who said he’d spend **$15 to $20 million out of his own pocket to defeat me.**
Going up against an opponent with a virtually unlimited campaign warchest would be a tall order, friend. That’s why it’s so important we get to work building the resources it’ll take to fight back against the inevitable flood of GOP attacks and keep this seat blue for Democrats. But I can’t do it without you.
[**Will you split a donation between Alex Padilla and my reelection campaign to help us defend our Democratic Senate majority and keep Wisconsin blue in 2024? Your donation will help us prepare, organize, and mobilize in the months ahead.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-nov23-baldwin.CRyV_Q&refcode=em231112-1-30&t=6&akid=1600%2E159979%2EX2p5jI)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Alex Padilla and Tammy Baldwin instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2337?c0=ap-em-nov23-baldwin.SCV4Lo&refcode=em231112-1-30&amount=5&t=7&akid=1600%2E159979%2EX2p5jI)**
---
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2337?c0=ap-em-nov23-baldwin.SCV4Lo&refcode=em231112-1-30&t=8&akid=1600%2E159979%2EX2p5jI)**
---
Thanks for being a part of this team.
\- Tammy Baldwin

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=9&akid=1600%2E159979%2EX2p5jI)

subject: I’m not going anywhere
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Donald Trump is so far ahead in the polls that he didn’t even show up to last week’s Republican debate.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4447%2E5257348%2EoG_giQ)
Derek,
In a moment, ****[I’m going to ask if you can pitch in to support my campaign for the U.S. Senate ahead of Wednesday’s final mid-quarter fundraising deadline of the year.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=nov2023_abs_em.a2LqFl&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC90_20231112_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4447%2E5257348%2EoG_giQ)** But first, I want to explain why this deadline is so important.
Donald Trump is so far ahead in the polls that he didn’t even show up to last week’s Republican debate.
Instead, he rallied his supporters just down the street in support of his MAGA agenda.
Trump’s MAGA agenda being: _‘Trump won, Biden lost, perfect phone call, Russia hoax, Shifty Adam Schiff, witch hunt, watermelon head, I’m innocent.’_
It’s dangerous. And it’s clear that MAGA Republicans are going to do everything in their power to reinstall Trump in the White House. That means they will attack and tear down anyone who goes against their ideology – they’ll do _anything_ to prevent me from becoming California’s next Senator.
That’s why it’s so important we hit Wednesday’s mid-quarter fundraising goal and send a powerful message: **They are not going to stop me.**
**[Pitch in now to help:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=nov2023_abs_em.a2LqFl&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC90_20231112_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4447%2E5257348%2EoG_giQ)**

name: Rick Scott
subject: I'm not afraid to do what's right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,

Taking on your own party is not easy. You face a lot of backlash and a few threats.

But I took on Mitch McConnell because it was the right thing to do.****

For too long, I watched as he sided with Democrats and the Washington Establishment instead of the conservatives who elected us.

We were elected to _STOP_ the Democrats from ruining our country, not give them the green light to do it.****

I will never back down from taking on the establishment, but I need your support to continue my fight.

[ _**If you agree it’s time Republicans in Washington started acting like Republicans, please consider giving a donation to stand with me.**_](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=beb4856776c04c5cba56b6728984c7f5&_e=HIgWmC4Q6kX63YmNatsH5xHwUxnISI8URdP5NchUG0pGRnoFk0Xz-Ckd-_1k5ktXJhQ7o-mgsQBxEeFsGa6fH_ULmlsFefODR7wlxIFRGtih1QLdeIW9YnuZrBqBTcDpz0JF-nEzZKpT1uBo-28eLz3ltA6TAEHOhRQcCIXI6MwqMwNbutL5JgiElhv7xUdiXuBAArOdN0o41jFM3wVIB8rle2MAWXpimjZTQPljzt8EAegt2t0P4DJsSWa3Q5PWLUDk1HdJr-k8YRmAHUVwdkISjGf6TqO271rjyCQ4SRF7gfzIvOMEMMTRRUdJw1-hgCreKeZ3naN3VIa8ZNtTuoGWfHLU1pQ5tCf68wch68S6Sflsyh4SENJ0rlcBb3iI)

clean_body: | | | Peter, Taking on your own party is not easy. You face a lot of backlash and a few threats. But I took on Mitch McConnell because it was the right thing to do.** For too long, I watched as he sided with Democrats and the Washington Establishment instead of the conservatives who elected us. We were elected to STOP the Democrats from ruining our country, not give them the green light to do it. I will never back down from taking on the establishment, but I need your support to continue my fight. name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Join me, Fellow American
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
My good friend Deb Fischer is counting on us | Fellow American,

I’m proud to endorse my good friend [**Senator Deb Fischer**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0ab61dbbadcc499d9baaa74c26c24fa4&_e=gnu51taEsEWbACegBhntCxNT7ghgBqSHiKaL5ivt4upz2r6A4D7pz1VZYOy4Ea21oq875sBF0p4QPhwb5IkQ7hvKBhDBqKYM7FbqrA-S__VzGEwQ-mV6wloCMMULeIXfy5sGOYI9_RySEZAz_i64gX5ULNXU9HSZkTLjlc9SdfZIDdE-ISd3qGkaxsWTTkfvn3Ifon-jrbweRBA3D3DaDl_u9dlrRpdDFGfOJLq53s-zr7_0xEqTdnR81fUBsTKs4yQtXRiGlawj6Ep1dSjRQy9caIX39Zcpe76yYaMRFUm_zJppnAPGylW0Bae4QlxLQtFDZkiZW_niRdqYimaNwhqYoExkILiEJLn6yf5ILssWtHV4uv_exrQpElRgLWPKTEg6_8pM4FqUzlN1XPnw_zpu9-GyIYfOBDQkw4FFUBvm3KP_lWCBW9l98f7frWFBil-k250ph2EOojuxPfvt3w%3D%3D) for re-election in 2024.

Senator Fischer is exactly the kind of leader our country needs in Washington today. She understands the challenges facing American families, and I have the utmost confidence she will continue to hold the Biden Administration accountable for its backward policies.

[**JOIN ME & ENDORSE DEB FISCHER**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0ab61dbbadcc499d9baaa74c26c24fa4&_e=gnu51taEsEWbACegBhntCxNT7ghgBqSHiKaL5ivt4upz2r6A4D7pz1VZYOy4Ea21oq875sBF0p4QPhwb5IkQ7hvKBhDBqKYM7FbqrA-S__VzGEwQ-mV6wloCMMULeIXfy5sGOYI9_RySEZAz_i64gX5ULNXU9HSZkTLjlc9SdfZIDdE-ISd3qGkaxsWTTkfvn3Ifon-jrbweRBA3D3DaDl_u9dlrRpdDFGfOJLq53s-zr7_0xEqTdnR81fUBsTKs4yQtXRiGlawj6Ep1dSjRQy9caIX39Zcpe76yYaMRFUm_zJppnAPGylW0Bae4QlxLbzl-9ZxO5iMwujm9IGSAY4jxIhO9PHpWWIp0S2v-KhuLm1FU6Rmp17_i-OdtIRHpvY6rZrE7pHsSKpnFYAsEX5TwFMbX55uNK7VtF_n2BFa8uYW7Ohus3rttAD2CGS3gbarIoaao6RCMiX7rbBZvqQ%3D%3D)
Fellow American, if Republicans want [**_any shot_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0ab61dbbadcc499d9baaa74c26c24fa4&_e=gnu51taEsEWbACegBhntCxNT7ghgBqSHiKaL5ivt4upz2r6A4D7pz1VZYOy4Ea21oq875sBF0p4QPhwb5IkQ7hvKBhDBqKYM7FbqrA-S__VzGEwQ-mV6wloCMMULeIXfy5sGOYI9_RySEZAz_i64gX5ULNXU9HSZkTLjlc9SdfZIDdE-ISd3qGkaxsWTTkfvn3Ifon-jrbweRBA3D3DaDl_u9dlrRpdDFGfOJLq53s-zr7_0xEqTdnR81fUBsTKs4yQtXRiGlawj6Ep1dSjRQy9caIX39Zcpe76yYaMRFUm_zJppnAPGylW0Bae4QlxLm9Uj5Po_vbKugaSX4mRahw97rbdlww9ZtEWFNbvuxOSxRuAR1TYUc9gaA7WEtLcumP96XX-mQ2MbRisYoTfTgTPKbAi6FXrvyS0KaqVZEbXg_7T7Z12oLJLeSgSW4BFF5zL49J_o712HOctBInXlfQ%3D%3D) at taking back the Senate Majority next year, we need to maintain this seat in Nebraska. Trust me — far-Left Democrats are going to be gunning for Deb’s seat, and she needs OUR HELP to fend them off.

Senator Fischer is exactly the kind of leader our country needs in Washington today. She understands the challenges facing American families, and I have the utmost confidence she will continue to hold the Biden Administration accountable for its backward policies. Fellow American, if Republicans want at taking back the Senate Majority next year, we need to maintain this seat in Nebraska. Dictators do not willingly abdicate the throne. 2024 will not just be another election about which party controls Washington. It will determine whether or not the PEOPLE of our country are still sovereign in America. While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=f9ebf7ba7cd4446ab9ed90ef0bcdc66a&_t=cvjpVSVJdTQv104a3mk74R_uPfqyPgjimYh2s6wmE6kzvHrZUS3rWnwFig0zCM5oNppmZez_uF0Y1e0FzDSnL7rC24o1tPxR-17iur-MqtA%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=f9ebf7ba7cd4446ab9ed90ef0bcdc66a&_t=cvjpVSVJdTQv104a3mk74R_uPfqyPgjimYh2s6wmE6kzvHrZUS3rWnwFig0zCM5oNppmZez_uF0Y1e0FzDSnL7rC24o1tPxR-17iur-MqtA%3D)

Peter -

While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, _the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before._

When America was struggling greatly in the late 1970s, Ronald Reagan stood strong before the people and [**called upon us to return to our nation’s founding principles and paint again with bold colors instead of pale pastels.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f9ebf7ba7cd4446ab9ed90ef0bcdc66a&_e=42SyyWPlf4SeY9z5cHeKTgFU8NLN8XSNVaZkNRz53JqivQVBtWWysN6ujJ5AhIVdWB-2SMs0EipM9W5aMyzQT4twrP6k-8wzVpun1PAkIYs59YE4_v524ioF41fVoPb2XFLzX3aO7AJp6cqndxtblOqy-x21JybPlVQS3Vn7ofzFHSVLRgKz6tsd5Bhydbf2TEsSBaraT9gUAGKf6LnZcE_8d9RPZMOh8yKZ52Fn95wkc-jKlpJ6LDDPQnk6cCf-6JpHTOxknbQPK16LsHSmmoVKZKHdDbEnCS0IZcaEtUP5vsU0AKxpp33Gfl1tZQelytvFd_jBQYp6zPtQ90JBjRuSWUonJPr-1-XDxmZjAItEyVzYrYqcEa45dHY_GcoelKkI-bKVf9WH-NzdPEMZpA%3D%3D)

[** RESTORE AMERICA > **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f9ebf7ba7cd4446ab9ed90ef0bcdc66a&_e=42SyyWPlf4SeY9z5cHeKTgFU8NLN8XSNVaZkNRz53JqivQVBtWWysN6ujJ5AhIVdWB-2SMs0EipM9W5aMyzQT4twrP6k-8wzVpun1PAkIYs59YE4_v524ioF41fVoPb2XFLzX3aO7AJp6cqndxtblOqy-x21JybPlVQS3Vn7ofzFHSVLRgKz6tsd5Bhydbf2TEsSBaraT9gUAGKf6LnZcE_8d9RPZMOh8yKZ52Fn95wkc-jKlpJ6LDDPQnk6cCf-ukdzvBJYxxwpjCIk6R9Btfp-OsGkebJXolukVHKfLBmUWtKzkvVCRXnZs1JjstU_22qnEAAI5I2sKObRB8WaCZfT3EXvITmA-QXspYtjlSApvRkStBx2DXa2-uWoUX5nWp0FsaWVKNqswy4szz2UhQ%3D%3D)
_Republicans desperately needed that clarity and conviction,_ and Reagan understood that a well-articulated vision and public policy grounded in our timeless conservative principles were the keys to restoring our country and preserving freedom.

[**The principles that made America, and brought us back during the Reagan Revolution, must guide us still today:**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f9ebf7ba7cd4446ab9ed90ef0bcdc66a&_e=42SyyWPlf4SeY9z5cHeKTgFU8NLN8XSNVaZkNRz53JqivQVBtWWysN6ujJ5AhIVdWB-2SMs0EipM9W5aMyzQT4twrP6k-8wzVpun1PAkIYs59YE4_v524ioF41fVoPb2XFLzX3aO7AJp6cqndxtblOqy-x21JybPlVQS3Vn7ofzFHSVLRgKz6tsd5Bhydbf2TEsSBaraT9gUAGKf6LnZcE_8d9RPZMOh8yKZ52Fn95wkc-jKlpJ6LDDPQnk6cCf-S9yUIINUfXmJ54bVe6aiC8PGtooW-DOHBJZ3HzVEX_deIDI6KDOTXmkVegmR3C7O_xV_XDVBGKyQJ0jZpNbIEFc3GFOiIQ8iH62edCLI6rYmijgGxKnQAVuOHUNI3_IXMif_6DOeClCoiegilGxeuQ%3D%3D)

* Individual freedom
* Limited government
* The rule of law
* Peace through strength
* Fiscal responsibility
* Free markets
* Human dignity
* The sanctity of human life

**I believe it is our duty as Americans to stand for conservative values without compromise.** I am fighting every day for the same vision that Ronald Reagan once had. As Speaker of the House, it is my job to unite our party on what it will take to win and save America. [**Are you with me?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f9ebf7ba7cd4446ab9ed90ef0bcdc66a&_e=42SyyWPlf4SeY9z5cHeKTgFU8NLN8XSNVaZkNRz53JqivQVBtWWysN6ujJ5AhIVdWB-2SMs0EipM9W5aMyzQT4twrP6k-8wzVpun1PAkIYs59YE4_v524ioF41fVoPb2XFLzX3aO7AJp6cqndxtblOqy-x21JybPlVQS3Vn7ofzFHSVLRgKz6tsd5Bhydbf2TEsSBaraT9gUAGKf6LnZcE_8d9RPZMOh8yKZ52Fn95wkc-jKlpJ6LDDPQnk6cCf-0furTxSQUdqoM_ffOIOihbYNYBoOOd75ngQqGXAJM6SzZBHhf0T4dA6oFyv1_f5rKJFP8huFoZr4TF8EpEcS-dbeB8LSYSUVJbuSirYc5T4z5nNwuGrYAUjnd0qgkK92qnnBV8xyLjDYfSaX8dsoJg%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON > **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f9ebf7ba7cd4446ab9ed90ef0bcdc66a&_e=42SyyWPlf4SeY9z5cHeKTgFU8NLN8XSNVaZkNRz53JqivQVBtWWysN6ujJ5AhIVdWB-2SMs0EipM9W5aMyzQT4twrP6k-8wzVpun1PAkIYs59YE4_v524ioF41fVoPb2XFLzX3aO7AJp6cqndxtblOqy-x21JybPlVQS3Vn7ofzFHSVLRgKz6tsd5Bhydbf2TEsSBaraT9gUAGKf6LnZcE_8d9RPZMOh8yKZ52Fn95wkc-jKlpJ6LDDPQnk6cCf-Lqa0hDLeRmabxh2mR8kD5_e_tsK0wh7Rf0eEy8Jp6FNu_Dz-wDGfMiPc9wukbb8sUlLQhZp3QXcXK5nsSzxcDRis1-oOTTnVF-qlkgQ7U4qLvw2zg2JhYE4fwSPWNrk9rnPRLkDndwq5cNCSsMXPNw%3D%3D)
As I lead the critical fight to restore our country and defend our values, [**I need to know I can count on you.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f9ebf7ba7cd4446ab9ed90ef0bcdc66a&_e=42SyyWPlf4SeY9z5cHeKTgFU8NLN8XSNVaZkNRz53JqivQVBtWWysN6ujJ5AhIVdWB-2SMs0EipM9W5aMyzQT4twrP6k-8wzVpun1PAkIYs59YE4_v524ioF41fVoPb2XFLzX3aO7AJp6cqndxtblOqy-x21JybPlVQS3Vn7ofzFHSVLRgKz6tsd5Bhydbf2TEsSBaraT9gUAGKf6LnZcE_8d9RPZMOh8yKZ52Fn95wkc-jKlpJ6LDDPQnk6cCf-W0qROZR2NUmdKw6w9ECtgrkz3eK2LGGqHdT8CSs8s8zAe1T0G6TgOfhqlUSTCnxdBrok4eKTax211YtwMJBQ3u0cfbNUUxVAVYWtsLXzSbeiE96SPt811pFtr-rN50V8K_M8EZf_hD_byG5Xe5auSw%3D%3D)

We have a chance to save America from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must act before it’s too late.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f9ebf7ba7cd4446ab9ed90ef0bcdc66a&_e=42SyyWPlf4SeY9z5cHeKTgFU8NLN8XSNVaZkNRz53JqivQVBtWWysN6ujJ5AhIVdWB-2SMs0EipM9W5aMyzQT4twrP6k-8wzVpun1PAkIYs59YE4_v524ioF41fVoPb2XFLzX3aO7AJp6cqndxtblOqy-x21JybPlVQS3Vn7ofzFHSVLRgKz6tsd5Bhydbf2TEsSBaraT9gUAGKf6LnZcE_8d9RPZMOh8yKZ52Fn95wkc-jKlpJ6LDDPQnk6cCf-ZRZj9A1wsCPxbF6gazVi15icC4fHgf6YTKzinTrXAu2c0f66Tz0ucDrDF7OT1AUOQxkMZR6KGzLxQDph6Xm1GBNn-p01EikLKFm8GNteHeEkJHhp4-nvMkUf7bpdNWF4tOckHtI0mmZs77s6cQW-JQ%3D%3D)

[**Join me.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f9ebf7ba7cd4446ab9ed90ef0bcdc66a&_e=42SyyWPlf4SeY9z5cHeKTgFU8NLN8XSNVaZkNRz53JqivQVBtWWysN6ujJ5AhIVdWB-2SMs0EipM9W5aMyzQT4twrP6k-8wzVpun1PAkIYs59YE4_v524ioF41fVoPb2XFLzX3aO7AJp6cqndxtblOqy-x21JybPlVQS3Vn7ofzFHSVLRgKz6tsd5Bhydbf2TEsSBaraT9gUAGKf6LnZcE_8d9RPZMOh8yKZ52Fn95wkc-jKlpJ6LDDPQnk6cCf-qqCTKToP5e0aTis-K7Mw-nyZafCgMSet2xjlgioGP64QLj8q592Fq4kqOqEd3TNt8mnn51rz-eouDvktoOHx7WW6XOOv6nq5ahpaAIbGAvbxzEUXJJ-QPLwv7n73snoOrzOgCj38tl6yOB-CyWixyQ%3D%3D)

For America,

clean_body: While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before. | | Peter - While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before. When America was struggling greatly in the late 1970s, Ronald Reagan stood strong before the people and Republicans desperately needed that clarity and conviction, and Reagan understood that a well-articulated vision and public policy grounded in our timeless conservative principles were the keys to restoring our country and preserving freedom. Individual freedom Limited government The rule of law Peace through strength Fiscal responsibility Free markets Human dignity The sanctity of human life I believe it is our duty as Americans to stand for conservative values without compromise. I am fighting every day for the same vision that Ronald Reagan once had. As Speaker of the House, it is my job to unite our party on what it will take to win and save America. As I lead the critical fight to restore our country and defend our values, We have a chance to save America from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. For America, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people. Would you take a moment to complete my today? Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input. | SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? name: Robertson For Congress
subject: Why Bruce Woodbury Is Supporting Mark Robertson.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
Special Message from Bruce Woodbury.
| | | |
---
# Why I Support Mark Robertson for Congress
---
By Bruce Woodbury
I'm supporting Mark Robertson as my Representative (and your Representative) in Congress. Mark is a man of integrity and honor who will be loyal to the Constitution. I trust that he will do the right thing in Washington. Here are three specific reasons I support Mark:
Mark supports parents' right to choose the best education option for their children. Mark is the only candidate who has taught in our local elementary and high school schools and at UNLV. Mark and his wife Lesly have four children - two are teachers, and two are married to teachers. No one understands education challenges better than Mark Robertson. As our Representative, he will fight to support teachers and give parents the right to choose the best schools for their children.
Mark knows how to balance a budget and tame inflation. Mark is the only candidate with a degree in finance and an MBA. He taught finance at UNLV. He owned a financial planning business for 20years that helped families and small businesses balance their budgets and plan for their future. No one is better prepared to tackle our nation's financial problems than Mark Robertson. As our Representative, he will work hard to protect Social Security, reduce inflation, and shrink the size and burden of government.
Mark knows how to defend us. Mark is the only candidate running in CD-1 who is a Veteran. He spent 30 years in the Army, including multiple combat tours and assignments to the Pentagon and the National Defense University. He knows we must secure the border and support local law enforcement. This is why five former Police chiefs endorse him. As our Representative, Mark will work hard to stop the illegal flow of guns, gangs, and drugs into our county and community.
In summary, I support Mark Robertson because he has the knowledge and experience to solve our nation's biggest problems: Education, Inflation, and National Security. Mark is the only candidate who has taught in our schools, has an advanced degree in finance, and has served our Nation in the Armed Forces. He is the right person to be our Representative in Congress.
Editor's Note: Bruce Woodbury served on the Clark County Commission for 28 years (twice as Chairman). The I-215 beltway is named after him. He currently serves as Chairman of the Robertson for Congress Campaign.
---
******** Your Questions--Mark's Answers
Q. What do you think about Dina Titus refusing to vote in favor of censuring Rashida Tlaib? -J.S. A. I believe most people in Nevada's First Congressional District recognize that it is morally wrong for Tlaib to call for the annihilation of Jews and the destruction of the nation of Israel. Titus once again ignored the will of her constituents and stuck to her extreme ideology. We need a change in Washington. We need a Congressman who truly represents the people. I will.
*******
Did you know you can actually call and talk with Mark? Yes, you can!

clean_body: Special Message from Bruce Woodbury. | | | | Why I Support Mark Robertson for Congress By Bruce Woodbury I'm supporting Mark Robertson as my Representative (and your Representative) in Congress. Mark is a man of integrity and honor who will be loyal to the Constitution. I trust that he will do the right thing in Washington. Here are three specific reasons I support Mark: Mark supports parents' right to choose the best education option for their children. Mark is the only candidate who has taught in our local elementary and high school schools and at UNLV. Mark and his wife Lesly have four children - two are teachers, and two are married to teachers. No one understands education challenges better than Mark Robertson. As our Representative, he will fight to support teachers and give parents the right to choose the best schools for their children. Mark knows how to balance a budget and tame inflation. Mark is the only candidate with a degree in finance and an MBA. He taught finance at UNLV. He owned a financial planning business for 20years that helped families and small businesses balance their budgets and plan for their future. No one is better prepared to tackle our nation's financial problems than Mark Robertson. As our Representative, he will work hard to protect Social Security, reduce inflation, and shrink the size and burden of government. Mark knows how to defend us. Mark is the only candidate running in CD-1 who is a Veteran. He spent 30 years in the Army, including multiple combat tours and assignments to the Pentagon and the National Defense University. He knows we must secure the border and support local law enforcement. This is why five former Police chiefs endorse him. As our Representative, Mark will work hard to stop the illegal flow of guns, gangs, and drugs into our county and community. In summary, I support Mark Robertson because he has the knowledge and experience to solve our nation's biggest problems: Education, Inflation, and National Security. Mark is the only candidate who has taught in our schools, has an advanced degree in finance, and has served our Nation in the Armed Forces. He is the right person to be our Representative in Congress. Editor's Note: Bruce Woodbury served on the Clark County Commission for 28 years (twice as Chairman). The I-215 beltway is named after him. He currently serves as Chairman of the Robertson for Congress Campaign. ****** Your Questions--Mark's Answers Q. What do you think about Dina Titus refusing to vote in favor of censuring Rashida Tlaib? -J.S. A. I believe most people in Nevada's First Congressional District recognize that it is morally wrong for Tlaib to call for the annihilation of Jews and the destruction of the nation of Israel. Titus once again ignored the will of her constituents and stuck to her extreme ideology. We need a change in Washington. We need a Congressman who truly represents the people. I will. Did you know you can actually call and talk with Mark? Yes, you can! Use this link: ==. You can easily schedule a call with Mark at a time that is convenient to you. It's your chance to ask him all the questions you have and find out more about Mark's platform. Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question. | == | == Mark Robertson retired from the Army. Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=abb2dce0c20364282eed3b8ee4fde505fc888cdfec05a5a4cee94a57c9a7a3f74424035e9621466a187a98e88edf400feaef7a3570742b9b187d7e6ab2bceeaa

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=abb2dce0c20364282eed3b8ee4fde505fc888cdfec05a5a4cee94a57c9a7a3f74424035e9621466a187a98e88edf400feaef7a3570742b9b187d7e6ab2bceeaa

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: A Strong Future with Speaker Mike Johnson's Leadership
body:
Peter, I'm thrilled to share my support for our new House Speaker, Mike Johnson's stance on sanctuary cities. As your representative in New York's 4th Congressional District...
[](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xzdljt-dytjdljkkt-r/) Peter, I'm thrilled to share my support for our new House Speaker, Mike Johnson's stance on sanctuary cities.As your representative in New York's 4th Congressional District, my journey from **NYPD detective** to **Hempstead Town Councilman** to **Congress** has always been about ensuring the safety and prosperity of our community. **Speaker Johnson's position on sanctuary cities resonates with our shared commitment to law and order.** In my over a decade with the NYPD, where I made significant arrests related to major crimes, and my leadership roles, including serving as Chief of the Island Park Fire Department during Superstorm Sandy, I've always prioritized the safety of our citizens. Like Speaker Johnson, I believe in responsible governance, as demonstrated during my tenure at Hempstead, where we managed to freeze or cut taxes while improving our credit ratings. This is the kind of fiscal responsibility and **strong leadership** that we need at a national level.Speaker Johnson's approach aligns with our values and reflects a deep understanding of the complex challenges we face. His advocacy for policies that **support law-abiding citizens** and ensure the effective use of federal resources is a step in the right direction.**Let us support Speaker Johnson in creating our nation's safer, stronger future.** Best regards,
Anthony | | [Unsubscribe](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-u-xzdljt-dytjdljkkt-j/)
---

clean_body: Friend, We're not bringing this to your attention for no reason... Ron DeSantis has hit 88 out of 99 counties in Iowa because he cares about EARNING the vote. The first caucus in the nation is quickly approaching on January 15th. Why the IA Caucus matters: 🌽 When Ron DeSantis wins at the start of the year, the nation wakes up to the truth: We are the only threat to Joe Biden in this race. 🌽 The momentum of winning in January sets us on track to take on every nominating state leading up to November. 🌽 If you help us win this critical caucus, together we will effectively SHUT DOWN the lying narrative of the media by proving they can't hide the cry for leadership coming from the American people. SUPPORT RON DESANTIS BEFORE IOWA We aren't slowing down. We're putting in the work. And Ron DeSantis is leading the way. If you're ready for sanity, integrity, transparency, leadership, and America FREE from the woke indoctrination poisoning kids, THIS IS HOW WE DO IT. We need your support every day. SEND IN $15 SEND IN $35 SEND IN $50 SEND IN $80 This campaign is working around the clock to prepare to win in under 75 days. We have what it takes to win. Millions are being poured into taking us down. We need your help with the resources to fight back. In Freedom, Team DeSantis Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. # MONDAY, NOVEMBER 13, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** On this date in 1789, Benjamin Franklin penned his last great quotable phrase, mentioning in a letter to a friend that _" Nothing is certain but death and taxes."_ The context of the line, rarely noted, [can be read here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFugzAQQL8GNqOzD5wweOiSLV07ogMOuNTYqbmk6t9XytSh09uent7HdbiSREnrO-0cdMkDTSpPHqw1Fo3Doa3nsDA7xpqD9X1_PgOcbL2FEbGbLBADuxOAoxlnHHsG7yxA29YSHDi01qKFrgPf4OKXbiT0PYzt5MeqBZ5Fc2luWZJuvMSf_OTSTHmvY9hU70eFb5W7VO4y5XSo6EMlp4mTcmlyWSt3GWN-gdONdklmKZQ-o6TDRDrUrIVJzdcjKxtKs9GNzV9XXcJ8_5YY5fCnqoV1J4mvAv1_yG8AAAD__xcLZIE). Want to keep up with us on X? [Follow us here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1rwzAQQH-NtMWcPi0PGrp4S6ZCRyPLp_iKHAX7iOm_LzRr5_d48L6u0zVRpcf9ljaMXNqUMtMLJ6Uuyly0maxcYkHUaCRG5YchBIBeyTVihmAsBHTe9VmD9XOCEjCboNyAg6SoQRullFHgHPjOFF_cnIwfYLbZz8ICLsRt774bPXjFUn_aC_cut03WuDI_D2E-hB6FHvkk5jcTevxccXzLNzwPucfleVKtdPheWLhviepfhf-f-g0AAP__pzBNjA). ## Americans Get a Break on Taxes
The IRS announced a 5.4% inflation adjustment in its tax brackets, giving Americans a chance [to increase their take-home pay](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwyAURp8Gb1jci43jgaGLt3TtaPFzSWhtiIDEydtX6dz1-450pPN1Xs8mbjFdPs1OuoW8Gtfig1YADpKjXIfO60CEJDvSoOb5dBJigu6qYRoczuMIbka04v0YUuEkJxAQrOuiRoESACSIcRSql0GF0RqpZmEHpywbBPnYcum_c0ztSmF75QeV3uW92_S1tVtl8oPhwnA5jqMP-WnvNSaq9c0wXMjllPcXwyWWyiu1yhMdvJknt8W4n_dQm0neFM89-btrMSeOAoeuaH874rbFqiY2iMtu4vanbv-X-A0AAP__8hBgjA). The changes are for the 2024 tax year, meaning returns filed in 2025. In addition to boosting the income thresholds for each tax bracket, the IRS will also raise the standard deduction for married couples and individuals. For married couples, it will rise to $29,200 from $27,700. The impact of the new tax brackets varies based on income level. [Here's a link to a chart](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL8Gb1h3hyHxwNDFW7p2tDA-Ai02EUZx-_dVOnd-0nvS-7jNN5dy2u_vbmPbQpmdb-nJM6JEJUnNQ7fawEysOrZoxvF6BbhgFy0OK2sX_PWyGh_WUYN2CyrvtTZOQ-iSJSCFiApBazC9CiboxSkzwjJ4s4gBeE2t1P6zpL1FDvmnPLn2vmxdtrG1xyHUm6BJ0HSeZ-_3xb-goOmlFjQhCppgFDSlesjIlaWrLFtkufMp0-7LxrK5b7lU57-4HTKUKglo6GPbclft-jhTzukwFzHAfXMp__Xb_zt-AwAA__84qV-d) with next year's marginal brackets; see how it affects you.
## Trump, Media Want His Trial Televised Live
In a rare show of agreement between Donald Trump and America's biggest media outlets, both have asked the federal courts to allow [TV cameras to cover](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1y8yAQAJ9G6vAAhxAqVHyNO39tSs0JDusS9DPobE_ePuPUKXe22dmP23RDLrzd_-NKo-R9wij8pMkYZUBZmFybxkxkCVoajR-GELTuTbuMJgW0sSPMfe8zIBgKRiPMzhJCp1serbZgjAGju077C2SfuxnBD3p20c-N05RY9nr53HmThXL53p9UL3Ff2zIuIsfZwL_GXht7xWOj1_lWb6jCsVBjr1If66EyJapYFBWKwvumeBOqmSptkZRUxqKECj35pKTi8pAv3JTXyaXQR2cszGGOrncGvQXvaAhh7ts6puPFpfDp-8bp-4pcfuPk71c_AQAA___fW2ry) his Washington D.C. trial on election interference charges. _" I want this trial to be seen by everybody in the world,"_ Trump said as his lawyer filed papers requesting the current rules banning TV coverage in federal courts be suspended for his case. Some Democratic leaders also asked that cameras be allowed. Prosecutors oppose the effort, saying it could intimidate witnesses and jurors. Some experts say the decades-old prohibition on cameras in federal courts [is unlikely to be overturned](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2OozAUhZ_GdEb-w5CCYhu6bLslMvZ1uBuDkX0DytuPMtJ00xyd4kjn0_fvPt8dJtwff90GI8U8O094wiwll5orPZsmjBFAgW5glPZ2GwYhetms4xKll8p3xoCArvdWxRAWNcTOD0Ga2OCohNJSSi1F1wnb6mhjtzhtb2Ix3i7MCAhIubT_M-60QkzvfEJpfd6aNK5ER2X6D1MTU9N1Xe2RExL6_BkwNe1wVaamzwtTk5Q_QcWdUOnNcefBlecOtXIqr-3gi_PPykPBEzhlTpDgxAp8xcoD9xwSeMK88_paTij1U6mgS1wIqWwvTFPGcFyYElbbMyMem8P0TUy_C_wKAAD__8cjcow) by the Judicial Conference, the court's policy-making body.
## Study: Wegovy Diet Drug Cuts Heart Risks
The popular weight-loss drug Wegovy reduced the risk of [serious heart problems](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vwyAUAH-NvRHxYTAMDF2ypWtH6wEP-1U4RIYm8r-v0rnj6ZbTfd2WG1Ch-_oJO_qe6wKx0xMXIZhQTKplGpPPiBLViF4Y56zlfBbj5q1FHpMMqEEIBXHWJgI6rlVW0lk9kpdcKiGEElxrbi4qm6wDKON4mKIJw8QxUa_H5bvSvW-Yy1mfeFxi3cfit94fbVAfg7wO8gqPO77aW73h6BQLDvL6wrU-T9Zwh7X8dErIasBG_WQbwtFZoobQkNlZCjk7K1RGCBEnA5HH4GIynIN24-HT40WlUDPzMPF1Byp_Jf3_Mb8BAAD__7zWZC4) by 20% in a large international study, and it could change the way doctors treat certain heart patients. It's the first research indicating that an obesity medication can safely prevent a heart attack or stroke, and it could put pressure on insurers to cover the drugs. They're currently considered cosmetic treatments and not insured. The closely-watched trial of Novo Nordisk's Wegovy [involved 17,500 people](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOtCAURp8GOwwXFLWg-Bu7-dstDeJF7i7KBJgx8_ab2WS7bb7mS05OzsdtuVmKdO7_7YGm-rRYV-mJCwAHxaVaumYzHlGiatCAnqZxFGKAJhgtXKe2cViVcML1o7KiE37qYRjB6W1syEghFQAoEH0vdKu89v1qlZ7E2jm9sk7gRjXl9jPRWQP6-EpPzK1LRxNNqPVemPrH5MzkfF1X687VvU8m5zeayRngdy6kPVQeUyl8y4-dX7in54uXaEvAwjOVL548L5gpPQoPaHPlLh33SM5WSmdpQz1ik812vyhGKnpgndgPS_HHqP4d6DsAAP__5JlnSQ) who received weekly injections. The results were presented Saturday at an American Heart Association meeting and published simultaneously in the New England Journal of Medicine.

clean_body: The House Speaker race hit a wall Thursday as and the GOP shot down a plan to empower Speaker Pro Tem Patrick McHenry as temporary Speaker until January. | | | | | | MONDAY, NOVEMBER 13, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! On this date in 1789, Benjamin Franklin penned his last great quotable phrase, mentioning in a letter to a friend that " Nothing is certain but death and taxes." The context of the line, rarely noted, . If you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, you can take care of that . Want to keep up with us on X? . is throwing in a free sample pack of their electrolyte drinks (Editor's note: these are great. I have a box in my pantry and need to reorder soon) with any purchase. ! | Americans Get a Break on Taxes The IRS announced a 5.4% inflation adjustment in its tax brackets, giving Americans a chance . The changes are for the 2024 tax year, meaning returns filed in 2025. In addition to boosting the income thresholds for each tax bracket, the IRS will also raise the standard deduction for married couples and individuals. For married couples, it will rise to $29,200 from $27,700. The impact of the new tax brackets varies based on income level. with next year's marginal brackets; see how it affects you. Trump, Media Want His Trial Televised Live In a rare show of agreement between Donald Trump and America's biggest media outlets, both have asked the federal courts to allow his Washington D.C. trial on election interference charges. " I want this trial to be seen by everybody in the world," Trump said as his lawyer filed papers requesting the current rules banning TV coverage in federal courts be suspended for his case. Some Democratic leaders also asked that cameras be allowed. Prosecutors oppose the effort, saying it could intimidate witnesses and jurors. Some experts say the decades-old prohibition on cameras in federal courts by the Judicial Conference, the court's policy-making body. Study: Wegovy Diet Drug Cuts Heart Risks The popular weight-loss drug Wegovy reduced the risk of by 20% in a large international study, and it could change the way doctors treat certain heart patients. It's the first research indicating that an obesity medication can safely prevent a heart attack or stroke, and it could put pressure on insurers to cover the drugs. They're currently considered cosmetic treatments and not insured. The closely-watched trial of Novo Nordisk's Wegovy who received weekly injections. The results were presented Saturday at an American Heart Association meeting and published simultaneously in the New England Journal of Medicine. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Shut down Shell plastics plant before disaster strikes
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2115187?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Sign the petition to SHUT DOWN Shell’s plastic plant in Beaver County, Pennsylvania!** Flames shooting into the air. A night sky filled with an unnatural orange glow. Noxious odors penetrating residential neighborhoods. These are just some of the horrifying experiences Pennsylvanians have experienced since Shell opened its plastic plant. In fact, that plant malfunctioned and triggered excess gas flaring just _**TWO WEEKS after opening.**_ Before the plant even opened Shell had already violated its 12-month emission limits for **carbon monoxide, nitrogen oxides, and volatile organic compounds** \-- these are _**toxic chemicals**_ that Pennsylvania communities cannot afford to be breathing. Some families chose to move away to escape **the looming threat to their children’s health![Please, Friend, support the demands of Pennsylvanians and tell the Department of Environmental Protection to SHUT DOWN the Shell plastic plant!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2115188?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** ***Your Signature is Missing, Friend*** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2115189?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
If you looked out your window and saw flames shooting into an orange sky, wouldn’t you worry about what pollution might be being released into your community? Shell has a long history of dodging accountability and deflecting blame at the expense of our communities. I wouldn’t trust their operations either.
Meanwhile, **Shell executives are raking in the profits** far away from the pollution their plants are creating. The people of Beaver County deal with the consequences and get none of the benefits. Their demand is reasonable -- and **your action can help them before another dangerous malfunction happens!** [**Tell the Pennsylvania Department of Environmental Protection to STOP operations at Shell’s plastic plant by 11:59pm TONIGHT!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2115190?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2115189?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Paloma Henriques
Senior petrochemical campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

✔️ He's visited 92 out of 99 counties in Iowa (and counting).

✔️ He's defended Iowans and stood up for their critical role in this race.

✔️ He's earned a historic endorsement from a sitting Governor before the primary (the first candidate to earn this since 1996!)

>From the media to the attacks, nothing will stand in the way of Ron DeSantis winning the Iowa Caucus in January... and winning across the board when this election year kicks off.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9cc36f7208835527e288847e2d751dad68648af316f5ec2419f87ea6474468d8ec6ad1ebc120efb4b60058a89897bea44491d3c0c85845f7ada95ac218c73ec1

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9cc36f72088355276436341d72931fc306245d904089ec7c7317fc7904e2dc53cfe98a8d01f9950e31c80571381e485a403b1830971fd5dd228e527dc31efba2
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9cc36f7208835527ac0c10df2c51c7a25737cd93e7af28e7666193010e54d0a33d0360af98cd4dfbdf944ca72bc8d0f6ef65321e4c48438751d13148ef12ab03

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9cc36f7208835527ac0c10df2c51c7a25737cd93e7af28e7666193010e54d0a33d0360af98cd4dfbdf944ca72bc8d0f6ef65321e4c48438751d13148ef12ab03

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.
