name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: I'm sick over this Biden announcement
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

I hate to be this blunt.

But I have to ask you, **__can you give me 12 months_?_**

With everything that’s at stake for the pro-life movement _(and our country!)_ in 2024, can I count on you to please sign up as a _Students for Life Action_ monthly contributor – __at least through November 2024_?_

I know I’ve asked you this before, Pro-Life Friend. But before you decide, please consider this . . .

We are now just **ONE YEAR AWAY** from Election Day 2024.

And just days ago, _The Hill_ reported something from the Biden campaign that made me sick – _something that I’m worried could give them a huge leg up if you and I don’t answer them_.

In an article discussing the massive fundraising haul that President Biden’s brought in during the third quarter, _The Hill_ bragged:

**“The Biden campaign announced it . . . has over 112,000 people who have committed to donating every month.”**
Pro-Life Friend, if the radical pro-abortion Left outpaces you and me on BOTH contributions from fat-cat donors and monthly contributors, **_I truly fear for the worst in 2024_.**

**[So, can I count on you to please sign up as a _Students for Life Action_ monthly contributor – even if it’s just for the next 12 months](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjdhjuk-duchtdja-y/)?**

You can sign up for as little as $10.00 per month – just $0.33 a day.

If you don’t have tens of thousands of dollars to give, this is the best way that you can make an impact for the lives of the precious little boys and girls I know you want to save as badly as I do!

The fact is, 2024 may just turn out to be the most critical year ever for the pro-life movement.

_The Abortion Lobby and their political pals are going all-out to drive the final nail in the pro-life movement’s coffin_.

Should they succeed in reinstalling Joe Biden in the White House, expanding their U.S. Senate Majority, and seizing back control of the U.S. House, they’ll immediately move to FORCE:

**•** Legalized abortion-on-demand on all 50 states – up until the moment of birth;
**•** Force taxpayers like you and me to fund it; and
**•** Impeach any U.S. Supreme Court Justice who dares to pipe up about it.
**[>>> SIGN UP TO GIVE MONTHLY<<< ](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjdhjuk-duchtdja-j/)**
It makes my stomach churn just thinking about it.

If just a handful of votes in a handful of races go wrong, that could be what we’re facing.

And it’s not like you and I won’t have anything going on until next November either.

It’s not like we can sit around twiddling our thumbs while we get ready.

With your support, we’re currently working to FORCE the U.S. Senate on record on S. 204, _The Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act._

_If passed, this law would simply mandate that babies who survive botched abortion attempts are cared for – and not simply just tossed in the garbage or left to die_.

Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-NY) has been blocking this bill from even getting a vote, worried what could happen to pro-abortion Democrat Senators who vote against it.

_He’s right to be worried!**And that’s why we need to force the vote!**_

Not only that, but this weekend, we’re launching a _Pro-Life Legislative Day of Action_ in 15 states where battles to save innocent preborn life are raging, including:

**>>> _FLORIDA_ ,** where several pro-abortion Republicans are seeking to replace Florida’s _Heartbeat Law_ with a 12-week one, which we knew would happen after President Trump called the pro-life law Governor DeSantis signed off on “terrible.”
We have to fight with everything we have to ensure that doesn’t happen!
**>>> _SOUTH CAROLINA_ ,** where six GOP Senators _(all of whom claim to be pro-life)_ KILLED our _Life at Conception Bill._
We’re going to be there to let them know THERE WILL BE CONSEQUENCES!
**>>> _NEBRASKA_ ,** where Republican State Senator Merve Riepe singlehandedly stopped the state’s _Heartbeat Bill_ from passing.
We’re calling on him to RESIGN and insisting his colleagues pass a _Life at Conception Bill_ in January.
**>>> _PENNSYLVANIA_ ,** where the University of Pittsburgh was caught red-handed funding gruesome experiments involving rats and the bodies of recently-aborted preborn babies.
Because of our pressure, the University has not been funded, and we aim to keep it that way until they cease their experiments on dead babies!
I could go on and on, Pro-Life Friend.

_If, like President Biden, I had 112,000 donors who committed to contributing monthly through next November, we’d never lose a fight!_

_EVER!_

Monthly contributors are so critical to all we do because they:

**1) _Allow us to fight Planned Parenthood’s millions during critical election years_.**
With the media, politicians in BOTH parties, Hollywood fat-cats, and Planned Parenthood’s millions all on their side, the Abortion Lobby starts off with some huge advantages.
But thousands of monthly contributors – giving $10 or $25 a month – helps create a snowball effect enabling you and me to make a “Big Money” impact, which can be absolutely critical during election years;
**2) _Guarantee a steady flow of resources I know I can count on every month_ ,** which can be critical to my ability to fight bad legislation and work to pass new life-saving laws; and
**3) _Identify and train the next generation of pro-life leaders_.** You can’t manage a big army without competent leaders. The national grassroots army that _Students for Life Action_ is building requires constant training for young people who are willing to dedicate their lives to abolishing abortion. Monthly contributors play a major role in funding our trainings.
**[>>> SIGN UP TO GIVE MONTHLY<<< ](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjdhjuk-duchtdja-i/)**
Pro-Life Friend, you know the stakes in 2024.

Do you want to wake up the morning after Election Day 2024 to headlines like, “ _Biden Victorious: Vows Abortion Expansion Nationwide_?”

Or do you want to read headlines like, “ _Pro-Lifers Power President’s Defeat_?”

What you do right now – TODAY – can help decide whether or not we’ll be celebrating next November.

**[So, can you give me 12 months](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjdhjuk-duchtdja-d/)?**

**[Will you please sign up as a _Students for Life Action_ monthly contributor right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjdhjuk-duchtdja-h/)?**

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

P.S. – President Biden just announced he has 112,000 donors who have committed to giving monthly through next November’s election!

If the radical pro-abortion Left outpaces you and me on BOTH contributions from fat-cat donors and monthly contributors, **_I truly fear for the worst in 2024_.**

**[So, can I count on you to please sign up as a _Students for Life Action_ monthly contributor – even if it’s just for the next 12 months](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjdhjuk-duchtdja-k/)?**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

[update preferences](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.updatemyprofile.com/j-sjdhjuk-026154D2-duchtdja-u) | [unsubscribe](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-u-sjdhjuk-duchtdja-o/)
**

**
---

name: David Hogg, Leaders We Deserve
subject: Biden delivered:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
President Joe Biden just announced the creation of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4630d5d0-0af0-47a8-85d2-0b06bd6fc6c1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | I’m (almost) at a loss for words sharing this announcement with you, Peter: President Joe Biden just announced the creation of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. This win couldn’t have happened without the non-stop work of young leaders and activists across the country, including everyone at March For Our Lives. After four long years of protests, registering thousands of young voters, meeting after meeting, and MANY Zoom calls...we did it!!! I’ll share more about the work young leaders did to get us to this point, but first: [Please split a donation of $10 today between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action to help carry this momentum forward and elect the leaders we deserve.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8e480704-7209-4148-b206-78352ef6b578/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6bf85d83-5dc6-49da-a682-0fe2391b48b0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | Here’s why we can draw a direct line from our work to the Biden administration’s new Office of Gun Violence Prevention, Peter. When we talk about electing the “leaders we deserve,” we’re talking about folks like Maxwell Frost, one of our Advisory Board members and the first Gen-Z Member of Congress. Maxwell served as the first National Organizing Director for March For Our Lives and really helped us level-up our organizing work, especially on behalf of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. We did everything from asking presidential candidates about opening that department if they were elected at our 2020 Gun Safety Forum to sleeping on an office floor in the Virginia House of Delegates to ensure we were able to lobby on behalf of gun violence prevention, while armed white supremacists pointed guns at them through windows. The very first bill he introduced on the House floor was to establish a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. Republicans blocked it, but he didn’t give up, and neither did we. Even when it became clear that NRA-sponsored politicians weren’t going to let his bill pass, President Biden stepped in. In fact, Vice President Kamala Harris introduced Maxwell at the official announcement of the Office of GVP, and Maxwell got to introduce President Biden!! And when we talk about leveraging the power of the youth vote, we’re talking about years of record-breaking youth voting turnout that led us to this announcement. In the last five years, we went from having the most pro-NRA president in American history to the most pro-gun safety president in American history. Young people were critical in electing Biden. Our voices and votes matter. But we need to elect more young people to make sure we build power on the inside and outside of politics [Help us carry this momentum and get more life-saving sh*t done by splitting a donation of $10 between Blue Amp Action and Leaders We Deserve.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee1b4845-61a0-4785-9141-b34bc9f01e16/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [CHIP IN $10 OR MORE NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6f2a2729-a338-49ec-aee4-552ed929a482/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We should celebrate this momentous victory, Peter — but it doesn’t mean we can slow down or stop anytime soon. There is still so much work to be done, from tackling the climate crisis to expanding abortion access to building a country that isn’t run by the rich and powerful few. There is a long road ahead of us, and we need your help if we’re going to score more wins, elect more young people to office, and stop the fascist takeover of our country. [If you’re celebrating this victory, but are ready for the important work ahead, please split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action to help fund our work. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T03b4d09a-889e-4315-ba5a-7ed408b097f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://default.salsalabs.org/T98e66d50-c88b-4f81-8303-175a4490ffc0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5d6de9ff-58db-430a-9b88-b5a61a9ec250/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/T63fffe88-61cd-4a89-9088-11e2a27acd47/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Or, donate another amount](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ted4cbc97-4372-45d8-b6c9-72796ce7a2ee/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
| | | Thanks for your support, Peter. Together, we will keep making the progress we deserve. David Hogg P.S. Me when we finally get the Office of Gun Violence Prevention 👇😊 [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3ca62caa-9d38-4f97-9be4-c23f98247351/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T62dc1767-79f9-4608-988c-60ff6a5d06f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

subject: They compared me to a monkey.

My grandparents left Jamaica for Guatemala during the Great Depression, and like so many other American families, my parents left Guatemala and came to the United States of America to grow a family and build a better life. Now, I’m a Republican, family man, engineer, community leader, and small business owner running in the most important Congressional race in the entire country. https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=0a3096e7edf34afec61bd0f7ca81941f12ec99d6c32d7c3a0412a10742f093ff385780b3744560966da9ca332dbe7d448d73c81b75379e3a27aa26e84310740a Last year, the Democrats used their lies and dirty tricks to defeat me by just 2,000 votes, but they aren’t going to scare me away by calling me names. name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.3

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1npn8d5dctt1nj9b29fltq41q3f4su13rrtpev0_rp22sh2s8i66p74s3ie2o76cdh2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi3k2g6a50trotcdjtti74qu0gegkrdmapgevph8_rp22sh2s8i66p74s3ie2o76cdh2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi7e5plgia8ge2alomp7cmt0scpi440hka1qru1g_rp22sh2s8i66p74s3ie2o76cdh2bs)**

What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda. I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. That’s why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvbe4q1npqq7u26bjmavmtkrdns6rq4rrf8abtho_rp22sh2s8i66p74s3ie2o75chh2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvga6ff9utk1ndb8f6cf90rberubp4bbjntmr6ho_rp22sh2s8i66p74s3ie2o75chh2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za2vp8aa8arh4j4fjt6qn2avk6bt71um4ljfnv68_rp22sh2s8i66p74s3ie2o75chh2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Sen. Hashmi Needs to Resign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001171osQY7JHPyi8ZPui5xvnxK41-eZ7h3OCm9EcIeBM1vZ6Ol122D85bhXujF2K4Haa9-ZVm7iZRmJXE1ScLeUXTU_3QR62urARiz8ezgitzpG8WOJMd-iEs44qDvrc8fISmaeFGdsy4A-FVsUapL0b_ukoCsSjN18vkVNn4XQac=&c=SNVO-oFyJKzSDgYExL8-D7CGx3UY7ob6PPJQAYXQX3at3WB-Vh-MUQ==&ch=HjM6_EEeNes05SNKBv6WZaccMXPzvOHqUN0H-lpeggMuHFH7df7GMA==)
---
| Election Fraud is a Serious Crime
---
| | |
---|---
Dear Friends,

I am calling on State Senator Ghazala Hashmi to resign over her fraudulent claim of residing at an apartment in North Chesterfield. She has committed election fraud and lied to voters. She must resign.

Sen. Hashmi and her husband own a house that they have lived in for about 25 years. Re-districting moved the lines for a lot of state senate districts. Sen. Hashmi's house was drawn into a new district. Virginia law requires state senators to live in the district they represent.

Luke Rosiak, a reporter with The Daily Wire was on John Reid's show this morning on WRVA. He spoke about inconsistencies and omissions in Hashmi's paperwork. He also reported that a group of citizens has documented that she was living in her home, outside of the district, during the entire month of October. Reid suggested that Hashmi's carelessness makes her "a stupid con artist." Yeah, she got lazy. You can listen to the whole interview here- [WRVA John Reid- Luke Rosiak (audacy.com)](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001171osQY7JHPyi8ZPui5xvnxK41-eZ7h3OCm9EcIeBM1vZ6Ol122D8yK4lWjmvbAeZN0AISOb1TS0pv5Zv-0-YZEV3tJBW25LFHVPQ-eqZpaHp0W9BtgB6AVVNdxC-ws0ZMaEPZJ3StMaMdDOqGSn2EBKYDT54_Q_rB26g_aZqhQtV_bDQoLpkw5o28NzEbOzn512sd1dxp2tnK-U1kOdk3KkBu46P-9QKeKE-nzcIUgT4CQNOv5rWH7d8sr6CE0e&c=SNVO-oFyJKzSDgYExL8-D7CGx3UY7ob6PPJQAYXQX3at3WB-Vh-MUQ==&ch=HjM6_EEeNes05SNKBv6WZaccMXPzvOHqUN0H-lpeggMuHFH7df7GMA==)

Below is a photo of one of the documents in question and [here is a link to that one and the rest of her campaign paperwork](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001171osQY7JHPyi8ZPui5xvnxK41-eZ7h3OCm9EcIeBM1vZ6Ol122D8yK4lWjmvbAeF8LzJ0j4CxT68i4MWAveVF7APcF5JGtlx6YswQccEdE76usHudXXAdFWz87FglRo4_lQoDJk3ReQ3W63h04c_8Rioa9kpyVdgwcpx6RDdIH0aMPeF_II_Tr_mu-naheuiJqEofGuGf27QCgi3NB0oI4f5xLMvoA2&c=SNVO-oFyJKzSDgYExL8-D7CGx3UY7ob6PPJQAYXQX3at3WB-Vh-MUQ==&ch=HjM6_EEeNes05SNKBv6WZaccMXPzvOHqUN0H-lpeggMuHFH7df7GMA==). Take a good look at lines 4 and 5.
---
She doesn't live in that apartment, line 4. So she's registered in a place where she doesn't live, line 5. Then take a look at her signature on the form. That's a felony.
I don't agree with those who say there should be a special election called by the Governor to replace Sen. Ghazala Hashmi. Two candidates filed in Senate District 15 by the deadline and one is disqualified because she lied about her primary residence. This cannot stand. We must do something.
Are there any Democrats brave enough to stand up for the rule of law and for election integrity by calling for Sen. Hashmi's resignation? Of course, Virginia Democrats hardly ever criticize their tribe. Sad to see.
The law applies equally to everyone. The Department of Elections and the Attorney General's office need to investigate, and Democrat Senate leaders need to join me in calling for Sen. Ghazala Hashmi to resign.

For God & Country, Amanda Chase
---

You can listen to the whole interview here- == Below is a photo of one of the documents in question and ==. Take a good look at lines 4 and 5. She doesn't live in that apartment, line 4. So she's registered in a place where she doesn't live, line 5. Then take a look at her signature on the form. That's a felony. I don't agree with those who say there should be a special election called by the Governor to replace Sen. Ghazala Hashmi. Two candidates filed in Senate District 15 by the deadline and one is disqualified because she lied about her primary residence. This cannot stand. We must do something. Are there any Democrats brave enough to stand up for the rule of law and for election integrity by calling for Sen. Hashmi's resignation? Of course, Virginia Democrats hardly ever criticize their tribe. Sad to see. The law applies equally to everyone. The Department of Elections and the Attorney General's office need to investigate, and Democrat Senate leaders need to join me in calling for Sen. Ghazala Hashmi to resign. For God & Country, Amanda Chase | | | | == | | | | | | | | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811, Midlothian, VA 23112 | | == Sent by mailto:amanda@chaseforva.com powered by == ==

subject: Sign: Stop letting Trump delay his trials
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign your name: Tell the Trump judges to stop letting Trump delay his trials](https://default.salsalabs.org/T45de8a35-bb8b-4a51-aaa8-e849a7fa55a6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T037d693a-9fef-4b62-b535-02ef3db80e1c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump and his lawyers are doing whatever they can to delay his trials. Filing frivolous motions, repeatedly calling for the cases to be dismissed, and doing whatever they can to delay justice. They are trying to run out the clock, in the hope that Trump wins the election, and can pardon himself or simply ignore the justice system altogether. And in too many instances, judges have been letting him get away with this, taking too much time to address this nonsense, and giving him way more leeway than a typical defendant would get. [**This needs to stop NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a4c5498-f3ee-402d-99e7-2d09842521c4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Trump is a clear and present threat to our democracy and our way of life, and we can't allow him to escape punishment for his crimes. In each case, he has the right to a trial, but it must happen in a timely fashion -- or it may never happen at all. [**Sign the petition: Tell the Trump judges to stop letting Trump delay his trials!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T90ba35df-eadd-4c12-a706-187296bf3875/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: I’m running for Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Let me put the bottom line upfront: I am running for Governor, and I need your support!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73266171/437946651/-1898250603?refcode=BLU-ASFG-20231113-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmEyYmI0NWQtMjk4Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SiW7RIWclON4XxY_L5f2foJMqW4-izgVtiuZLl-wkVo=)

| Peter,

Let me put the bottom line upfront: I am running for Governor, and I need your support!

Now, let me tell you why: Years ago, I swore my first oath to our Constitution. I enthusiastically embarked upon a journey and a career of public service — first in law enforcement and then at CIA. I worked at home and abroad to keep our country safe and protect the country I love.

When my husband Adam and I moved our three daughters home to Virginia – just miles from where we had grown up – I thought my days of public service had come to a close. But after the 2016 election, our country was at a crossroads, and I envisioned what it could be if we flipped Virginia’s 7th District and made clear that the people of our district deserved stronger representation. I worked hard, we built an extraordinary team driven by purpose and principle, and in 2018, our district elected a Democrat – me – for the first time since 1968.

I have served proudly through some extraordinarily consequential moments in our history, and I have endeavored to do right by my constituents every day. I am proud of the work I have done, the laws I have passed, and the difference I have made.

And now, our Commonwealth is at another crossroads – do we continue moving backward with attacks on our rights, our kids’ education, and our communities’ sense of security — or do we move forward on a path of progress? Last week, Virginia’s elections showed that Virginians want to move forward, but we need a new Governor to drive that progress.

I am running for Governor because I know what I will bring to the job – a deep and abiding love for our Commonwealth, a relentless work ethic, and a focus on bringing people together to solve the real challenges facing Virginians.

[_**It is a long road to the 2025 Governor’s election, but will you join me now as a Founding Donor and support my campaign with a contribution? I am working to build a strong foundation of support, and I need your help.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73266172/437946652/-1898250603?refcode=BLU-ASFG-20231113-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmEyYmI0NWQtMjk4Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SiW7RIWclON4XxY_L5f2foJMqW4-izgVtiuZLl-wkVo=)

name: Andrew Horne
subject: Andrew Horne Campaign Update!
body:
Friends,

I hope this message finds you well. I am thrilled to take a moment to update you on my experiences and progress over the past few months on the campaign trail.

The journey so far has been nothing short of incredible. Each day brings new connections with amazing individuals, and I am invigorated by the support and enthusiasm within our community. Whether it's knocking on doors every evening or making calls throughout the day, I am continually inspired by the engagement and passion of those I encounter.

Growing up here, I've always known that our community is special, and it's wonderful to see that support manifesting as I engage with its residents. It reinforces my belief that positive change is not only necessary but also attainable when we come together.

On a personal note, last week Eleanor took on her first cross country meet. It is important to always remember **why** we're fighting for change and continue to be there for our loved ones.

As you already know, my core issues revolve around Gun Safety, Education, and Women's Rights. These are not just campaign talking points for me; they are deeply personal convictions that drive my commitment to serving our community.

Additionally, I wanted to take a moment to highlight some **volunteer opportunities** within the campaign. Your support is invaluable, and I believe that everyone has unique skills and passions to contribute. Here are a few ways you can get involved:

**Postcard Campaign:**
Join us for a postcard party! Writing postcards to friends and neighbors is a personal and impactful way to spread our message. It's a great opportunity to connect with the community on a grassroots level.

**Social Media Engagement:**
If you're a social media enthusiast, we'd love your help in amplifying our message online. Your posts and shares can make a significant impact in reaching a broader audience and fostering community engagement.

**Door-to-Door Canvassing:**
For those who enjoy face-to-face interactions, door-to-door canvassing is an excellent way to directly engage with voters. Consider taking part in signature collection in your neighborhood or at public spaces like the library or farmers market.

**Phone Banking:**
Join our phone banking team to connect with voters in the district. Your calls make a difference, providing valuable information and addressing any concerns they may have.

**Neighborhood Meet and Greet:**
Host a neighborhood meet and greet to create a space for community members to come together, share their thoughts, and learn more about the campaign. These informal gatherings are essential for building a strong network of support.

Your involvement is crucial to the success of this campaign, and I encourage you to choose the opportunity that resonates most with your interests and comfort level. If you're interested in any of these options or have other ideas in mind, please reach out. We also have a campaign slack channel if you are interested in joining.

I'm excited to share some of the upcoming events that are unique to this week.

Today: **U.S. Surgeon General Dr. Vivek Murthy**

Tuesday: **Legislative District 8 Meeting**

Wednesday: **Legislative District 2 Candidate Forum**

Thursday: **Legislative District 3 Meeting**

Remember, I'm here for you. Feel free to call or email anytime. Your input is extremely important.

Thank you,

Andrew Horne
(480) 933-2449[](http://voice.google.com/calls?a=nc,%2B14809332449 "Call +1 480-933-2449 via Google Voice")
[www.HorneForArizona.com](http://www.HorneForArizona.com)

name: PragerU
subject: Survey: Public Education System
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
Fellow American, Every day that students step into taxpayer-funded classrooms, they are being indoctrinated instead of educated. Rather than learning how to think critically and develop reading and writing skills, children as young as kindergarten are learning radical ideas about systemic racism, gender fluidity, and anti-Americanism. As a nation, we have gotten away from the focus of education-the students-and have bowed to woke extremists and highly political teachers' unions. **[At PragerU, we're conducting a national survey about the American public education system. Can you take a few moments to share your thoughts about the state and quality of public education?](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzE3LTgzMDQyZjIxMTgzNTRmMDk5MGQwNmYwYzM1OTg4NmFkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy5zdXJ2ZXltb25rZXkuY29tL3IvWkRIU0syUD9OPUZGTzQ0MjE0In0/L6k8gq_LQy4iP6dgke9nbw)**
---
[Survey: American Public Education System](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
In many schools today, the purpose is to awaken students to the "fact" that they live in a country that has been, remains, and always will be... racist. Leftists celebrated when children were fed lessons from _The New York Times'_ 1619 Project, which seeks to redefine America as rooted in slavery, not liberty, and has been debunked for numerous factual errors. But now that schools in states including Florida, Texas, Oklahoma, Montana, and New Hampshire are using our free PragerU Kids videos and lesson plans-which teach classic American values-media outlets are complaining that the curriculum should be disregarded because we aren't "an accredited university." The double standard between woke curriculum, such as The 1619 Project (which does _not_ come from "an accredited university"), and pro-America lessons clearly highlights the agenda in public schools today. **[We're curious to hear what you think about public education in our nation. Take this short survey today to share your thoughts.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzE3LTgzMDQyZjIxMTgzNTRmMDk5MGQwNmYwYzM1OTg4NmFkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy5zdXJ2ZXltb25rZXkuY29tL3IvWkRIU0syUD9OPUZGTzQ0MjE0In0/JtqEX6uvU6byupd7BXr_Ig)** The left doesn't stop with their systemic racism agenda. Woke radicals think it's a sin to be a patriot and celebrate America, and schools are dismissive of parents' rights, even going so far as to label them extremists and "domestic terrorists." In California, the attorney general filed a lawsuit against a school district that required parental notification when a student changed their gender at school. And well-funded, radical teachers' unions are hurting-not helping-the public education system in America, while keeping even the worst teachers protected. **[Please share your opinion with us about the quality and state of public education in our nation by answering this short survey.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**
---
[Survey: American Public Education System](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._g)
---
Children should be the focus of public education, not the woke agenda of left-wing teachers' unions and activist educators. Thank you for sharing your thoughts today! Sincerely, PragerU

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | Fellow American, Every day that students step into taxpayer-funded classrooms, they are being indoctrinated instead of educated. Rather than learning how to think critically and develop reading and writing skills, children as young as kindergarten are learning radical ideas about systemic racism, gender fluidity, and anti-Americanism. As a nation, we have gotten away from the focus of education-the students-and have bowed to woke extremists and highly political teachers' unions. In many schools today, the purpose is to awaken students to the "fact" that they live in a country that has been, remains, and always will be... racist. Leftists celebrated when children were fed lessons from The New York Times' 1619 Project, which seeks to redefine America as rooted in slavery, not liberty, and has been debunked for numerous factual errors. But now that schools in states including Florida, Texas, Oklahoma, Montana, and New Hampshire are using our free PragerU Kids videos and lesson plans-which teach classic American values-media outlets are complaining that the curriculum should be disregarded because we aren't "an accredited university." The double standard between woke curriculum, such as The 1619 Project (which does not come from "an accredited university"), and pro-America lessons clearly highlights the agenda in public schools today. The left doesn't stop with their systemic racism agenda. Woke radicals think it's a sin to be a patriot and celebrate America, and schools are dismissive of parents' rights, even going so far as to label them extremists and "domestic terrorists." In California, the attorney general filed a lawsuit against a school district that required parental notification when a student changed their gender at school. And well-funded, radical teachers' unions are hurting-not helping-the public education system in America, while keeping even the worst teachers protected. Children should be the focus of public education, not the woke agenda of left-wing teachers' unions and activist educators. Thank you for sharing your thoughts today! Sincerely, PragerU Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Become a Founding Member
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I’ve got to be honest with you - with so many competing priorities, it’s critical to have the best team by my side.

|
[ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673207%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q8aEMlnjAFR6V%2b%2bl2lYOuQ&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American -

I have been hard at work with my team to identify KEY Republican Supporters who are committed to expanding the majority, and I was given your name.

I’ve got to be honest with you - with so many competing priorities, it’s critical to have the best team by my side. [**As I build my team, I’m asking if you will commit to becoming a _Founding Member_ of Team Johnson.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673208%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NO7SCV7Fnl7Ij38mEFwQKg&sysid=1)

[**BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673209%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Mr6SVZ4w%2fAOrDQEmKj1M8Q&sysid=1)
[**As a Founding Member,**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673200%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZU1fnzRYLXiG2dgKRObrmg&sysid=1) I’ll be leaning on you quite a bit. You’ll be the first to hear from me about critical campaign updates, exclusive video content, new merchandise, and crucial polls and petitions.

It is going to be all-hands-on-deck, and I am confident I can rely on your support. [**Would you join me as a Founding Member of Team Johnson today?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673201%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kMaWxFpSk8vFy53UtUHaTQ&sysid=1)

[**RESPOND TO THE SPEAKER HERE**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673202%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RGSpV5txbv4%2fa6QPFgDn7Q&sysid=1)
Gratefully,

[ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673203%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XFXlADKcsK1z55bROKFCzw&sysid=1)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

* * *

[ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673204%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lY%2fblF5%2b%2fVArDIdrK9bcYg&sysid=1)
As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people.

Would you take a moment to complete my [**_Official Speaker Survey_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673215%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PzYZZHdc9w%2fuXViPoIo9Pg&sysid=1) today?

Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input.

| **_SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673216%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=odlFAb4mlE9t6HT5TU9hOQ&sysid=1)

name: Ben Wikler, Chair of WisDems
subject: less than one year to win:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
The work we do this month could mean the margin of victory in the 2024 election.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td77edd45-f44c-4f2f-984f-b40c16e59690/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Hi, Peter. It’s Ben Wikler — Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin. This month, we mark 365 days out from Election Day 2024. I asked Blue Amp Action if I could share with you some thoughts on this critical inflection point. Right now, Republicans are making big moves in the Badger State to win in 2024 and impose their far-right, extremist ideology on Wisconsinites and the country. From hosting their first primary debate in Milwaukee to implementing a new GOP early vote program, they could win next November. We can’t let that happen, Peter . That’s why the WisDems and Blue Amp Action start this work early. **Every cycle since 2017, WisDems uses the one-year-out moment to knock doors, update our data, energize our volunteers statewide, and find the new voters we’ll need to win the following November.** We call this One Year to Win — a WisDems tradition. But Peter , it takes a lot of resources to make something like this successful and our grassroots funds are starting to run low. Our work over the next month could provide the margin of victory for 2024, which is what makes One Year To Win so important. _If we don't hit our fundraising goals, we'd have to significantly cut our capacity at this critical time and sacrifice that margin of victory._ [**That's why I'm asking you to make a $20.24 One Year to Win split donation between WisDems and Blue Amp Action. Your support will make a noticeable difference just one year out and could be the donation we need to knock that final set of doors and win in 2024 >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb11d2555-7588-4977-ba31-079dda71da2c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T74394c0d-db19-4893-a904-a9a021cb6c29/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | Thank you, Peter. Ben Wikler, Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

|

name: American Patriot Daily

name: GallegoForArizona.com
subject: a real killer for a campaign like ours
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Here is the direct and honest truth:
#

Peter —
Here is the direct and honest truth:
For a campaign like ours, funded primarily by small-dollar donations, we can’t afford stretches of weeks where fundraising slows down by too much.
When that happens, it can be a real killer for a campaign like ours.
We don’t have Trump and the MAGA mob waiting on our every word. We can’t count on a handful of billionaires to drop a pallet of cash on us. We depend on folks like you.
So we have to keep things moving knowing that people can’t give to every email they receive, but they can give to some of them over the course of the campaign.
We hope you’ll choose to give today.
We hope you’ll choose to give because we’re in one of those slow stretches right now, just a month after Kari Lake launched her campaign.
We hope you’ll choose to give because a leaked poll shows Kari Lake with a one-point edge over Ruben.
We hope you’ll choose to give because we’ve set a 3-day fundraising drive to close the gap on our fundraising goals — and it ends at midnight on November 15th.
So please. Make today be the day you give to elect Ruben:

name: 4Patriots
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdlc74enkn6cabb9l23okr91ksbcsmu30p7k53e0_rp22sh2s8i66p74sjg64o77cth2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn0nl8oscl1ecfsnu8tmuaa99u4tmai1eassabq8_rp22sh2s8i66p74sjg64o77cth2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziafvic7ar07k491n539k3ghvljvarasa4dgnfb8_rp22sh2s8i66p74sjg64o77cth2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuv64cgpl9lrr1ims3rq36a3vf3f8g41sicp1o3g_rp22sh2s8i66p74sjg64o77cth2bs)

name: Immediate Release - Rick Scott for Florida
subject: It’s Time to Unite Behind Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,

An open border with terrorists, criminals, and drugs pouring into our country. A botched withdrawal from Afghanistan. A military that is more focused on pronouns than lethality. People getting paid not to work. A nation where criminals have more rights than victims.

I’m often asked if this is the beginning of the end for America...

The truth is, it will be if we stop fighting and cede our country to the incompetent radical Democrats who are destroying the fundamental values that make America Great.

I know that we can return America to its rightful position of economic and military strength, but only with strong leadership in the White House.

**That is why I’m supporting my friend, President Donald J. Trump, to be the 47th President of the United States.**

**[If we’re going to take back our country, I need every conservative to unite behind President Trump. Do you stand with Trump in 2024?](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=2a9d71add2e04e22bab3787b91d9578d&_e=Fi3MXhfXDcwFr2TOb0Q_rQIsOYOPtTtpqgov3Y27gxA98dLR9Wt8_53I2K0Mlgk-UTmdkzk3fj9z1JEtTNven6g_L-X9X1E_qjqign5VpeBTzCw-OVTb86vFiMv5qF0vxPYDSz2HJuZmLKtTOcP5rmMRYWGwygmqTgMqsAXfDQCMp2g2G1iMjHkkJllQRIRdkX5a3I3PiWMmXaPTBoD_tW53T7APkSpHUPRcVKcXCBGN57DuqUktObbyasaQE28YLprn0GpQmxQajQaXRyqw45MDwyTaUvcCXUZNL6YW786s2iW9lKdoudCrYRfsZClQ1XvvaEMsKZKErg1VTx09S1ei66Y09Dh9MrC8LrBmGVbWh1BC9UpM_L2Nv17-coYY)**

---
[**STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=2a9d71add2e04e22bab3787b91d9578d&_e=Fi3MXhfXDcwFr2TOb0Q_rQIsOYOPtTtpqgov3Y27gxA98dLR9Wt8_53I2K0Mlgk-UTmdkzk3fj9z1JEtTNven6g_L-X9X1E_qjqign5VpeBTzCw-OVTb86vFiMv5qF0vxPYDSz2HJuZmLKtTOcP5rmMRYWGwygmqTgMqsAXfDQCMp2g2G1iMjHkkJllQRIRdkX5a3I3PiWMmXaPTBoD_tZdGFkViLM-0XAEg6XIjiZBuu5zck6ebacknBdY6av9Hz4cB3brVtB5VjfmtZR46zArHeW8sqG-dSX4AJnWmal5X_UIrcL0IrHLxOxZZHxTU3Lbh02LrQNvbBOGDmlo7nllUCKemnL4UuPGFnCEErnJoLZwyGChUwUN5uCzUyOrW)

It’s time for the Republican Party to come together behind one candidate and declare with one voice that we are united in our efforts to defeat Joe Biden and RESCUE AMERICA.

Republican voters across the country are making their voices loud and clear: **they want the return of Donald Trump.**

America was safer and more prosperous when he led our nation. He stood up to our enemies, our economy was booming, and we were achieving energy independence.

_I worked hand in hand with him, and I’m excited to do it again._

**[I’m counting on grassroots patriots like you to help me get President Trump back in the White House and to hold onto my seat in the Senate. clean_body: | | | Peter, An open border with terrorists, criminals, and drugs pouring into our country. A botched withdrawal from Afghanistan. A military that is more focused on pronouns than lethality. People getting paid not to work. A nation where criminals have more rights than victims. I’m often asked if this is the beginning of the end for America... The truth is, it will be if we stop fighting and cede our country to the incompetent radical Democrats who are destroying the fundamental values that make America Great. I know that we can return America to its rightful position of economic and military strength, but only with strong leadership in the White House. That is why I’m supporting my friend, President Donald J. Trump, to be the 47th President of the United States. It’s time for the Republican Party to come together behind one candidate and declare with one voice that we are united in our efforts to defeat Joe Biden and RESCUE AMERICA. Republican voters across the country are making their voices loud and clear: they want the return of Donald Trump. America was safer and more prosperous when he led our nation. He stood up to our enemies, our economy was booming, and we were achieving energy independence. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: BREAKING - SkyTree Book Fairs challenges Scholastic’s monopoly
body:
Here’s what we’re up against.

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35477%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BTEePxLxMGU9csN4ugFXtA&sysid=1 "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children’s schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here’s what we’re up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from “Welcome to St. Hell,” a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We’ve censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35478%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3c5mVoNxA86r5nz5uHp4NQ&sysid=1)[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35478%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3c5mVoNxA86r5nz5uHp4NQ&sysid=1)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here’s how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35479%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oMfoOtntqfjvCQLQb9s6OQ&sysid=1)

[Donate](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35470%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RmJXowLW%2bidbAuW7T97LAw&sysid=1)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children’s book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here’s the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it’s working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

[Donate $10 >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35471%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wYmUYzFP%2b1JnYxfTaH%2bqXA&sysid=1)

name: 4Patriots
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35468%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=irn6H7eV2evXJw9Fsu3ztQ&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35469%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mGw6JRwo%2fEedYP9n93hKCw&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35460%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7AhGdBZSeLppJbrVj%2fCJxw&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35461%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VrtOto4TXr2c3R0R%2bFwWGQ&sysid=1)

subject: A View From The Campaign Trail

body:
As we start another incredible week on the campaign trail, I️ want to take a moment to hit the highlights from this past week!

https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0b1602f466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_11_09_45&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0b1602f466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

I hope this message finds you well and filled with the same sense of pride and gratitude that I have experienced over the past week on the campaign trail. Your unwavering support keeps me inspired and energized, and I'm grateful for the opportunity to connect with so many wonderful Hoosiers.

Read on for last week's highlights!

** Veterans Day: Honoring all who have served
------------------------------------------------------------

On Veterans Day, we paid tribute to our brave veterans who have ensured that the torch of freedom continues to burn bright.

** In The News: T (https://www.wishtv.com/podcast-episode/ep-003-all-indiana-politics-unphiltered-suzanne-crouch/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0b1602f466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_11_09_45&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0b1602f466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) his Veterans Day, everyone is a partner in veteran suicide prevention (https://indianacapitalchronicle.com/2023/11/08/this-veterans-day-everyone-is-a-partner-in-veteran-suicide-prevention/?utm_source=indianavoters.in.gov&utm_medium=indianavoters.in.gov&utm_campaign&utm_content=ap_r2sk07s90w&fbclid=IwAR373EUL_pGul0374_EvV7zla1egr2o97aGC-B-BOi9zzZoekwrYeG7gud0&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0b1602f466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_11_09_45&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0b1602f466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------

Not all wounds are visible. For many of our veterans, mental health challenges persist long after they have left the battlefield.

I️ encourage you to take a moment today to check in on a veteran in your life. We all play an important role in ensuring our veterans have the support and care they need.
https://indianacapitalchronicle.com/2023/11/08/this-veterans-day-everyone-is-a-partner-in-veteran-suicide-prevention/?utm_source=indianavoters.in.gov&utm_medium=indianavoters.in.gov&utm_campaign&utm_content=ap_r2sk07s90w&fbclid=IwAR373EUL_pGul0374_EvV7zla1egr2o97aGC-B-BOi9zzZoekwrYeG7gud0&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0b1602f466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_11_09_45&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0b1602f466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Read The Article (https://indianacapitalchronicle.com/2023/11/08/this-veterans-day-everyone-is-a-partner-in-veteran-suicide-prevention/?utm_source=indianavoters.in.gov&utm_medium=indianavoters.in.gov&utm_campaign&utm_content=ap_r2sk07s90w&fbclid=IwAR373EUL_pGul0374_EvV7zla1egr2o97aGC-B-BOi9zzZoekwrYeG7gud0&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0b1602f466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_11_09_45&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0b1602f466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Celebrating Republican Victories!
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0b1602f466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_11_09_45&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0b1602f466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Election Day was a great day for Indiana!

Congratulations to the GOP candidates who secured victories on Election Day, including my friend Sue Finkam, who was elected as the Mayor of Carmel, and Ronald Morrell Jr., who was elected Indiana's first Black Republican mayor, taking the helm in Marion.

These victories would not have been possible without our GOP Chairmen, who were instrumental in getting Republicans elected across Indiana. Thank you for your efforts!

** Thank you, Team Crouch!
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0b1602f466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_11_09_45&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0b1602f466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

On Election Day, Team Crouch was hard at work, collecting petition signatures to secure our spot on the ballot.

The dedication of our volunteers is unmatched, and their efforts are instrumental in making our campaign a success.

Thank you all for your hard work!

** Warrick County Lincoln Day Dinner
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0b1602f466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_11_09_45&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0b1602f466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

The Warrick County Lincoln Day Dinner was a fantastic event, and I'm thankful for the warm welcome and support from the Warrick County Republican Party. Let's continue our tradition of strong Republican leadership in this wonderful county!

** Central Indiana Police Foundation's Breakfast with a Cop
------------------------------------------------------------
The statistics are sobering—more officers die by suicide than in the line of duty, and stigma remains among their greatest barriers to getting help.

Team Crouch heard from Indy FOP President Rick Snyder as he stood before a crowded room to address the stark reality of mental health challenges our officers face.
His commitment to breaking the stigma surrounding mental health is truly commendable, and I'm grateful for his dedication to our law enforcement community.

** Last Week's Endorsements
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0b1602f466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_11_09_45&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0b1602f466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"I support Suzanne Crouch because she is a great individual with the experience to get things done. In every position she has been in, she has done an excellent job — whether at the county level or the state level. She has done an exceptional job as Lt. Governor and Indiana will be better off if she is our next Governor."

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0b1602f466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_11_09_45&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0b1602f466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"Suzanne puts people before politics. She will take time to listen to people’s needs while having the experience and knowledge to get things done to lead our state. She is out every day of the week, meeting with Hoosiers all over the state. Please join me in supporting this amazing woman."
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0b1602f466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_11_09_45&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0b1602f466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"Suzanne Crouch has served Indiana with positions as county auditor, county commissioner, state representative, state auditor, and now, lieutenant governor. She has proved herself and bettered each position along the way - impressive! I fully support Lieutenant Governor Suzanne Crouch as our next Indiana Governor."

** Last but not least...
------------------------------------------------------------

As we forge ahead, your support continues to be our driving force. I am deeply grateful for the opportunity to represent the Republican Party and the values we hold dear. Together, we are making a difference and shaping a brighter future for Indiana.

Thank you for your continued support and commitment to our shared vision.

Onward and upward,

Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email!

clean_body: As we start another incredible week on the campaign trail, I️ want to take a moment to hit the highlights from this past week! Friends and fellow Hoosiers, I hope this message finds you well and filled with the same sense of pride and gratitude that I have experienced over the past week on the campaign trail. Your unwavering support keeps me inspired and energized, and I'm grateful for the opportunity to connect with so many wonderful Hoosiers. Read on for last week's highlights! Veterans Day: Honoring all who have served On Veterans Day, we paid tribute to our brave veterans who have ensured that the torch of freedom continues to burn bright. In The News: T () his Veterans Day, everyone is a partner in veteran suicide prevention () Not all wounds are visible. For many of our veterans, mental health challenges persist long after they have left the battlefield. I️ encourage you to take a moment today to check in on a veteran in your life. We all play an important role in ensuring our veterans have the support and care they need. Read The Article () Celebrating Republican Victories! Election Day was a great day for Indiana! Congratulations to the GOP candidates who secured victories on Election Day, including my friend Sue Finkam, who was elected as the Mayor of Carmel, and Ronald Morrell Jr., who was elected Indiana's first Black Republican mayor, taking the helm in Marion. These victories would not have been possible without our GOP Chairmen, who were instrumental in getting Republicans elected across Indiana. Thank you for your efforts! Thank you, Team Crouch! On Election Day, Team Crouch was hard at work, collecting petition signatures to secure our spot on the ballot. The dedication of our volunteers is unmatched, and their efforts are instrumental in making our campaign a success. Thank you all for your hard work! Warrick County Lincoln Day Dinner The Warrick County Lincoln Day Dinner was a fantastic event, and I'm thankful for the warm welcome and support from the Warrick County Republican Party. Let's continue our tradition of strong Republican leadership in this wonderful county! Central Indiana Police Foundation's Breakfast with a Cop The statistics are sobering—more officers die by suicide than in the line of duty, and stigma remains among their greatest barriers to getting help. His commitment to breaking the stigma surrounding mental health is truly commendable, and I'm grateful for his dedication to our law enforcement community.
