"Suzanne Crouch has served Indiana with positions as county auditor, county commissioner, state representative, state auditor, and now, lieutenant governor. She has proved herself and bettered each position along the way - impressive! I fully support Lieutenant Governor Suzanne Crouch as our next Indiana Governor." Last but not least... As we forge ahead, your support continues to be our driving force. I am deeply grateful for the opportunity to represent the Republican Party and the values we hold dear. name: Governor Kim Reynolds
subject: Why I am endorsing Gov. Ron DeSantis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7f537e97516ba4f4bb12c14cc2e39d72a113c6f73ee5854f7354bf119cc44e7732743470bacb66c3a230a3c1ae7d3b2aec5418b433087990f490fc8baec71fc362f69590b6970514bc3973ec7a99deb2

Hi Friend,

My mission as Iowa's governor has been simple: Keep Iowa moving forward.

As a governor, it was my honor to welcome the candidates to Iowa for the first-in-the-nation caucus. But as a mother and a grandmother—as an American—I can’t stand on the sidelines. This election is too important. Joe Biden has turned America upside down, and we need a President who will keep AMERICA moving forward.

There is only one candidate in this race that I trust to get the job done: Ron DeSantis.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8f336a9d0d340fb599fbba07b9177cae31d518ae6fd2cdecb260f491dd21f0e7fa9e2866f6edf69ef6990c6a74ecc9bcbcb4f149973fe709519f9ffd1fb40357
I'm ENDORSING Ron DeSantis. Will you join me?

I am proud to support Ron DeSantis to be our next President of the United States of America. He's put in the work in Iowa, well on his way toward making a stop in all 99 counties. And I know as our next President, he will put in the work to fight, win, and lead America's comeback!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8f336a9d0d340fb599fbba07b9177cae31d518ae6fd2cdecb260f491dd21f0e7fa9e2866f6edf69ef6990c6a74ecc9bcbcb4f149973fe709519f9ffd1fb40357

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8f336a9d0d340fb5e4453cd078a98ab037077473f52fc8c3102f348e9783127e704faf077eacdb25ac1c9483cb49c0dcbc3c9e222a96f2c5f074b592f9c3be44
DONATE $24

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8f336a9d0d340fb5c6cfc54f2f2160e2a1f00c2953a80ba7b8898c7161e2fdc1d96e9a793a9a98372f8345c4576087ced7dad8d93d958393b5856730e8cc5a81
DONATE $47

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8f336a9d0d340fb5529bcd471538e081a41cd5c697709340594301007649c7f143540671aeb77ab64413693a91c5b54d620bc6b2b062219b683c672950824d6d
DONATE $100

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8f336a9d0d340fb510fd6afbb027db9d58066b1a42d3e677142603884e4ce83d9352e2e76860bbe4992d77e19354eaba16860cb9041851d3fc86d8e62481257b
DONATE $250

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8f336a9d0d340fb599fbba07b9177cae31d518ae6fd2cdecb260f491dd21f0e7fa9e2866f6edf69ef6990c6a74ecc9bcbcb4f149973fe709519f9ffd1fb40357
Donate today to join me in supporting Ron DeSantis!

I know we all have our reasons for who we're supporting, but I want you to hear from me on why he has earned my endorsement:

He understands putting the people he serves first: I watched Ron DeSantis stand up for the freedom, finances, and future of his people. Throughout COVID-19, he fought to keep his state open despite all the heat that Fauci, Democrats, and the DC establishment threw his way - just like we did, he fought for freedom.

He's a proven champion for fiscal conservatism and running a thriving economy: In Iowa and Florida, we've provided an example to the nation of what it looks like to run an economy with a budget surplus, so we can return taxpayer dollars back to hardworking families. This is how it should be done. That’s not controversial - it’s common sense!

Ron DeSantis is the only candidate FIGHTING for parents' rights: As parents themselves, Ron and Casey have set the example to protect the rights of parents to raise and educate their kids as they see fit. This is not something our next President should compromise on, and I know Ron DeSantis won't comprise. Children belong to parents, NOT the government.

Ron DeSantis has been a consistent fighter for women and girls: Under Ron DeSantis' leadership, Florida helped lead the way in putting a stop to the absurdity of men unfairly competing in women's sports. I am proud to say that in both Iowa and Florida, no girls will ever have their dreams ripped away because they're forced to compete against biological males. And I know as President, Ron DeSantis will protect women's sports!

Friend, I hope you'll join me in supporting Ron DeSantis. Now is the time to get involved.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8f336a9d0d340fb599fbba07b9177cae31d518ae6fd2cdecb260f491dd21f0e7fa9e2866f6edf69ef6990c6a74ecc9bcbcb4f149973fe709519f9ffd1fb40357
Whether it's putting up a yard sign, calling your neighbor, or chipping in $25, your support will go a long way toward helping DeSantis out!

Sincerely,

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8f336a9d0d340fb599fbba07b9177cae31d518ae6fd2cdecb260f491dd21f0e7fa9e2866f6edf69ef6990c6a74ecc9bcbcb4f149973fe709519f9ffd1fb40357

Kim Reynolds

Governor of Iowa

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Whether it's putting up a yard sign, calling your neighbor, or chipping in $25, your support will go a long way toward helping DeSantis out! Sincerely, Kim Reynolds Governor of Iowa Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Deputy Sheriffs Endorse Dave Min In CA-47
body:
Largest Association of Deputy Sheriffs & District Attorney Investigators in the Country Back Dave Min | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b331adfdbe1b/deputy-sheriffs-endorse-dave-min-in-ca-15665216?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** November 13, 2023
**Contact:**[**press@davemin.com**](mailto:press@davemin.com)
**Deputy Sheriffs Endorse Dave Min In CA-47**
_Largest Association of Deputy Sheriffs & District Attorney Investigators in the Country Back Dave Min _
**IRVINE, CA —** Today, the Association Los Angeles Deputy Sheriff (ALADS), the largest association of deputy sheriffs and district attorney investigators in the United States, announced its endorsement of State Senator Dave Min for Congress in California’s 47th Congressional District. Representing over 8,000 sworn law enforcement officers, ALADS's endorsement adds to a growing coalition of law enforcement and public safety officers standing with Min and his strong record of public safety and community well-being. The announcement comes days after Dave Min was [officially placed on the consent calendar](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=6b06c596bd&e=7017cc100e) for the California Democratic Party endorsement.

Min has been a champion for public safety funding, bringing home $1 million to the Irvine Police Department. State Senator Min is a proven effective legislative leader in the Senate, authoring 16 bills signed into law by the Governor, including leading legislation on [hate crimes](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=277ae44009&e=7017cc100e), [gun violence prevention](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=79b542c496&e=7017cc100e), family safety, and [women’s reproductive rights](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=5958496c77&e=7017cc100e), and procuring over $70 million in direct appropriations for priorities in his district, including for fire response, parks and open spaces, climate innovation, and over $1 million specifically allocated for a Huntington Beach [homeless shelter](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=520951312a&e=7017cc100e).

In the wake of the 2021 Huntington Beach Oil Spill, he stood up to the oil industry and led efforts to end [offshore drilling](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=bd264b438f&e=7017cc100e). Min sits on two key environmental committees, chairing the Natural Resources and Water Committee and serving on the Energy and Utilities Committee, as well as the Budget Committee, the Budget Subcommittee for Education, the Judiciary Committee, and the Banking and Financial Institutions Committee. Senator Min previously served as Chair of the Select Committee on Cybersecurity.

Deputy Sheriffs, Police Officers, and public safety officials, are part of a large and diverse coalition supporting Min, who launched his campaign for CA-47 in January with the support of incumbent Congresswoman Katie Porter, and announced his campaign’s early endorsement by the Service Employees International Union (SEIU) and the California Federation of Teachers. Over the course of this year, Senator Min has built a coalition of support that includes over 125 local, state, and federal officials, including California Lt. Governor Eleni Kounalakis, Attorney General Rob Bonta, and three other California statewide elected officials, AAPI Victory Fund, Asian American Action Fund, the Asian American and Pacific Islander Congressional Caucus’s ASPIRE PAC, which represents 21 members of Congress, and many others. A full endorsement list is available [here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=6299e24ea1&e=7017cc100e). ### _California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15% in this area. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country. _
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/about?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=622ad8fdf9) [unsubscribe from this list](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=622ad8fdf9) [update subscription preferences](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/profile?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=622ad8fdf9)

subject: Become a Founding Member

body:

[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-I5DcdHDLGA)

Fellow American –

I have been hard at work with my team to identify KEY Republican Supporters who are committed to expanding the majority, and I was given your name.

I've got to be honest with you - with so many competing priorities, it's critical to have the best team by my side. [**As I build my team, I'm asking if you will commit to becoming a _Founding Member_ of Team Johnson.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._HaNNjRXfB5g)

[**BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
[**As a Founding Member,**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.) I'll be leaning on you quite a bit. You'll be the first to hear from me about critical campaign updates, exclusive video content, new merchandise, and crucial polls and petitions.

It is going to be all-hands-on-deck, and I am confident I can rely on your support. [**Would you join me as a Founding Member of Team Johnson today?**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)

[**RESPOND TO THE SPEAKER HERE**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
Gratefully,

[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people.

Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input.

| **_SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON?**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)

name: The GIFFORDS Team
subject: We’ll be direct
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Hey there, we’ll be direct. We’re reaching out to ask you to make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.
We’ll explain more, but if you already know you’d like to donate, you can use the link below:
[**https://go.giffords.org/go/Nov-2023**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov23.H_pglF&refcode=em231113-1-30&t=1&akid=6862%2E3935704%2E-5YPlr)
Here’s the deal: We had a significant fundraising slowdown in the middle of the year. Now, with less than two months left of 2023, we’re at the point where we have to do everything we can to ensure we reach our yearly fundraising goals.
Next year will be a pivotal year for our movement. Last week’s elections in Virginia made it clear that **gun safety is a winning issue.** We have the opportunity to continue on the success we saw by holding our gun safety Senate majority and taking back the House.
When Democrats controlled both chambers, we saw real results—the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, the strongest federal gun safety legislation in nearly 30 years. We can build on that progress, but only if we’re successful in 2024.
Our ability to replace NRA-backed extremists with gun safety champions next year depends on the resources we’re able to build right now.
[**So please. With our November mid-month fundraising deadline in just two days, can we count on you to chip in your first online contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov23.H_pglF&refcode=em231113-1-30&t=2&akid=6862%2E3935704%2E-5YPlr)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-nov23.ka8v8M&amount=3&t=21&akid=6862%2E3935704%2E-5YPlr)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-nov23.ygxFD3&refcode=em231113-1-30&t=22&akid=6862%2E3935704%2E-5YPlr)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-nov23.yh47H-&refcode=em231113-1-30&t=23&akid=6862%2E3935704%2E-5YPlr)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-nov23.a4zGU7&refcode=em231113-1-30&t=24&akid=6862%2E3935704%2E-5YPlr)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-nov23.d42LVW&refcode=em231113-1-30&t=25&akid=6862%2E3935704%2E-5YPlr)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-nov23.ka8v8M&refcode=em231113-1-30&t=26&akid=6862%2E3935704%2E-5YPlr)**
---
****
Thank you so much for your continued support,
The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=6862%2E3935704%2E-5YPlr) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Ronchetti?=
subject: 👀 They Didn't Want Us to See This: Border Crisis Uncensored!
body:
New episode for dpwillis67@gmail.com - No Doubt About It heads to the US/Mexico Border | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=889a2e7b1a&e=567664f14c)

We're reaching out to share a [**truly pivotal episode**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=4f017ff205&e=567664f14c) of the No Doubt About It Podcast with Mark and Krysty Ronchetti that demands your attention.
| | | | | | | | | [](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2ae1813f4c&e=567664f14c)
---
| In this special episode, Mark, alongside Kenyon Burns, embarks on a firsthand journey to the southern border, offering a perspective that is as raw and eye-opening as it gets. What they encountered was beyond what they could have imagined. The crisis at the border is reaching a critical juncture, with El Paso under siege by migrants whose increasingly aggressive attempts to enter the country are causing widespread concern.
The episode delves into the firsthand account of Delores Chacon, a resident living on the border, whose spine-chilling stories about people invading her home paint a terrifying picture of the situation. The team also speaks to officials in Juarez, Mexico, uncovering perspectives and insights that are a must-listen.
---
| [STREAM EPISODE 52 NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d7f8a9eeae&e=567664f14c)
---
Additionally, the discussion sheds light on the escalating aggression of migrants from Venezuela and the underlying reasons driving this behavior. This episode is a vital listen, revealing the true dangers inherent in the current Biden border policy and how its failures are poised to impact communities, potentially including yours.
| [STREAM EPISODE 52 NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=4b2f8d5f0e&e=567664f14c)
---

If you find this episode as compelling as we believe it to be, please consider supporting us by liking, subscribing, and leaving a review on your preferred podcast platform. You can also subscribe to our[ YouTube channel](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=452332fb4e&e=567664f14c) for more insightful content.
For those looking to extend further support or grab some cool podcast gear, visit [**nodoubtaboutitpodcast.com/shop**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=64f7aebbac&e=567664f14c).
Thank you for being a part of our community and for engaging with the crucial topics we're exploring.
Best regards,Mark and Krysty Ronchetti
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=5a013d6f32&e=567664f14c)
|
---
|
---
| | | _© 2023 Choose Adventure Media. All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Our mailing address is:
8100 Wyoming Blvd NESTE M4, #171Albuquerque, NM 87113

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bfca9dc257&e=567664f14c&c=dd7e4596d5) or [unsubscribe](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bfca9dc257&e=567664f14c&c=dd7e4596d5)
---

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqur7v6s7q6g8hlrf7k25j80pp7k77n9jbekifhg_rp22sh2s8i66p74sjg6eob4chh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2s49cv08panq2njiegmik3uvd3kcgmdutkd4imo_rp22sh2s8i66p74sjg6eob4chh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z20s3jovgguo112ra5bl44ucvsh44oqccqpr9c08_rp22sh2s8i66p74sjg6eob4chh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zldokegi2nrflejc8dsmv0i89cv9njnvb5kl0vj0_rp22sh2s8i66p74sjg6eob4chh2bs)

name: 4Patriots
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z55lvc8skfr7p2ptm4i9ekg96v54e9j2j3l5gp6o_rp22sh2s8i66p74sjg6eob4chh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrvvnro45hrah8sodf1d5o5ah9j5842vacm1fec8_rp22sh2s8i66p74sjg6eob4chh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3b8t27v8p67rbpnu7bhhir514jl05u2emqps1ug_rp22sh2s8i66p74sjg6eob4chh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpigrltbht1tfhh6t23q63bd0d06luugbai4v4go_rp22sh2s8i66p74sjg6eob4chh2bs)
---

American Action News

name: Team Cori
subject: Delivering for the people > attack ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Over this past year alone, Cori’s managed to bring in $27.4 million in community project funding for St. Louis. | |
---
Peter, Check this out. **We just learned outside groups have begun polling to see what messaging they can use in the baseless attack ads they’re going to use against Cori over this next year.** So while her opponents were polling to see how to spend their millions of dollars, you know what Cori has been up to: delivering for the people of St. Louis. **Over this past year alone, Cori’s managed to bring in $27.4 million in community project funding for St. Louis.** This money goes straight to the community and helps groups working on education, housing, supporting working families, and better jobs for people in the district. Here are just a few of the the organizations who’ve gotten $27.4 million in funding thanks to Cori’s work on the hill:
* **Power4STL** \- to provide healing resources to communities previously subjected to unprecedented loss of life due to opioid overdose and violence, with death disproportionately impacting the lives of the Black community.
* **Girl Scouts of Eastern Missouri** \- to address critical issues that students face at each stage of their social and emotional development and help them navigate them calmly and constructively.
* **UAW Labor Employment and Training Corporation** \- to provide basic and advanced automotive technology training to unemployed, underemployed, and incumbent workers (an estimated direct annual economic impact is $4.20 million to the region).
* **Boys and Girls Club of Greater St. Louis** \- to expand after- school, weekend and summer programs for youth ages 5-18.
* **The Dunbar Gardens project** \- to help facilitate the renovation of an apartment complex aimed at providing affordable housing for senior citizens and the underserved.

So while Cori’s opponents put their time and money towards endless polls and attack ads, Cori’s putting her time and energy towards the people of St. Louis, because that’s what they elected her to do. **[Can you donate $20 or whatever you can afford so that we can overcome our opponents’ cynical tactics and re-elect Cori so she can continue to deliver for the people of her district and this country?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zrl7hAwtfC3RQ56zUloyYjd7QZeWkiTpL0mRvI-uiI_2DJ9UoA50IYm--d5y7WqXAiU5OUK7Kacr2M_sQ7XdGd7bBCdbGhXTk8a_Lpl5ibAvCjXuwU-W9R1Pjvmz2eKdwoyrbQLxpB6vOCXrzi_OFwctT3vKk4b4tVdMfdCmg2n2KIwBH7LwG1V8YPqWN7jBSg5kBd-abDmFsJJaXpnbMbcANfO7YGWGLR0CYkDAy4hTx93tSSWrDFpz5BAwut6u1-cZom5hvEQLXGZvyaHyLOjd_ZXNZ9yV6d6ZoCWFnrr5FJZqN1w3dxE2sR-VCYhv0/419/NjVIc1wETMGyy6Iyl9ZUxg/h0/sXbMwVJjgWWTGN_4Wh4SKqk1iRuGcbXiKyae0bTpmRU)** **[DONATE TODAY>>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zrl7hAwtfC3RQ56zUloyYjd7QZeWkiTpL0mRvI-uiI_yCX7Dv4bGo8fVie9ccDGMrhjF2yTHvgY5punLzkQV6cLBk2r4iz8Nue0o9L5NaTU93MDBDKU-Ok15sQn9-9RZB4wQLcjThkExvQV589jrOlHgpjyknFaQGP8Fk3DhTjZFIJ51VrDEIOL9loAStzCi7NOK3AYc7wa8hgfPXk2ymFPT11BlIKCKHa_XTMmdNHQS3FYVCiQO_2Brxb667gsRO1VfzoxxjIKNlHZhzf_yUJxcyIl2KNgW1CWSflSeBqJd_wQiEnxvg-ha-JXal1Fbg/419/NjVIc1wETMGyy6Iyl9ZUxg/h1/KoOxnCaP5FIY0kVZf_AnmsybVAseutYXGQ78BxM9g-I) **
When we stick together we can always emerge victorious. That is the power of the people.
With love and humanity,
Team Cori

**[SUPPORT OUR MOVEMENT](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zrl7hAwtfC3RQ56zUloyYjQkx6K-5Fl1r4yKwbCmLVl6mRzGDvWC0NP9W8k2mW1PKmP3JWtlZL6v-CqKFz2VQfpdD67VQthaNSYzzHZA4XKyQjaEDHGW8JliiJYd7TWwdsUKW_cCrOejlOn_JgaKWvb9Z6R88PmzDdaNWc7xUPLgEiaye_cqq7416biERGz_X0sFh0Z5wzo1W-_ivYEPG6eSbC83Nacf4cRIDfPVMESpmcBceX08jlyC5K3MuHXeBfQPn9BF15lTRHRLsTGsufn9OTYT_kaeKchP5xSGDlMtEvMcfO8qVg1fnwqYXr1iat6HMl4rPz6p2_NgwnM8M4/419/NjVIc1wETMGyy6Iyl9ZUxg/h2/G7hFcJd3flqxtrXwexuLf7pq2je3odItE1uA3xY4EWM) **

name: Candace Owens, BLEXIT at TPUSA
subject: Can I Send You This Anti-Woke T-Shirt?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDQyMDkifQ/jO2x0kSYiBu9UUCoODOcqQ)
---
Fellow Patriot, At my first Live Free Tour event with Turning Point USA this fall, a student attendee asked me to address those on-campus who "actively feel victimized" ... _just by my physical presence_. My answer was simple, and I bet it's one you'd tell your own kids and grandkids:
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDQyMDkifQ/TBmsu-FQRpR47bFVvSiENQ)
---
"Life is tough. Get a helmet, man."
---
| | The room erupted with applause from BLEXIT activists and TPUSA students ... and then, when the video was posted online, it went viral - reaching millions of people in just a few hours. **[Today I want to send YOU a "Life is tough. Get a helmet, man" T-shirt of your own. All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of any amount to help BLEXIT at TPUSA cover costs.](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDQyMDkifQ/gYr-_9CrkSlht8CbJNyywQ)** But please don't wait: to receive a FREE T-shirt of your own with my thanks, you must make a gift before MIDNIGHT on November 30.
---
[Get your free T-shirt now](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDQyMDkifQ/3pAdttO6zH1-DslIMkN0mg)
---
| | At BLEXIT -- the non-profit I founded with Brandon Tatum -- we are committed to DESTROYING the Victimhood Mentality that has taken over America and building up a Victor's Mentality instead. The Left's toxic Victimhood Mentality has created a society of emotional toddlers - people who complain, erupt into tantrums, protest without knowing why or what they're protesting, and lack education, reason, purpose, conviction, or courage. _And the result is a generation of young people who expect everyone to coddle, compliment, or otherwise indulge them in whatever Victimhood Mentality they've wrongly learned._ It takes courage to speak the truth, and that's just what BLEXIT does in order to awaken, empower, and inspire young Americans to adopt a Victor's Mindset and pursue their own American Dreams. **[Can I send you a FREE "Life is tough. Get a helmet, man." T-shirt to thank you for your support of BLEXIT today?](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDQyMDkifQ/uWdOTvgyV0xtYBmwqjC-kQ)** All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of any amount, even just a dollar, to help BLEXIT cover the costs ... but I must hear from you before MIDNIGHT on November 30!
---
[Get your free T-shirt now](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDQyMDkifQ/zOPku2PyemwAwSHysAPm9Q)
---
I truly believe that, thanks to our continued work through BLEXIT, Americans are beginning to wake up - and they're tired of the Victimhood Mentality that has nearly destroyed our communities and our culture. Thank you for your continued support. Together, we are making a difference. Candace OwensChair of BLEXITTurning Point USA
---
[Get your free T-shirt now](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDQyMDkifQ/nXeRAb7g_hppVzdfOo-ZzQ)
---
4940 East Beverly Road

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | Fellow Patriot, At my first Live Free Tour event with Turning Point USA this fall, a student attendee asked me to address those on-campus who "actively feel victimized" ... just by my physical presence. My answer was simple, and I bet it's one you'd tell your own kids and grandkids: "Life is tough. Get a helmet, man." | | The room erupted with applause from BLEXIT activists and TPUSA students ... and then, when the video was posted online, it went viral - reaching millions of people in just a few hours. But please don't wait: to receive a FREE T-shirt of your own with my thanks, you must make a gift before MIDNIGHT on November 30. | | At BLEXIT -- the non-profit I founded with Brandon Tatum -- we are committed to DESTROYING the Victimhood Mentality that has taken over America and building up a Victor's Mentality instead. The Left's toxic Victimhood Mentality has created a society of emotional toddlers - people who complain, erupt into tantrums, protest without knowing why or what they're protesting, and lack education, reason, purpose, conviction, or courage. And the result is a generation of young people who expect everyone to coddle, compliment, or otherwise indulge them in whatever Victimhood Mentality they've wrongly learned. It takes courage to speak the truth, and that's just what BLEXIT does in order to awaken, empower, and inspire young Americans to adopt a Victor's Mindset and pursue their own American Dreams. All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of any amount, even just a dollar, to help BLEXIT cover the costs ... but I must hear from you before MIDNIGHT on November 30! I truly believe that, thanks to our continued work through BLEXIT, Americans are beginning to wake up - and they're tired of the Victimhood Mentality that has nearly destroyed our communities and our culture. Thank you for your continued support. Together, we are making a difference. Candace OwensChair of BLEXITTurning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

The Fair Fight v. True the Vote trial has ended. We now await the court’s decision. Thank you for all of your prayers and support over these past several weeks.
What’s at stake? The essential right of voters to assist in updating voter registration records by filing inquiries with their counties. In many states, like Georgia, such inquiries (sometimes referred to as elector or voter challenges) can often be the best hope for accurate rolls and trustworthy elections.
How did all of this start? Well, let’s begin at the beginning ... forty-four states and Washington, D.C. are required to adhere to federal voter roll maintenance standards loosely defined through the National Voter Registration Act (NVRA). Why only 44 and DC? Idaho, Minnesota, New Hampshire, Wisconsin, and Wyoming use “continuous” registration. This practice, also known as “same day voter registration”, kept them out of the NVRA - and North Dakota doesn’t require voter registration.
[The NVRA ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/Qvk83lMrxpyahZ2UDrJlsamx30Wk53Kkl9xhCdBxG29bPV0Izcju38d1CWv8HXFQlqpzFX9hAwsqJjvoWIIeZRCEPZBMWCxLWHCrTp3aB3VQlIABVInDkVuwjzoxwn4fYLSlmgdjqiArxkSbLEejIeZHe1cg-dCIEukIt3qxO8n_r6wE4c-WaUEaJrJ9GvfUZ8gL21Pg_-y4XG5xHstRRZL6L34NqWyD3KOaRY4j7RHQYwhhQgHJGcB1U1uFcBa9mdr7aN9zWIiowTtQtenpdg/419/BIKDOtwgTOibaTffeEf4VQ/h2/KPzpqbdnzJGiXcl5KlZE3d53zHmIxWiTDPI7-34j1FI)was passed in 1993, when people and data both moved more slowly. NVRA maintenance requires a multi-step process, drafted in a time before the internet and real-time capabilities to resolve eligibility, making it unnecessarily difficult to keep state registries up to date. Case in point, Georgia. The way Georgia has chosen to manage compliance with the NVRA is to limit it’s statewide maintenance efforts to the first six months of every odd year.
Yes, you read that right. Several months ago, Georgia announced its updates to approximately 700,000 voter records. It will be the summer of 2025 before they do any more statewide maintenance. A lot can (and will) happen between now and the summer of 2025.
And how do states update their rolls? Many states, including Georgia, use the services of a non-profit organization called [ERIC](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/mhgFfK1nb5QPVR_Bujxl9NOJEiyabmWH6Mhatk5QoJLP9ssYhMFirfgp3DltYgRy19Db_PXbkCzNl-ORBpqoc8dCMiAIKyLDGYYaRheUvvQh_-GFEC7pV2FpPCmuyJhxQJ3l26p9EHEcMg48GWAnNlsFxlyYYEb2JK-RF7cr_a_W5qU9MZQiyvBv8VZbK4d4AFQpDl9lpLOjSs3HFgu4Lg/419/BIKDOtwgTOibaTffeEf4VQ/h3/UrD5HWGPGbLaLuS3hwY5wMuPlt260cXIIVgBXJn4Cgo) to keep them in compliance with NVRA (both in voter registration and voter roll maintenance). ERIC, and it’s data partner [CEIR](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/mhgFfK1nb5QPVR_Bujxl9Los5wioJFKcvWs2JKR4AaOrkgXuLpVkwXEOQ6vHTGDXv24W9ZDqezUkxo9pZMcl87S1Dk2CAye0VkEGA6toZwM6eJ8y4Bm-GYGigm1r43hk_3HVgo97RpWgSop3A4P1OyZGFwJccuvMJvTDAW38nt_3Wo9W2jZyGNleSzPtuPjvuMYppj0s98O8xStDic1KEA/419/BIKDOtwgTOibaTffeEf4VQ/h4/DPvI5afUzvEKnLvZVWwHfmYFxPK36mwz-gBV8Bp8HDU), have not proven trustworthy, as evidenced by the exodus of states in recent years. But ... that’s fodder for another newsletter.
Beyond the NVRA, states also have to contend with never ending lawsuits filed by special interest groups who seek to further prevent voter rolls from being maintained. Why? Good question. Who stands to benefit if voter records are inaccurate? Those willing to exploit the inaccuracies. Add in mass mail ballots and dropboxes, remove signature verification and ID ... it’s not a good scenario.
However, there is another path to supporting accurate voter rolls through voter engagement. Most states offer provisions for a voter to submit eligibility inquiries to the county in which they are registered. It’s up to the county to decide what to do with the inquiry, but it’s still a better option than not inquiring at all. With the ready availability of data from useful resources like the US Postal Service’s National Change of Address (NCOA) registry, voter inquiries can be a huge assistance in counties of states that conduct slow or no maintenance.
And that’s how the Fair Fight v. True the Vote lawsuit started. In 2020, we helped Georgia citizens file inquiries. Using data from accredited sources, including the NCOA, we identified over 364,000 records that appeared to be ineligible. The number, though large, was an accurate reflection of a statewide data set that hadn’t been maintained in nearly two years.
Within days of announcing the project, Fair Fight sued us. [You can read more about the suit here.](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/Qvk83lMrxpyahZ2UDrJlsUUkzv6S5IbZaiCcmLVvdD9aspWv3_CzE1fXyaE6ysvHZQ9ujLX6pAqbaN_Gy3Bf-m9pyLdZHogCk1V8FXt_vnAWss6rZicR8gMiqaf6JptMDxJXQl8o_g7KNSm6l-WdPzwLmgNxVNj3KJ14EhK0Yd9b466KPUdJnd6Kb9JuVRKKoQ_HXaThkgOsCcIOGzkmNuZf_nZUbsH5brYTHJQ8ENA/419/BIKDOtwgTOibaTffeEf4VQ/h5/2i4Z-aLhY6EvHPCoBJ3lPnTaNKeHt55m5TwZvCBGYHc) It’s gone on for almost three years, leading finally to trial. And now we will wait to see what happens next.
**Friends, if states won’t keep their voter rolls updated, citizens must have an outlet through which to lawfully petition their government and speak out in support of election integrity. It’s that simple. It’s incredibly important. And it’s not only about Georgia. This is a national issue. Voter rolls must be kept accurate.**
Little attention was paid to this historic case. We stood alone. It makes us wonder if other organizations really don’t see the problem, or if they choose to stay quiet in order to avoid being on the receiving end of lawsuits, as we so often are.
Lawsuits are no fun. Nor is the slander and scorn ... no fun at all. But, we will not stand idly by and watch as America’s elections continue to erode. We will engage. Our goal? Trustworthy elections. For everyone.
[When you support True the Vote, you are supporting the tip of the spear.](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/Qvk83lMrxpyahZ2UDrJlsUUkzv6S5IbZaiCcmLVvdD-f_tp0LnYwiJmkTTSeOimHwaKtz5Yh5TGCq2ThK0L3orDUD40nCOA44XzOtwv7s74838uuSvHhVoxtEq0TGPvIoVNr4njP6myN4CoiPQ9BWY_0aR0mL0K68B6tycjb7gpFRgYk9TiC19vKCwL7mlZzdifplSrbfsfcfmhiMrWDjg/419/BIKDOtwgTOibaTffeEf4VQ/h6/aDqY53S3bGwVdi5nf1B3_X2NEvvBgu5fn0jCl9U-SDw) We fight the fights others will not. And we will not quit. Working together we can achieve massive improvements in election process. We can encourage more people to participate. And we can restore confidence. It’s not easy, but it’s worth it.
[This Monday night, 11.13, at 7p et](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/1A5_Z39fk90fowLbTa71p8CcvqgWD5nu5ue1tPC3yY6gHMxE5bi3KVIPgrjzLVRdOMOxVmaEOWBEXc_IXgOLdmwwy0Bm6Aczw3pbHvYGxytjwRi4zI1PS1M3_lVX4T3cLE8PMyvaobWmzcwJztQNzmWrf9TotjNa518OddsmX49Af8EjIUf8Ac25IA1uOFAKiFmGALg6aVQ1lJ0GLv2UtM_NB683Xm-sPd3lz6hCyQlOYzWXDkxWcQrvj43dVLLOBJsF7m2M8Zc_iSEnoimgtw/419/BIKDOtwgTOibaTffeEf4VQ/h7/vp6VWRXWq72DGQZoe2fEhL7CpbGiGQMQmre8Oq_-mXI)[,](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/1A5_Z39fk90fowLbTa71p8CcvqgWD5nu5ue1tPC3yY6gHMxE5bi3KVIPgrjzLVRdOMOxVmaEOWBEXc_IXgOLdmwwy0Bm6Aczw3pbHvYGxytjwRi4zI1PS1M3_lVX4T3cLE8PMyvaobWmzcwJztQNzmWrf9TotjNa518OddsmX49Af8EjIUf8Ac25IA1uOFAKiFmGALg6aVQ1lJ0GLv2UtM_NB683Xm-sPd3lz6hCyQlOYzWXDkxWcQrvj43dVLLOBJsF7m2M8Zc_iSEnoimgtw/419/BIKDOtwgTOibaTffeEf4VQ/h8/HAbCc048P-sb244DY91oigzKhF69SsG4_gaNjMCYtEw) I’ll share my thoughts on the lawsuit ... and other trials and tribulations still ahead. But there is hope on the horizon. America is waking up, and not a minute too soon, because 2024 will be here before we know it. On the podcast, I’ll outline a few simple steps every one can take to engage and uphold trustworthy elections. Click the image below, and it’ll take you straight to the event. See ya there!
| [](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/1A5_Z39fk90fowLbTa71p8CcvqgWD5nu5ue1tPC3yY6gHMxE5bi3KVIPgrjzLVRdOMOxVmaEOWBEXc_IXgOLdmwwy0Bm6Aczw3pbHvYGxytjwRi4zI1PS1M3_lVX4T3cLE8PMyvaobWmzcwJztQNzmWrf9TotjNa518OddsmX49Af8EjIUf8Ac25IA1uOFAKiFmGALg6aVQ1lJ0GLv2UtM_NB683Xm-sPd3lz6hCyQlOYzWXDkxWcQrvj43dVLLOBJsF7m2M8Zc_iSEnoimgtw/419/BIKDOtwgTOibaTffeEf4VQ/h9/Mapx5Rv3-h78oyHN-Vt47YCEzrwGU6uEJb__Nh7JVWo)

Keep the faith. Never quit.

body:
I’ll do you the courtesy of cutting to the chase

Hey folks -- John Kennedy here.

I respect you too much to beat around the bush. You’re busy. I’m busy. So I’ll do you the courtesy of cutting to the chase:

My Republican colleagues over there in the People’s House have a very, VERY big deadline coming down the pike, and they sent me a note saying they’re falling DANGEROUSLY behind their big November goal.

They also made it abundantly clear to me that they’d have a real mess on their hands if they came up short.

So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to send in a small contribution before time is officially out. We’ve only got a few days left for a last-minute surge before the big deadline, so anything you can spare would be a HUGE help. https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673221%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3IBnojUmPT06iE8rppOjpg&sysid=1

Do you think you could do that? For me?

Look, this deadline was important before but now I’m hearing Biden and the Democrat National Committee are unloading 25 million bucks in the most competitive states in the country -- yep, enough states for a DEMOCRAT SWEEP in the next election.

And I’m afraid this much cash could be enough to push Liberals over the top...

With an ARMY of Liberal donors whipping out their credit cards every time they flip on CNN and Conservatives missing their goal it could be all over for us. That's why I’m pleading for your help right here and now:

clean_body: I’ll do you the courtesy of cutting to the chase Hey folks -- John Kennedy here. I respect you too much to beat around the bush. You’re busy. I’m busy. So I’ll do you the courtesy of cutting to the chase: My Republican colleagues over there in the People’s House have a very, VERY big deadline coming down the pike, and they sent me a note saying they’re falling DANGEROUSLY behind their big November goal. They also made it abundantly clear to me that they’d have a real mess on their hands if they came up short. So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to send in a small contribution before time is officially out. We’ve only got a few days left for a last-minute surge before the big deadline, so anything you can spare would be a HUGE help. Do you think you could do that? For me? Look, this deadline was important before but now I’m hearing Biden and the Democrat National Committee are unloading 25 million bucks in the most competitive states in the country -- yep, enough states for a DEMOCRAT SWEEP in the next election. And I’m afraid this much cash could be enough to push Liberals over the top... With an ARMY of Liberal donors whipping out their credit cards every time they flip on CNN and Conservatives missing their goal it could be all over for us. subject: You qualified, Friend! Can you believe it?

body:
I come with good news, Friend!

|
---
| | |
I come with good news, Friend!

My boss just handed me a list of patriots who qualified for our **[Golden Gavel Award](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbrkhb97etrdp470joorf3p48gqnsg3g2tm7l9fo_rp22sh2s8i66p74sjg69oj2c1h2bs "Golden Gavel Award")** , and guess whose name was sitting right there at the TOP of our list?

That's right, it was you, Friend!

---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR PRIZE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zln2400j7tb8uq5pjcdg71c60ndklr125d0hp8rg_rp22sh2s8i66p74sjg69oj2c1h2bs "Generic Button")

---

I personally reviewed your donor file, and let me tell you, no one is more deserving of the Golden Gavel than you are!

In case you didn't know, the Golden Gavel is the MOST prestigious award we offer our donors. **[Go ahead and claim your Golden Gavel right away!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8jj8f56qg7tt36rfoiukvms6779de06kkj1ef60_rp22sh2s8i66p74sjg69oj2c1h2bs "Go ahead and claim your Golden Gavel right away!")**

---

---

This is our way of recognizing and saying thank you to our top donors for all their hard work. _**Growing the majority and beating the Radical Left is a lot of work, and we just want to let you know that we have taken notice of all you 've done.**_

**[Will you accept the ultra-rare Golden Gavel Award before it expires in 24 hours?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3bgft088en93rctbk53imi1bljub38931ud7ld8_rp22sh2s8i66p74sjg69oj2c1h2bs "Will you accept the ultra-rare Golden Gavel Award before it expires in 24 hours?")**

---
| | | [ACCEPT GOLDEN GAVEL](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zha1clli3s5d5rr7jh0srp8ooq52r8oh1cib93vo_rp22sh2s8i66p74sjg69oj2c1h2bs "Generic Button")

Thanks again for keeping our country free.

-Tim, House Republicans HQ

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=75c6cea954624a29b87ab3348d75eb9f&_e=KtsXoKFxxUXs8g_UIZBnjqiebGHpQ_rGVQ021OhWYWI3y8_EwMAhKsARxw6DgFrNzdxs9M7xRkcff94rAyBUcQCpFY-TrGDN7ATsulyq3P2tDYU5-I3SAuxHL3LVinHQFyqx8FCtiFkrJnWXrJHh8J26tol1LNSw2vHXYBz7q7DNA72QjaYyFU8kAw0XAM1_lO_aQU6zHYIFogcsxTjP_I3QQJd_4_06GiHwgs3fGQ7yOmJgVYK6IkU-cfFhoZWaQKhnU9yot_CF7UdtANWVhCgzB8g41Fest_ltXO4z6umG3lMtdALASHZz5Km0FVovDHqN1ab9cZzxW1mlBqRa5Y9e9q844OefUqyBmd-eIjSZt5JcR8sGGjZn7RR2PxE-gcirShsyx3q39M6tN-y-u4E7soUNZAaVoG5NH0lwgaEfISaUzmDADecHBTA8NWkWwIchJQwWMH8gvA0dTJ_t6qgxEglersaM6pbh_sLw9rH7pWsr5OZrGRtUoyaApcRhvkmInACe_MH2byF8WBTWuLGmvAnqh8UBDyzt7qrPXzaotuOUZLNBlDTWWHKWG2kl "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

name: Team Trump, me (2)
subject: re: The REAL loyalty pledge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
This is President Trump’s promise to YOU...
| | Friend,
---

Because every minute our special interest “Republican” opponents waste attacking yours truly instead of the Crook currently occupying the White House, is another minute they are beingDISLOYAL to YOU – the more than 74 MILLION voters who make up our incredible movement! The longer they refuse to accept the reality that we are the UNDISPUTED FRONTRUNNER (leading by 50 and even 60 points!) and the ONLY candidate crushing Crooked Joe by double digits, the more they HELP salvage Biden’s failing campaign. But they don’t care about loyalty to you, Friend, or saving our country from Marxist tyranny for that matter... The only thing they care about is furthering their own political ambitions. Which is exactly why on the very same day that I was forced to testify in the SHAM TRIAL in New York, one of our RINO opponents chose to use that dark and disgraceful moment to attack me online. This is the same person who said that it would be a “fatal” mistake for the Republican Party to let me be the presidential nominee if Biden were to unjustly convict me. The only fatal mistake is these disloyal RINOs playing right into Crooked Joe’s hands! And that’s why I’m making a REAL loyalty pledge – a pledge to the PEOPLE: | Friend, I pledge to OFFICIALLY WRAP UP this primary as fast as humanly possible, so that we can shift all our time, energy, and resources to the one and only REAL mission of FIRING Crooked Joe Biden and MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! And in turn, with just two months to go until the FIRST contest of the primary, I ask that you consider contributing even just $1 to our Primary Victory Fund to help lock up the nomination ASAP. But of course, if you’re struggling right now because of Crooked Joe and his RINO enablers, then please don’t even think about donating. Very soon, we will win back the White House and America will come ROARING BACK! Don’t you worry. | | Thank you, | Donald J. We just got some breaking news from the Los Angeles Times with less than 100 days until early voting begins, friend:
“U.S. Senate race remains wide-open affair as candidate field expands”
— Berkeley IGS/LA Times, Friday, 11/3
With Adam’s race “nearly a dead heat” and around one-third of likely voters still undecided , we have to build our resources right now to help Adam win on March 5.
According to the San Francisco Chronicle, “it costs roughly $4 million a week to air TV ads statewide. The Los Angeles market alone could run a candidate $2 million.”
This could be the most expensive U.S. Senate race in the country — and because Adam isn’t taking a dime of corporate PAC money, he needs your help to hit tonight’s emergency $100,000 midnight goal so we can reach the undecided voters we need to win. Will you rush a split contribution between Seth Moulton and my campaign of $25 or any amount you can afford today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]

Adam has always counted on this grassroots team’s support, and he needs it now more than ever. Thanks for stepping up with whatever support you can give — it means the world to him.
Team Schiff

Peter, it's Democratic Whip Katherine Clark. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to [**support Emerge with a donation**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73283212/438000729/-1986725773?&10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1339-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFmMDU0MmM5LTNmODItZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_RmNxpiT1N1IeNxJzQC3vGuvbijZ-dfdDn4pV_0xqN4=) – but first, will you give me a moment to explain why their work is so important?
I've seen Emerge's impact firsthand: Emerge alums in the House have helped Democrats make headway on so many issues that impact women's lives: health care, workplace protections for pregnant workers, child care, reproductive freedom, and more.

**I'm so proud of the progress we've already made together – but we've still got work to do. At a time when women's rights are under attack by the GOP, we need to elect even more women to Congress and to down-ballot offices as well.**
**[So I'm asking you to help Emerge change the face of power at this critical moment for women's freedom: Can I count on you to give $10 or more now to help Emerge recruit, train, and empower Democratic women candidates?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73283213/438000730/-1986725773?&10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1339-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFmMDU0MmM5LTNmODItZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_RmNxpiT1N1IeNxJzQC3vGuvbijZ-dfdDn4pV_0xqN4=)**

The first time I got involved in politics, I ran for school board because I wanted to help kids and families succeed. I won that race – one of the hardest and most rewarding positions I’ve ever had! Then I ran for State House because I wanted to fix our broken child care system – then State Senate. I made the decision to run for Congress with a laser focus on supporting women, working families, and enhancing child care in every sector. Now, I am the second woman to ever serve as Democratic Whip.

I've dedicated my career to fighting for women's rights, and I know how important it is to invest in the next generation of women leaders – especially at a time when the GOP is attacking our freedom. I am proud to be a voice advocating for change, but have often been the only woman at the table. This has never been a one-woman job, Peter, and I am committed to encouraging and supporting more women in leadership positions. **_Will you join me?_**
**By investing $10 in Emerge’s work right now, you can help us get strong women candidates on the ballot and ensure bright new voices are heard at every level, from the school board to Congress.

[So please, will you donate $10 or more now – as much as you can – to help Emerge empower more Democratic women to run for office and win?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73283218/438000737/-1986725773?&10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1339-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFmMDU0MmM5LTNmODItZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_RmNxpiT1N1IeNxJzQC3vGuvbijZ-dfdDn4pV_0xqN4=)**
Thank you so much for your support,

Katherine Clark Congresswoman & House Democratic Whip
U.S. House of Representatives, Massachusetts' 5th District
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | Peter, there's 48 HOURS left to take our official priorities survey for 2024 to let us know what's most important to you. | OFFICIAL SURVEY FOR PETER Status: INCOMPLETE What’s most important to you in 2024? | | Peter — we’re putting our heads down and gearing up for 2024. Thanks to help from top supporters like you, we helped power so many candidates to victory up and down the ballot, and we’re ready to do it again come Election Day. But first, we want to hear what’s most important to YOU in 2024. | Thank you, The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Gabe Evans
subject: Why I’m running...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ElectGabeEvans
body:
| | | Friend,

I know you get a lot of emails from Republicans like me, but I wanted to take a minute to share my story and tell you why I'm running for Congress.

My name is Gabe Evans. I flew Black Hawk helicopters in the U.S. Army for 11 years. When I got back from the Middle East, I served my community as a police officer, fought wildfires in the Army National Guard, and currently serve my constituents in the Colorado State House. Here's what I stand for: law and order, freedom, and service to the American people.

When I see what the Biden Administration is doing to our country, especially at our Southern border, it makes me furious.

My grandfather immigrated to this country from Mexico for a better life. He gave back to his new country, served in WWII, received two Purple Hearts for his service, and earned his citizenship in the process.

It was hard work, but he was able to provide a better life for my family.

_Now, when I see the chaos at the Southern border, I can 't help but think about my grandfather._

There are so many people who are trying to get into our country the right way, but the Biden Administration is letting cartels and human traffickers cut in line.

_That just doesn 't sit right with me - and I'm running for Congress to do something about it.

_**[Trust me, I don't like asking for money. But this campaign is fueled by grassroots patriots like you, and we won't win without your support. Will you pitch in now and help us WIN with our law and order campaign?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e514bbb1c77b45a397e517b8a2cdd726&_e=jhqlBsGQ6oCTSiZTwH1XUBj9OQYBi9CuhU1YmGUz6vaDKSlrlmFp0NNF2e2liObLHCB8RrgWSLY7LTt5ItjMzP7HzuW6rPay6J4HGEOCsZ3XQF2aSs_x48CQs1j-gC6hoTRB7QpzY1TVrlTQyLyg4Ac4bjGWowrc-6H_YBnHm55dPdSADa7BUbKqafTeETLImyOaAixAB9plD1VBYqB6kOxzKt_v1lU-2I6v83onYrXI1cvAd1nrEKVyWelFkYicfO8SYavxlhhmqWw_NHFvNk542ge4OP61C1x_5bUyQBoV4p3ruE6TtJUpxg0f66_kgKNyLKZ6eqq6EPZvvi2O5PJj5eH0_3YvCgqQ97VcY6baji4KI6rEjSwMkjBDroRF)**

clean_body: | | | Friend, I know you get a lot of emails from Republicans like me, but I wanted to take a minute to share my story and tell you why I'm running for Congress. My name is Gabe Evans. I flew Black Hawk helicopters in the U.S. Army for 11 years. When I got back from the Middle East, I served my community as a police officer, fought wildfires in the Army National Guard, and currently serve my constituents in the Colorado State House. Here's what I stand for: law and order, freedom, and service to the American people. When I see what the Biden Administration is doing to our country, especially at our Southern border, it makes me furious. My grandfather immigrated to this country from Mexico for a better life. He gave back to his new country, served in WWII, received two Purple Hearts for his service, and earned his citizenship in the process. It was hard work, but he was able to provide a better life for my family. Now, when I see the chaos at the Southern border, I can 't help but think about my grandfather. There are so many people who are trying to get into our country the right way, but the Biden Administration is letting cartels and human traffickers cut in line. That just doesn 't sit right with me - and I'm running for Congress to do something about it. I chose to join the Army and serve our country because America is worth fighting for. This country gave my family everything, and it was my duty to pay her back. Now, I'm ready to serve America in a new way. We need fighters in Congress who understand the price of freedom. Too many politicians haven't spent a day serving anyone but themselves. That 's not me, and it never will be. Thank you, Gabe Evans | | Paid for by ElectGabeEvans.com | | PO Box 350608 Westminster, CO 80035. Use of Gabe Evans' military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

A country full of so much woke indoctrination that children are being told genders aren't real and their dad may be their mom? Being taught to question whether they want to stay in the bodies they were born in?** It's absurd and outrageous.** I'm not okay with it, Peter. I am stepping up and running for president to fight against it with everything I've got to fight, win, and lead our American comeback. If there's one point I'll **never **compromise on, it's the annihilation of sanity in my children's future.** I need your help to fight back.**

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5d4350719b4f4243ad56fa2bbab100da&_e=GB9VAJOXEApu7fuq33-d5M98LsGjvY7qbMbRZV5YxSqM66ER8LlNpfNhvNYowmNN2pi49wcRWDZOR5IFCm8dO7e7ur2ow75ZU9BqLjLRHxs9hi6_Mh5wSy725_U3HEWqolAWkU5xWtF3kEqP85WLqQzh1eqk0Kxmw01EmVVccRG4fHMSkKQaCtamclcNYtq3Ngw-kgbHOxickAnVPH54lK3ZjXbkjEoUIlbn4Zp9AlMuzj2np5in6ZtfGxjeQz4xcLwxbeh6L6EYj8vooMwR2DN_S7TkbXpnlEecEioJhD2jGj1WfyDE4gxfvtATpjFIfpvdECLYozhYmEUUZiz-S20me2xatqDawRM5rs5kcVFJCqs-YaVsKkSPsDsxgNQ-V-DjOcoHN82lpvtqK1JqL8OQWIudLfjmPhz_RzYlUdjwD0ICSL2ukYpqYGE3ShZX)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: Polls show our movement catching fire | | | | | Friend, If you saw the third presidential debate, you know that one thing is absolutely clear: Nikki Haley DOMINATED the debate stage and WON. "Will you rush a donation to keep the momentum SURGING? " | | | Polls show our movement catching fire, supporters are rushing to our campaign in droves, and Nikki's proving she's the only candidate who can DEFEAT Biden and Harris. Now, with less than 70 days until the first votes take place, we cannot take our foot off the gas for one second. "Nikki’s doing her part to save our country, and now, we need you to help her WIN. Rush in a donation of $20.24 or more now to show Nikki your support and keep the momentum going STRONG!" Every moment and every dollar counts. Everything we do gets us one step closer to victory. LET 'S WIN THIS! Team Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. name: Taylor Hawkins
subject: Coming to you with an update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Now that WV is an open race, our campaign got harder.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1124%2E552475%2EESbe25)
Peter, it’s Taylor, Bob Casey’s Finance Director.
This week, a ton is changing in the Senate campaign landscape (and in our budgets), so I had to come to you with an update. **[The TL;DR is that we need your grassroots support to stand up to a new wave of GOP spending, so if you can chip in, it’d be a huge help.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231113-1?refcode=em20231113-1&refcode2=1124_552475_ESbe25&akid=1124%2E552475%2EESbe25)**
Senator Joe Manchin just announced that he’s not running for re-election in West Virginia. That means all the money Mitch McConnell and billionaire GOP donors would have spent to flip West Virginia red will pour into the other Senate battleground races — including ours.
We know Republicans will spend big on ads to defeat Bob Casey, and now, Mitch McConnell only has to flip ONE Senate seat to take control of the chamber. **The pressure is on for us to do everything we can to re-elect Bob.**
Our team is increasing our budget to fight back — and that’s where you come in, Peter. As Finance Director, it’s my job to make sure we have the resources necessary to re-elect Bob — we’ll need grassroots supporters like you to step up in order to combat GOP attacks and an influx of dark money from Mitch McConnell.
**[We can’t let attacks on Bob go unanswered. Can you rush a contribution of any amount so we can afford to power our campaign, fight back, and win?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231113-1?refcode=em20231113-1&refcode2=1124_552475_ESbe25&akid=1124%2E552475%2EESbe25)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231113-1?refcode=em20231113-1&refcode2=1124_552475_ESbe25&akid=1124%2E552475%2EESbe25)**
Thanks for all you do.
Taylor
Finance Director, Bob Casey for Senate

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=1124%2E552475%2EESbe25)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1124%2E552475%2EESbe25)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.
