subject: ACTION ALERT: Tell Gov. Shapiro to Defend Our Climate!
body:
Email Governor Shapiro today.

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73286430/438011156/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDQwNTMzNy00NjgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KSTJLgTZKcqC1p5i3LGC6wTNdMwt4ixOFTI8X4h-6m8=&emci=ba873120-857d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&emdi=70405337-4682-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=6787172) Friend, We have horrible news on the climate front coming from the Pennsylvania Commonwealth Court. Last week, the Court struck down Pennsylvania’s participation in the Regional Greenhouse Gas Initiative (RGGI), a multi-state program that limits carbon dioxide (CO2) pollution from power plants. Now, Governor Shapiro has less than 30 days to appeal this flawed decision to the Pennsylvania Supreme Court for reconsideration. [ACT NOW: Tell Governor Shapiro to appeal the Commonwealth Court’s decision to defend our climate future!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73286431/438011157/-514416360?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDQwNTMzNy00NjgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KSTJLgTZKcqC1p5i3LGC6wTNdMwt4ixOFTI8X4h-6m8=&emci=ba873120-857d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&emdi=70405337-4682-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=6787172) The RGGI rule became law in 2022 and was immediately challenged in court by the fossil fuel industry. Climate justice allies, like the Sierra Club PA and Conservation Voters of PA, are confident that the Supreme Court will reinstate the RGGI rule, but we need Governor Shapiro to appeal it first. Young Pennsylvanians are being forced to navigate the highs and lows of our futures through the mental and physical impacts of the climate crisis. It isn’t right and it isn’t fair, but we can do something about it. [Your voice can be the difference. Be a part of our movement for a brighter future — write to Governor Shapiro today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73286432/438011159/-514416360?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDQwNTMzNy00NjgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KSTJLgTZKcqC1p5i3LGC6wTNdMwt4ixOFTI8X4h-6m8=&emci=ba873120-857d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&emdi=70405337-4682-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=6787172) In solidarity, [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73286433/438011161/-514416360?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDQwNTMzNy00NjgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KSTJLgTZKcqC1p5i3LGC6wTNdMwt4ixOFTI8X4h-6m8=&emci=ba873120-857d-ee11-b004-00224832e1ba&emdi=70405337-4682-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=6787172) Camden Weber

name: ICYMI News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhmb27r4nmml1u2vn78jvufevgttrmits612hta0_rp22sh2s8i66p74sji64o76clh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zepip9fsnnt8mjsslkmb6jgr6l2se0hir78dvqfo_rp22sh2s8i66p74sji64o76clh2bs)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqocls8pssv4tb7otruih4b8bh8ql60rdroqdplo_rp22sh2s8i66p74sji64o76clh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zosc08fduh3ek1oc5p5f6aoqqv2cpd9et7f3t4fo_rp22sh2s8i66p74sji64o76clh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

ICYMI News
---

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Urgently asking for your $3 contribution to defend this seat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
We can't afford to take anything for granted in this primary, and the only way we can continue our movement's fight for justice is if we're all in it together.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=716%2E791427%2Etk_gDq)

Friends -
Yesterday morning, my primary challenger from last year announced his 2024 campaign. He wants a rematch against me, and we're going to give it to him.
I'll explain more in just a moment, but if that's all you need to hear to add your support, **[I'm personally asking you to make a $3 contribution to our campaign today.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-nov23.oBEWmx&refcode=em231113-1-t3&t=2&akid=716%2E791427%2Etk_gDq)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-nov23.jDU1zL&amount=3&refcode=em231113-1-t3&t=3&akid=716%2E791427%2Etk_gDq)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-nov23.jDU1zL&refcode=em231113-1-t3&t=4&akid=716%2E791427%2Etk_gDq)**
---
Now here's the truth:
We already knew that this race — no matter who my opponent was — would attract an obscene amount of outside spending from right-wing dark money groups and Republican billionaires nationwide.
But after pouring over half a million dollars into supporting my opponent last time around, you can be sure that the likes of AIPAC's United Democracy Project and Clarence Thomas-bankroller Harlan Crow are going to pull out all the stops in 2024.
That means even more bigoted attack ads blanketing the airwaves in my district.
It means more lies and disinformation spread on social media.
And yes — it means more resources required to fight back.
**We can't afford to take anything for granted in this primary, and the only way we can continue our movement's fight for justice is if we're all in it together. That's why I'm asking:**
**[Can you please make your first contribution — of $3 or anything you can — to stand with our re-election campaign to Congress today? Lots and lots of grassroots donations is how we fund this movement, so please add yours if you can.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-nov23.oBEWmx&refcode=em231113-1-t3&t=5&akid=716%2E791427%2Etk_gDq)
When we faced a surge of last-minute super PAC spending in 2022, this grassroots team stepped up with a surge of its own — $5, $10, and $25 at a time.
We fought back, and we won. Now it's going to take all of us standing together to do it again.
Thank you so much for anything you can chip in today.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-nov23.oBEWmx&refcode=em231113-1-t3&t=6&akid=716%2E791427%2Etk_gDq)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=7&akid=716%2E791427%2Etk_gDq)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=8&akid=716%2E791427%2Etk_gDq)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=9&akid=716%2E791427%2Etk_gDq)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=10&refcode2=716_791427_tk_gDq&akid=716%2E791427%2Etk_gDq)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: Your America
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35494%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rhgtKYIBVvA5ZRYjyp0cGw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35405%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bTab1E2y26bS0bsrgq%2fk5g&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35406%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rfrIGoqXUGvnMqbT%2flhEyw&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35407%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zUPKzOMhZ1RWuQOtfBO6pw&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Your America News
---

name: Speaker Johnson
subject: Become a Founding Member

Last month, after 22 days of chaos, Republicans finally elected a Speaker of the House.

**Here’s what you need to know about Mike Johnson, the new Speaker of the House:**
* The New York Times calls him “the most important architect” of the plan to overturn the 2020 election.
* He tried to ban same-sex marriage.
* He cosponsored a national abortion ban with no exceptions, and has supported legislation that would punish abortion providers – including sentencing them to up to 10 years in prison.
* He’s voted against protecting access to contraceptives.
* He’s proposed cutting Medicare and raising the age of eligibility for Social Security, hurting our seniors.
* **And he’s aligned himself with the Chaos Caucus Republicans.**

**House Republicans choosing Mike Johnson as the Speaker makes it more critical than ever that Democrats take back the House in 2024.**

clean_body: Here’s who Republicans made Speaker of the House | = Last month, after 22 days of chaos, Republicans finally elected a Speaker of the House. Here’s what you need to know about Mike Johnson, the new Speaker of the House: The New York Times calls him “the most important architect” of the plan to overturn the 2020 election. He tried to ban same-sex marriage. He cosponsored a national abortion ban with no exceptions, and has supported legislation that would punish abortion providers – including sentencing them to up to 10 years in prison. He’s voted against protecting access to contraceptives. He’s proposed cutting Medicare and raising the age of eligibility for Social Security, hurting our seniors. And he’s aligned himself with the Chaos Caucus Republicans. House Republicans choosing Mike Johnson as the Speaker makes it more critical than ever that Democrats take back the House in 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Thank you, Keep Ohio Blue 2024 | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Help me keep extremists at bay
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| From California’s early earthquake warning system, to the Pasadena Gold Line, to affordable housing, I’ve fought to make life better for Californians where they can feel it.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4450%2E5257348%2EI1RXgV)
Derek — As we approach our mid-quarter fundraising deadline, my team and I have been reflecting on the support we’ve received so far and how it’s been nothing short of incredible. So we want to give _you_ a few reasons to chip in $5 to my campaign for the U.S. Senate.
****[But if you’re short on time and don’t need convincing, you can pitch in $5 or any amount right here ahead of tonight’s deadline.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=nov2023_abs_em.SJ7CRf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC90_20231113_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4450%2E5257348%2EI1RXgV)
[DONATE $5](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=nov2023_abs_em.SJ7CRf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC90_20231113_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4450%2E5257348%2EI1RXgV)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=nov2023_abs_em.a2LqFl&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC90_20231113_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4450%2E5257348%2EI1RXgV)
---
I’ve delivered results for the hardworking families in my district for more than two decades — and I will do the same for every Californian. Whether it’s advocating for gun safety laws, or standing on the picket line to defend workers’ rights, I am _laser-focused_ on improving the lives of working people day after day.
My track record is proven: I’ve held Donald Trump and his cronies accountable. From serving as an impeachment manager to sitting on the House Select Committee on the January 6 Attack, I have the experience needed to keep MAGA extremism at bay in the corridors of power.
But it’s not just standing up to Trump. From California’s early earthquake warning system, to the Pasadena Gold Line, to affordable housing, I’ve fought to make life better for Californians where they can feel it.
And your support helps us cut through the noise and uplift our team's achievements.
By chipping in $5 today, you’re showing you believe in the movement we’re building and standing strong with our mission to build a **California for All.**
**[With these reasons in mind, can we count on you to pitch in $5 or more to my campaign before our mid-month fundraising deadline?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=nov2023_abs_em.SJ7CRf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC90_20231113_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=4450%2E5257348%2EI1RXgV)**

body:
I come with good news, Friend!

|

I come with good news, Friend!

My boss just handed me a list of patriots who qualified for our **[Golden Gavel Award](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3kgggmv4smem9hd2ppnfkcuij1sgit3atp033ro_rp22sh2s8i66p74sji64o76clh2bs "Golden Gavel Award")** , and guess whose name was sitting right there at the TOP of our list?

That's right, it was you, Friend!

I personally reviewed your donor file, and let me tell you, no one is more deserving of the Golden Gavel than you are!

This is our way of recognizing and saying thank you to our top donors for all their hard work. _**Growing the majority and beating the Radical Left is a lot of work, and we just want to let you know that we have taken notice of all you 've done.**_

**[Will you accept the ultra-rare Golden Gavel Award before it expires in 24 hours?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znn5kafvbn74khpkdmtf8qov4p4ping1toc5r8uo_rp22sh2s8i66p74sji64o76clh2bs "Will you accept the ultra-rare Golden Gavel Award before it expires in 24 hours?")**

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Who controls whom?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjqa8qudmldc1636p777kmcl27bdif589h8g14g0_rp22sh2s8i66p74sji64o76clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq55m7b18p34tjb56f8rv08duq62vrcr3uk2kdj8_rp22sh2s8i66p74sji64o76clh2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zruhnjs4ic9dglj33omrd23lmjvr13oahh33loqo_rp22sh2s8i66p74sji64o76clh2bs) [NO](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrnrg8r8aeoqf6vjuimvhu5e13lm9mdi7b4shu9o_rp22sh2s8i66p74sji64o76clh2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztmiviub19u4c7r1l87i77g9q44c55n0oc954qmg_rp22sh2s8i66p74sji64o76clh2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvem6st5md2ko07ev6avdr79kh88jpsr9i0s9otg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p34s5h6ap7246h22sh2s8i66p74sji64o76clh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi0bagig9u50gc9p9r0if79mvb9megchln76qgfg_rp22sh2s8i66p74sji64o76clh2bs)_

body:
With your grassroots support now we can make the long-term plan possible.

**Peter, let’s talk about this campaign’s game plan.**
Grassroots support will be key to everything we’re able to accomplish. Training volunteers, hiring organizers to reach every corner of Michigan, and connecting with the voters who will decide this race takes continued investment and long-term planning from our team.
The #1 way that we can be sure we’ll accomplish every step of that plan is to make sure we have the strongest base of grassroots donors. [**That’s why today we’re asking if you can donate $13 today to our campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231113?amount=13&refcode=em20231113-566&refcode2=566_62735_n5DKV2&akid=566%2E62735%2En5DKV2)
Every small dollar contribution adds up. $13 from emails like this means we can hit the ground running in 2024.
$13 means we can build a foundation of donors to fight back against the money we expect to be spent against us.
$13 means that the cost of just one coffee and pastry will go towards supporting our vision for a better Michigan.
**That’s why one of the most powerful ways you can support our effort is by making a donation of $13 (or more!).** It will help us be sure that we’re able to run a strong, statewide campaign that reaches as many people as possible.

[**That’s why today I’m asking you to celebrate with me with a gift of $10 or any amount — every dollar matters and it would mean so much. You can give by clicking this link here >>> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73291203/438017850/673800278?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_KBG_20231113_FR_Bday_0_1 Score_PacitaGrey_NA_NA_Bday&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzMjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWUyZmZlMDAtNDk4Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NUwKEEq10XG2JuMg-A_kVsPbysxawo9yFQOaNNuonOo=)

It’s no secret I’m proud of Keir for all she has accomplished in her career and in her life. But that’s not the only reason I’m asking you to give to her campaign today...

Keir puts family — and people — at the heart of everything she does. She truly knows how to use the law to protect people — and at the end of the day, that IS the job of the Attorney General.

I know Keir will always have your back, regardless of the amount of money or power you have. She’ll protect our communities, make our neighborhoods safer, and find solutions to the everyday challenges that face Pennsylvania families.

But she can’t do it alone... right now, she needs our help to make sure she has resources she needs to make history on Election Day.

[**So please, Peter, chip in what you can to support Keir’s people-powered race for Attorney General of Pennsylvania.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73291204/438017851/673800278?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_KBG_20231113_FR_Bday_0_1 Score_PacitaGrey_NA_NA_Bday&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzMjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWUyZmZlMDAtNDk4Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NUwKEEq10XG2JuMg-A_kVsPbysxawo9yFQOaNNuonOo=)

Thanks for joining in on my birthday celebration!

– Pacita

But that’s not the only reason I’m asking you to give to her campaign today... Keir puts family — and people — at the heart of everything she does. She truly knows how to use the law to protect people — and at the end of the day, that IS the job of the Attorney General. I know Keir will always have your back, regardless of the amount of money or power you have. She’ll protect our communities, make our neighborhoods safer, and find solutions to the everyday challenges that face Pennsylvania families. But she can’t do it alone... right now, she needs our help to make sure she has resources she needs to make history on Election Day. Hi there...

I'm not quite sure how to phrase this, but I'm going to be honest with you, Patriot.

**These election results weren 't good news for Republicans.

I need to tell you about it, though, so you can choose for yourself whether to join the fight. You could change it all...**

My name is Brian Mast. If you aren't familiar with my background, I'm a combat veteran turned Congressman.

I lost both my legs and a finger in Afghanistan when a Taliban IED exploded beneath me. But, I survived. I returned home to my wife, Brianna, and our young son.

The terrifying truth is that there is a growing radical faction in Congress that apologizes for and even defends the same brand of monstrous terrorists that blew off my legs. I have been loud and clear in my opposition to their hate!

[That's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ddf2f3f1ca5c4ab68a27cbd70191401c&_e=34SYk_qH1_-ieuoUESDEsSHwfdNFbP9tDHygSdzSrNjDD3nWV7KsXfZU-NfRuYuJrKAelvTJPExw6CkvS7lSu20Cjrko2VOoKjQhyGhmAn5OC1pVKQ-XtWEmn9AAmq6uhu6NcyHUtyGPejbgNxUakNB7i8o45s7HIuMoortkvxoy5hLprDf8Li6byv_7jNPMoujo9L8JzmfZG4MzsnrrNmzQNuUSQQpTRg0c_8u0opReZJvKSZxEsU1X03u7WeWespXT4xUozOTBOzRv-ch1DUyLYK9DTIxwXZA4l9aXkne0SnzlJD7xzelUiOLhEWBbIRSoJ6GCB2VfDzLzM8Q74jdNuzvjrVSzH32j7F_BBUQ12mJ1Oz_NMv_Eo8VyEXfJ)
The terrorist apologist Democrats have hatched a plan to stop my fight. They don't realize that I will never back down.

But, I also know this fight is not something I will win on my own.

I learned in the Army to rely on my fellow soldiers in my time of need, and now I am looking to you, Patriot.

**_So please, help me out this one time, Patriot:_**

clean_body: | Brian Mast volunteering with the Israeli Defense Force Hi there... I'm not quite sure how to phrase this, but I'm going to be honest with you, Patriot. These election results weren 't good news for Republicans. I need to tell you about it, though, so you can choose for yourself whether to join the fight. You could change it all... My name is Brian Mast. If you aren't familiar with my background, I'm a combat veteran turned Congressman. I lost both my legs and a finger in Afghanistan when a Taliban IED exploded beneath me. But, I survived. I returned home to my wife, Brianna, and our young son. The terrifying truth is that there is a growing radical faction in Congress that apologizes for and even defends the same brand of monstrous terrorists that blew off my legs. I have been loud and clear in my opposition to their hate! The terrorist apologist Democrats have hatched a plan to stop my fight. They don't realize that I will never back down. But, I also know this fight is not something I will win on my own. I learned in the Army to rely on my fellow soldiers in my time of need, and now I am looking to you, Patriot. So please, help me out this one time, Patriot: | As a private citizen, a soldier, a volunteer, and now a Congressman, I've always worked to put America First. These election results weren't what Republicans were hoping for, so we need to act now to prevent the same result when the stakes are even higher next year. That's why I'm leading the fight for America First, protecting our conservative values, and standing against the Radicals working to destroy our country and our allies! I didn't back down when terrorists blew off my legs, so I certainly am not going to back down now. If you are willing to give your support, I give you my word I will not give up this fight. | | | God Bless, Brian Mast | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS Hon. name: Prudent Politics
subject: eggs & stiff joints
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Hi Friend,

Brace yourself... because you may
end up throwing out a lot of the food in your fridge after you
finish reading today's email.

You see, Maryland physician Dr.
Brian Paris says many so-called "health foods" are actually the
cause of sore, stiff joints that make you feel miserable.

"If you're in constant, chronic,
excruciating agony and don't feel well, it has to do with what
you're eating... and just as important... what you're not eating
but should eat," says Dr. Paris.

Dr. Paris found certain foods
marketed as being healthy…

...actually contain a toxic
nutrient your immune system sees as the enemy.

So, every time you take a bite of
one of these foods... your immune system unleashes its "army" to
attack this nutrient.

And since this nutrient enters
your bloodstream once it's digested... your immune system starts
attacking even healthy tissue and organs... causing burning in
your joints and muscles.

Dr. Paris explains, "Most of my
patients assume their joint issues are a normal part of the aging
process. They have no idea eating the wrong foods can cause joint
problems."

The good news is... this problem
is EASY to fix.

"You don't have to completely
change your diet. Just eliminating these 5 foods from your diet -
including a certain kind of vegetable - will do wonders to your
life," he says.

In his entire 20-year career as a
doctor, Dr. Paris has found eliminating these 5 foods to be the
most powerful drug-free defense against joint problems.

So far, he's helped thousands of
people at his private clinic... including some very famous
celebrities and NFL athletes.

Now, he's put his list of the 5
worst foods (and every other trick he's learned in 20 years) into
a free video available to the public..

So far, hundreds of thousands of
Americans are feeling much better after following the advice in
this video… which is probably why it's going viral on
Facebook.

You can watch it for free for the
rest of the day (and be sure to share with any friends or loved
ones who might need to see this). Click the link below to start
watching now:

⇒ The 5 WORST Foods For Your
Joints (Cause Burning & Aching)

Management LLC. 2407 South Congress Avenue Suite E #100 Austin,
TX 78704, USA. If you would like to unsubscribe from receiving
offers from SW Management LLC, please click here

subject: Apple Music blocks Israeli Artist Name from Song "God of Israel"
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=7eebfca2720948da9e85c220b75c1e71&_e=vVX0Y8BtlKwBqgvhIbTPyiyo9SgRQXK1YxsC0F-AoNyf0Nwj9hSii7UxAqEt9nu0IOpU0SZAVfm-mdx8JsN1sDzImHgzPSibuGtr5rQir5qYcS-j065nQj4dk1w4lg-6rwXVSIAAdhC5APH6WzV26zmYAxVFIIEroYtgjTA-8j2nSKhlPdR6169nbx5PEmJlL_3Do4vkFd0NwDzMWKDb6D8vWVb3DWwtb3IQRjjc_nz0kbKj8TCq4zZy27fv9TdNhO73b-sSt5IbOyq3380z_iRJcVEURo3Jf6rIj7SQ465wDisI8lPMKe21rqI25E-H)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Three days ago, we published a new song titled, "God of Israel," on iTunes. The song is a song of hope to the world and to the people in Israel, and was recorded as a collaboration between myself, Israeli musician Yair Levi, and Arab musician Carine Bassili.

For unknown reasons, the song was not released on the iTunes store until late last night. Even MORE disturbing, Yair is not listed as an artist on the song! We've seen antisemitism seep into all aspects of society, from protests on campus, to the media and now the music industry!
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=7eebfca2720948da9e85c220b75c1e71&_e=vVX0Y8BtlKwBqgvhIbTPyiyo9SgRQXK1YxsC0F-AoNyf0Nwj9hSii7UxAqEt9nu0IOpU0SZAVfm-mdx8JsN1sDzImHgzPSibuGtr5rQir5qYcS-j065nQj4dk1w4lg-6rwXVSIAAdhC5APH6WzV26zmYAxVFIIEroYtgjTA-8j1Y4LXSxMOU0B8UGWGeUT6Fmwho43Y4hTkOVbgYHwVJ_NUkcTxiKqvtGHsD6GTm5Or8exL2ZxFUnNt5FpMke0zC7EK8RwLFioFz3WK02hdBDHO4aO-WroiVutt3DrCOcD1xP9ca4AlLxmIByIJUC1DI)
---
We need you to help FIGHT BACK! We need you to download, stream and share _"God of Israel."_ Nothing would be better than a song of unity with Israeli and Arab Believers making it to the top of the charts! Listen to "God of Israel" **[HERE](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=7eebfca2720948da9e85c220b75c1e71&_e=vVX0Y8BtlKwBqgvhIbTPyiyo9SgRQXK1YxsC0F-AoNyf0Nwj9hSii7UxAqEt9nu0IOpU0SZAVfm-mdx8JsN1sDzImHgzPSibuGtr5rQir5qYcS-j065nQj4dk1w4lg-6rwXVSIAAdhC5APH6WzV26zmYAxVFIIEroYtgjTA-8j3u-pzqv9DfscfDn2rs7IX-C2nGa5sR9s4HHazdSpdvo3HWswVWI5epbA5pZBT6q9yoWP_Od_dHZh90fgv50Z_lravx_Sgz1iVmX-VWW6K6bUtBpjOMDKhZrhCRNTs8iVKosCsOmu3BSNE3IwJbIMbd)** , and share with your friends and family!

clean_body: | | | Dear Friend, Three days ago, we published a new song titled, "God of Israel," on iTunes. The song is a song of hope to the world and to the people in Israel, and was recorded as a collaboration between myself, Israeli musician Yair Levi, and Arab musician Carine Bassili. For unknown reasons, the song was not released on the iTunes store until late last night. Even MORE disturbing, Yair is not listed as an artist on the song! We've seen antisemitism seep into all aspects of society, from protests on campus, to the media and now the music industry! We need you to help FIGHT BACK! We need you to download, stream and share "God of Israel." Nothing would be better than a song of unity with Israeli and Arab Believers making it to the top of the charts! Listen to "God of Israel" , and share with your friends and family! Till All Hear, Sean Feucht | | | | | International Donors— donate seanfeucht.com/donate Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries 310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship

body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=1520%2E35263%2EzSZ5M_ ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Hi Peter,
Lexie from Team Baldwin here.

Election year is just around the corner, but our fundraising is pacing
behind right now.

Compared to our numbers at this point last quarter, our campaign has
raised less funds and from fewer grassroots donors so far — so I’m
personally asking you to step up and help us make up ground.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-nov23.TOAtRC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20231113_AM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=1520%2E35263%2EzSZ5M_ ]With one of our last key fundraising deadlines of the year coming up in
a matter of days, we need to pick up the pace ASAP. If you’re able, please
rush a donation to support Tammy’s reelection now:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

We can’t let our guard down for a single second, and that means we need to
bounce back on our fundraising — quickly.

Two GOP megamillionaires are considering jumping into the race for
Wisconsin's U.S. Senate seat. They can bankroll their entire campaigns to
defeat Tammy with their own personal fortunates.

Make no mistake,
Peter,
they’ll be ready to pounce on any opportunity to defeat Tammy and flip
this seat. If our fundraising continues to slip behind, we could easily be
drowned out by the millions Republicans are planning to pour into
Wisconsin.

The next few weeks are critical to building the resources we’ll need to
protect this seat against a self-funding GOP opponent, so we need to make
them count.

| | RE: _**THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST**_

---
Dear Patriot,

---
All the way back in April of this year, I told you that the witch hunts had taken their darkest turn yet.
---
I think I’ve now said that every single month since then.
---
But sadly, it’s the truth.
---
With _every_ passing month, Crooked Joe and the Democrats have turned up the heat in their vicious witch hunts against me and our movement.
---

subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=51515b60a49849e6baba45ed1e07d001&_e=KzFnYnlPtoLJ7V9Y7g2RgXCdJhWUdEB39uHVg1CW4uFa_88vhw2KboV7E1C2-Oqpb-abi4KLJ1QWONb2GFDB99NJ5cyqyezytDYFdhmZV0uV11mrcos6kKq6zO_TxxY4oBpGY1TFV7dqzE2DYszuyV2P8EhdUzLEQlSWmFRp0UKBqOzkbJsa5GMygROOLOVwqbWkXGPf8JvbQyqkaTDLeWhf0JxeLnV2Okn1XmsDyJFi5nqWEuNQw-1AlwQPtRjKto_2P8OlCxyvPaUTCr0bk0keHpwCuLoNQYaQN4KOUZovBgz1msklZYCVH1okM8ZX). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=51515b60a49849e6baba45ed1e07d001&_e=KzFnYnlPtoLJ7V9Y7g2RgXCdJhWUdEB39uHVg1CW4uFa_88vhw2KboV7E1C2-Oqpb-abi4KLJ1QWONb2GFDB99NJ5cyqyezytDYFdhmZV0uV11mrcos6kKq6zO_TxxY4oBpGY1TFV7dqzE2DYszuyQerRx3c_hVMVwAUJIAIr3ezpUQKPyRpGevTdBOrYhtG2_jzNWTMZrFDgA5WXs5krSVGKpDqOsRxS9SONIqccuvtlwbcKx6y6vzfi0f_zxyKf77B4b5Y4WAOLZWzPcayF4y0ncjw86WtzYiFgh_cjtvjmttybSm81M-lJri_wcG-) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=51515b60a49849e6baba45ed1e07d001&_e=KzFnYnlPtoLJ7V9Y7g2RgXCdJhWUdEB39uHVg1CW4uFa_88vhw2KboV7E1C2-Oqpb-abi4KLJ1QWONb2GFDB99NJ5cyqyezytDYFdhmZV0uV11mrcos6kKq6zO_TxxY4oBpGY1TFV7dqzE2DYszuyWT3-OVQhOSr3ZYAfmI8jEeUEgZx_xBj5J4fldmIQOu5OoApDqcv-QmTcPlrdm8hZzbGjCpXgLEUAqRakKJV6CUI0OgYeUSEZaaM1SW5LVOs1FTRaZVxSCXCHAurXRGfO9n9_mXM0r0zIbjvT0xu3x8gaG1XjCt2GLBuUH3Xoyzx) on these survival food kits while you can.

clean_body: The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis This might be your only warning. According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: " Food shortages are coming." Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling . When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. - When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. on these survival food kits while you can. Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Emily Busch
subject: Thoughts and prayers aren't enough for my son
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Busch for Congress
body:
Peter, we can do more.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://emily4mi.com/l/oHtkDPvbHd9L)
---
Peter, I launched my campaign for Congress over six months ago, and after the encouraging election results in Ohio, Virginia, and Kentucky, I wanted to re-introduce myself. **I'm Emily Busch, and I'm running against John James in Michigan's 10th District.** Whether you've heard a little about me, seen me at an event, or you've never met me before, I want to make one thing clear:
---
I'm running for Congress on behalf of our children.
---
**Peter, I know a lot of candidates will tell you they're doing this for our kids, but this is a deeply emotional and personal fight for me.********[If you don't have time to read my whole story, consider making a contribution to the pro-choice Democrat who can flip this seat>>](https://emily4mi.com/l/pezapCLqNWT3)** I'd like to tell you about the day that changed everything. Peter, this is my son:
---
| [ ](https://emily4mi.com/l/dJW5kV44w2Jh)
---
_**On November 30, 2021, he ran for his life from a school shooter.**_
---
While my son's teacher heroically led him and his classmates to safety, eleven people were shot that day – including the murder of four kids. Our community was traumatized. I was sad, scared, but more than anything, I was angry. In the year after the shooting, elected officials did **_nothing_** to address the obvious issue we had with gun control, except offer their "thoughts and prayers." **[With your help, we can do so much more – chip in today>>](https://emily4mi.com/l/wrIQFasleXfF)** Republicans in our federal government did nothing. In fact, Peter, people like my opponent are supported by the very same gun industry which has profited off of tragedies in our communities. 🚩 🚩**NOTHING** has been done to prevent this in the future. 🚩 **NOTHING** has been done to dig into the deep-rooted causes of gun violence, especially in marginalized communities. 🚩 **NOTHING** has been done to help us all heal. _**Where is John James?**_ I hope you feel the sadness, fear, and anger I feel. Inaction isn't enough for me, Peter. **In response, I did what moms do: rolled up my sleeves and went right to work.** Now, I've spent months making sure folks across the district know about my plan to push the needle on gun laws in our country and keep the horrific and tragic events at Oxford from happening again. **This is a competitive district, Peter. We have a real chance to flip a seat in Congress and actually do something about abortion rights, gun violence, and so many other challenges and opportunities.** **[To make this long-term change, we need a change of leadership in Congress. Your contributions will help us beat the Republicans and win this race. Will you join our team with a contribution of any amount today?](https://emily4mi.com/l/P7jwLY0Y3jK5)**
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://emily4mi.com/l/WKMV3B4esNzZ)
---
Thank you,
Emily Busch
---
|
---
| | | [](https://emily4mi.com/l/HhpIBm6TnIHW)

Emily first learned the importance of community and helping others from her mom, a nurse, and dad, a manufacturing representative, while growing up in a tight-knit, middle-class Midwestern family.

The proud product of public schools, Emily worked hard in and out of the classroom, balancing her studies and interest in performing arts with an after-school job as a cashier at Ace Hardware. She went on to earn her B.A. in Biology from Indiana University and Masters from Michigan State University.

Now, Emily is running for Congress in Michigan’s 10th District to keep our kids safe, protect our rights, and lower costs for Michigan families.

Emily chose to move to Oakland County two decades ago because it was the place she wanted to raise her family – a place with friendly neighbors, good schools, and safe neighborhoods.

She and her husband, a retired firefighter and Marine, enjoy camping, fishing, and visiting national parks in their free time.

**Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to**

**Emily Busch for Congress**
PO Box 80744
Rochester, MI 48308
---
[ **JOIN OUR TEAM** ](https://emily4mi.com/l/53upoHkSo0lo)
---
| | Paid for by Emily Busch for Congress
---
To unsubscribe from future communications, please click [here](https://emily4mi.com/l/8WHQbxA61EGk)
---

| Dear Friends and Partners, Since 2010, we have embarked on a remarkable journey. Our dedication to diversity, equity, and unwavering determination has not only defined our organization but also profoundly impacted the clients we are privileged to serve. Today, I am thrilled to share with you a special video that encapsulates our incredible journey. "A Story of Success" is more than a video – it's a narrative of our commitment and growth. This film traces our growth trajectory and underscores our mission to serve our clients with utmost integrity while nurturing our Latino community. This video is a celebration of what we stand for at Solidarity – #WeAreSolidarity. It illustrates the essence of our spirit, the challenges we've overcome, the significant milestones we've achieved, and the remarkable individuals who have journeyed with us. Whether you've been a part of this journey since the early days or joined us along the way, your support and partnership have been pivotal to our story of success. [Watch "A Story of Success" video here](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=c016038de9&e=b8f90417f9) I am immensely proud of Solidarity's achievements and am filled with anticipation for what the future holds. As we continue to grow and evolve, your continued partnership and support are invaluable. Thank you for being an integral part of our story.
Warmest regards,

Chuck Rocha
President & Founder

---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5csjd82ct2ailquol2av9qb8h8or00n093is378_rp22sh2s8i66p74sji66ob6cth2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

name: Jeff Frazee
subject: I’m writing you with an urgent request to train 2,000 youth activists before the 2024 elections.
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=153a02ff53254c528f8755bd3f4bdcdb&_e=0cY3T0MOThDRxKhuGUYrvXZVc41hz9Eu4WlADKY1TipJ3k8xl5tETsqtJjEjwuS4JTXXt7wfWfMKDamDt4Yt6BlMD-X0Xaxe0YHV0OWYdd-D5hcfmkB3c5-JliJDwgYKMXP_4g9DRXTJTAmhX6P_YxeMKKH4WxaQkFLxp_YdMKe_YTjrqON8wNRjfI8DfMV3LFn6wagfPxI6hNACGLWB0qFJZs1P2EZSIn_EV-YSWOpwgVsQymPNGVdoLT07bEN1GBvL16V306IbyxS5rTFpqA%3D%3D)

Friend,

Please let me be blunt.

[I'm writing you with an urgent request to train 2,000 youth activists before the 2024 elections. I am going to ask you to support our efforts with a donation of $10 or more. Please allow me to explain why it's critical to winning in 2024.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=153a02ff53254c528f8755bd3f4bdcdb&_e=0cY3T0MOThDRxKhuGUYrvXZVc41hz9Eu4WlADKY1TipJ3k8xl5tETsqtJjEjwuS4JTXXt7wfWfMKDamDt4Yt6BlMD-X0Xaxe0YHV0OWYdd-D5hcfmkB3c5-JliJDwgYKljS4f6R1w_YgoPDlwrCCDQTaLmWstFfZudvDjIa3uOVBhyIht6hnfkTxs0jYXaOecm51DkR33UKXbt-zF8sUSk30HIVxoGa6Szcj066l4R33Ino3vsG9LXqwaLsO2hBtKhMQ4Nd9gkIZep0lr7UN8w%3D%3D)

2024 will be a pivotal year for Americans as our country faces hardship:
* Inflation destroys our paychecks.
* Crime rampages in our streets.
* And socialists have hijacked our institutions - from healthcare to education to courts.

Nothing short of a revolution will save our country. And the revolution is occurring among young conservatives and libertarians on college campuses.

The revolution is called Operation Win at the Door.

Here's how it works:

**STEP 1:** Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is the most active and effective pro-liberty youth organization advancing liberty on campus. YAL identifies and recruits thousands of students each year from college campuses who believe in the cause of freedom.

**STEP 2:** YAL trains student activists in everything they need to know in order to effectively advance the ideas of liberty, including door-to-door and phone banking.

**STEP 3 (Operation Win at the Door):** YAL youth activists flood electoral districts and make three door-knocking passes to help tip the scales in favor of the liberty candidate.

And it WORKS! This is a proven strategy that we've implemented since 2018.

**Our youth activists have knocked over 4 million doors, adding 328 liberty legislators across the country!**

[Can you send an urgent donation of $10, $20.24, $50, or anything you can generously afford? Click here to donate towards Operation Win at the Door >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=153a02ff53254c528f8755bd3f4bdcdb&_e=0cY3T0MOThDRxKhuGUYrvXZVc41hz9Eu4WlADKY1TipJ3k8xl5tETsqtJjEjwuS4JTXXt7wfWfMKDamDt4Yt6BlMD-X0Xaxe0YHV0OWYdd-D5hcfmkB3c5-JliJDwgYKlTJ686YLASK2FIPg9b8JvA4aNdIr-1AxQyyv1DA95hhZ46Bqe-9UUTnJ55TSGIkzuR6L-oRSXHpcL2dc9gI9pLN108ia4x9qdLGuVRXBuwmxjo5o1X0Sr5OgPYW8gBXOsTcgPfYBueNR7mQAAK1cSg%3D%3D)

[Donate](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=153a02ff53254c528f8755bd3f4bdcdb&_e=0cY3T0MOThDRxKhuGUYrvXZVc41hz9Eu4WlADKY1TipJ3k8xl5tETsqtJjEjwuS4JTXXt7wfWfMKDamDt4Yt6BlMD-X0Xaxe0YHV0OWYdd-D5hcfmkB3c5-JliJDwgYKihMS_OTiQ-wpsLpgYfGs8ARvEaHGHo-ZS2cX2VZ5YA1ZHuVhraUiK2gZWm0YJlF2s3_c5Ri3nHbyJ7HGlzAaHRM3QYPPzOKXlFPXrXVyMyc8U9UYfxbt1imQWIHNCfmtm6f2luJ6kEkPzMkU1b6ysQ%3D%3D)

Here's why I am asking for your immediate help:

Next month, we are beginning to train thousands of our youth activists for Operation Win at the Door for 2024 campaigns. We cannot wait any longer to train our activists. Primary elections begin soon, and we need liberty legislators to win and defeat the establishment.

**I must reach our online goal of $20,000 before the end of the week to secure the funds necessary to train our youth activists and win big in 2024.**

Everything is on the line next year, and I'm afraid if principled candidates are not elected to office, then our future is lost, and the Constitution will continue to be trampled on by soulless politicians.

Please forgive me for the urgent request. But this cannot wait any longer.

**Friend, my team is on standby to keep you updated on Operation Win at the Door. Can you send an urgent donation to train youth activists before 2024?**

[**Donate $10 = Five Doors Knocked**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=153a02ff53254c528f8755bd3f4bdcdb&_e=0cY3T0MOThDRxKhuGUYrvXZVc41hz9Eu4WlADKY1TipJ3k8xl5tETsqtJjEjwuS4JTXXt7wfWfMKDamDt4Yt6BlMD-X0Xaxe0YHV0OWYdd-BOL7TdJzXBJ1jc5uLsLGfPmbiglByWI4KMAE-T115uAg4b9zZ72sPDio3wYiVbIZWwlB9NQwVfRwnO5-YMACz4rX2wKREL48w4F4_pjsAaRlWT0WraBNijG9dqc4ROGyTHmOLIMYgUQEPPifzQfLae_E7kR8mu_gY64m3As9GyRAIhWv8ocMsyx-8b8OO7bc%3D)

[**Donate Any Amount**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=153a02ff53254c528f8755bd3f4bdcdb&_e=0cY3T0MOThDRxKhuGUYrvXZVc41hz9Eu4WlADKY1TipJ3k8xl5tETsqtJjEjwuS4JTXXt7wfWfMKDamDt4Yt6BlMD-X0Xaxe0YHV0OWYdd-D5hcfmkB3c5-JliJDwgYKin9VezfOYR8e6MVSb28PlU1liJAyf3t5DBkwosiZea_oQstCa3aEaQlgFmGIOvC6LtVTDDNK6MxsyUWd62YOBNqZYczqJPvrr15tz_3E-2lhqAE6cTE_85nTzQBfPpEhNBcAwd_xt5BjvsMc77Y3RQ%3D%3D)

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5cc736193a743e5b9234990db379152&_e=pya_8_95UKzpZ5oupenEPcC8L77_FCdVC83vKdDb-3NMNPiD3wnmqzuiBhCOu54BhJ77VVOKGvrsVf-GphJ8dVrZ1gpLtRYK9ZbRV33UgCtNKN4X6kw9Y16JL5sZXQNM3xbs7Po06iY7Dlg-q4uqYoDda2dzzEB2m-LA4dP4QrBEweOhFjtJb21Ccmzi06tzQ2SwE3Axs-_kzGFizpqsLxM-BeDqE8Dd819mDYQ9sraGiP6CI1waO9ieiHKmlkUc1EimvC5VGb2ZNp7rBWAs5ZmyxWKLFatmuI_-IJDea6P-p_-xoKX2_BN8fYP7hcnV). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. clean_body: The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis This might be your only warning. According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: " Food shortages are coming." Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling . When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. on these survival food kits while you can. name: Nina Ahmad
subject: A Night to Remember!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ninageneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ninageneral]
Hi Friend,
All the votes have been counted and I am thrilled to be elected to the City Council of Philadelphia , the 6th largest city in the United State of America, as an At-Large Council Member.
Thank you to the Philadelphia voters who believed in my candidacy. Thank you to my amazing family, our small but mighty Team Nina for Philly and all our supporters for your time, for your energy and for your friendship. I could not have done this without you.
We launched this campaign with one very simple priority: to make Philadelphia a healthier, stronger city . The fact is, the challenges we face as a city are, at their root, health-related challenges. From gun violence to education and economic growth, when we focus on making this a healthier city, we create a path toward equitable prosperity.
As a scientist, that will be my missio n for the people I represent as a member of city council. I will advocate for fact-based, evidence-supported solutions to the issues that we’ve been trying to solve for decades. I firmly believe that Philadelphia is uniquely qualified to become a national leader in health-based solutions.
As the first South Asian/Bangladeshi American to be ever elected to Philadelphia Council and the only immigrant in recent history , I have the responsibility to craft policy that is inclusive and leaves no one behind .
I want you to know that my door will always be open to you and I encourage you to reach out to me with ideas, suggestions, or advice. I work for you and I won’t ever forget it.
Thank you again for your support.
Sincerely,
Council Member-Elect, Nina Ahmad
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ninageneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ninageneral]
Please donate $25, $50, $100, $1000 or more to help me continue protecting our fundamental rights, ensuring every eligible voter has their voice heard, and investing in critical programs. I firmly believe that Philadelphia is uniquely qualified to become a national leader in health-based solutions. As the first South Asian/Bangladeshi American to be ever elected to Philadelphia Council and the only immigrant in recent history , I have the responsibility to craft policy that is inclusive and leaves no one behind . I want you to know that my door will always be open to you and I encourage you to reach out to me with ideas, suggestions, or advice. I work for you and I won’t ever forget it. Thank you again for your support. Sincerely, Council Member-Elect, Nina Ahmad [] Please donate $25, $50, $100, $1000 or more to help me continue protecting our fundamental rights, ensuring every eligible voter has their voice heard, and investing in critical programs. name: John Fetterman
subject: Manchin's announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek — Joe Manchin announced he isn't running for re-election, so now we have even more work to do to defend our Democratic Senate majority.
Policy differences with Senator Manchin aside, I ran for Senate promising to be the 51st Democratic vote on big priorities. Now, West Virginia's likely to flip red next year.
I've been proud of what we've done with our narrow majority — we've gotten some wins for working people in PA + around the country. **But all of that is at risk, especially now.**
We're fighting an uphill battle to keep the Senate Majority, and, seeing an opportunity, _million$ in dirty corporate PAC money are going to be spent to flip seat after seat._
**[I'm going to do all I can to stop the GOP from flipping PA🔴. If you're with me, can you make a contribution of any amount to power our campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231113-1?refcode=em20231113-1-8665&refcode2=8665_434096_0GKkaL&akid=8665%2E434096%2E0GKkaL)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231113-1?amount=5&refcode=em20231113-8665&refcode2=8665_434096_0GKkaL&akid=8665%2E434096%2E0GKkaL)**
Our team has been people-powered since day 1 — so *thank you* for your support. **[Whatever you can chip in directly helps us stand up to the GOP.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231113-1?refcode=em20231113-1-8665&refcode2=8665_434096_0GKkaL&akid=8665%2E434096%2E0GKkaL)**
Thank you,
💛 John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20231113-8665-footer&t=1&refcode2=8665_434096_0GKkaL&akid=8665%2E434096%2E0GKkaL)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8665%2E434096%2E0GKkaL)

name: VoteVets
subject: Vermin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
It was one of the most chilling statements that Donald Trump has ever made, Derek.
#
It was one of the most chilling statements that Donald Trump has ever made, Derek.
Echoing the exact language used by dictators like Mussolini and Hitler, Donald Trump said that good people who stand against his vision of tearing down our democracy are “vermin.”
He said that as media reports show Trump and his extremist partners are planning to fire as many as 50,000 career civil servants to fill the government with MAGA loyalists.
American Military cemeteries around the world are filled with fallen heroes who made the ultimate sacrifice in World War II to defeat the likes of Mussolini and Hitler. It would be the final insult to them — the ones who Trump called “suckers” and “losers” — if he were re-elected.
The Veterans of the Greatest Generation and those who came after didn’t fight for this country to turn it over to this wannabe dictator. We didn’t swear an oath to defend the Constitution so this traitor can rip it to shreds. We didn’t beat him like a drum back in 2020 just to let him march right back to the White House.
Not on our watch.
Not a chance.
VoteVets wrote the playbook that beat Trump back in 2020. We’ll mobilize Veterans around the country to speak out against him and his ugly brand of authoritarianism. We’ll run ads that can win in swing states and get voters to the polls.
We’ll beat him again, Derek. But we need you with us.
[**Chip in to VoteVets today. Make it for $5. Help us stop Trump before it’s too late.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-nov23.rp0I1d&refcode=em231113-1-30&t=1&akid=19024%2E3013755%2EXwAK3B)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [CHIP IN $5](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-pac-em-nov23.l1xwc9&amount=5&refcode=em231113-1-30&t=2&akid=19024%2E3013755%2EXwAK3B)
---
We mean that, Derek. We have a good shot at beating Trump again. But if we let this threat go unanswered, he could take back the White House. And we all know that would be an absolute disaster.
So, please. Chip in.
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

The band aid is about to be ripped off, friends.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73299619/438038193/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDVmZmVkNi01NjgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qBA0zfiOcH2GppFAqwoE-R7e9xS44b2_jOr26hdL3Bk=&emci=45506070-4882-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=305ffed6-5682-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=9494239)
---

| | Here we go again: this week, Congress _must_ pass a budget to avert a government shutdown (again). How did we get here? Great question. **We passed stop-gap legislation to avert a shutdown. Instead of swiftly getting to work on the budget, certain House Republicans dedicated their time to manufacture a new crisis within Congress.** While they were preoccupied with political games and who gets that gavel — I have been worried about how we will ensure**:**
* 65,000 children do not lose access to childcare
* 60,000 seniors are not robbed of nutrition services like Meals on Wheels
* 63,000 government employees are not furloughed
* 50,000 workers would lose an average of $1,000 in back wages they are owed
* 79,000 military personnel (in Washington state _alone_) do not work without pay

**These are real, tangible, impacts of ineffective leadership.** We must take expedient action to pass a budget so we can get back to the work that matters most to working families: lowering costs, rebuilding our crumbling infrastructure, tackling climate change, and making our communities safer.**** **We have to head into this election season strong and ready to take back the House majority if we are going to accomplish anything.** [**Will you make a contribution of $3 to my campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73299621/438038195/1596212816?refcode=2023-11-13-shutdown&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=305ffed6-5682-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDVmZmVkNi01NjgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qBA0zfiOcH2GppFAqwoE-R7e9xS44b2_jOr26hdL3Bk=) Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

Dem Rep Announces She’s Running To Succeed Glenn Youngkin As Virginia
Gov

Virginia Democratic Rep. Abigail Spanberger announced Monday she is
running for governor in 2025 instead of seeking reelection.
Spanberger, a three-term congresswoman who previously served in law
enforcement and in the CIA, launched her gubernatorial campaign in a
Twitter video, where she pitched herself as a bipartisan politician.

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: BREAKING: Ilhan Omar’s opponent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Ilhan Omar officially has a 2024 Democratic primary challenger in
Minnesota’s 5th congressional district.

Minneapolis city council member Don Samuels just launched his rematch
campaign against Ilhan, whom he narrowly lost to in 2022 by a margin of
less than 2,500 votes.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231113-2-io.Bi_TcY&refcode=em20231113-31828&amount=3&t=1001&akid=31828%2E1203867%2E28k4Bn ]We can’t waste a moment: will you rush a split contribution of
$3 or more right now to help Justice Democrats and Ilhan
fight back?

Ilhan’s repeat opponent is a centrist who accused her of having “a
predilection to divisiveness and conflict” because of her support for
criminal justice reform and calls for a ceasefire and release of all
hostages in Israel and Palestine.

In her two terms in Congress, Ilhan has been an unapologetic champion for
bold, progressive change and human rights. Samuels meanwhile led efforts
on the Minneapolis city council to block a groundbreaking measure that
would replace the police force with a public safety agency, after police
murdered George Floyd in 2020.

We already know corporate interests and dark money groups like AIPAC are
going to come out of the woodwork to support Ilhan’s opponent with huge
sums of money and attack ads, as she refuses to do their bidding in
Congress and challenges the status quo.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231113-2-io.Bi_TcY&refcode=em20231113-31828&amount=3&t=1002&akid=31828%2E1203867%2E28k4Bn ]Our movement cannot afford to lose this crucial Squad member in
Congress next year. Split a grassroots donation to Justice Democrats and
Ilhan’s campaign now to defend her!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231113-2-io.Bi_TcY&refcode=em20231113-31828&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=31828%2E1203867%2E28k4Bn ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1022&akid=31828%2E1203867%2E28k4Bn ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1023&akid=31828%2E1203867%2E28k4Bn ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231113-31828-footer&t=1024&refcode2=31828_1203867_28k4Bn&akid=31828%2E1203867%2E28k4Bn

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=31828%2E1203867%2E28k4Bn

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: The week ahead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Here are the issues Powered by People is working on this week:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Voters Win in Harris County

Last week brought a big win for democracy in Texas. A state judge threw
out a number of Republican lawsuits attempting to overturn last year’s
elections in Houston and Harris County, dealing a major blow to the Texas
GOP’s voter suppression efforts in Texas’ largest and most diverse county.

[1]Houston Chronicle: Harris County 2022 election results stand after
judge dismisses GOP challenges

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Texas Voucher Fight Comes to a Head

After once again failing to pass his private school voucher scam during
the special legislative session that ended last week, Governor Abbott has
called an unprecedented FOURTH special session to try to force this bill
through the Legislature.

[2]The Texas Tribune: School voucher critics remain largely unswayed
during Texas House hearing

Abbott’s voucher bill will likely come up for a vote later this week, and
a bipartisan majority of Democrats and rural Republicans remain united in
defeating it. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/59937?t=1001&akid=234828%2E444211%2EiZ0qSe ]You can read about where this fight stands here.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Moment to Lead on Immigration

This week, Republicans in Congress are trying to force through
counterproductive legislation that would further restrict asylum access,
waste enormous resources to continue Trump’s border wall, and resume mass
family detention policies that put children and babies in cages.

Meanwhile, Donald Trump is promising to wreak a level of havoc and cruelty
that would exceed that of his first four years in office if he is
reelected next year, including by reviving his infamous “Muslim ban” and
carrying out “the largest domestic deportation operation in American
history.”

These extreme proposals are unpopular and incredibly damaging, offering
President Biden a major opportunity to contrast Republicans’ cruel
posturing with real solutions that the majority of Americans support.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/59938?t=1002&akid=234828%2E444211%2EiZ0qSe ]Here are three things President Biden can do to lead on this issue with
his strong moral compass, beat Trump again in 2024, and help produce the
Congressional majority we need to establish a safe, orderly, humane
immigration system.

A state judge threw out a number of Republican lawsuits attempting to overturn last year’s elections in Houston and Harris County, dealing a major blow to the Texas GOP’s voter suppression efforts in Texas’ largest and most diverse county. [1]Houston Chronicle: Harris County 2022 election results stand after judge dismisses GOP challenges Texas Voucher Fight Comes to a Head After once again failing to pass his private school voucher scam during the special legislative session that ended last week, Governor Abbott has called an unprecedented FOURTH special session to try to force this bill through the Legislature. Our Moment to Lead on Immigration This week, Republicans in Congress are trying to force through counterproductive legislation that would further restrict asylum access, waste enormous resources to continue Trump’s border wall, and resume mass family detention policies that put children and babies in cages. Meanwhile, Donald Trump is promising to wreak a level of havoc and cruelty that would exceed that of his first four years in office if he is reelected next year, including by reviving his infamous “Muslim ban” and carrying out “the largest domestic deportation operation in American history.” These extreme proposals are unpopular and incredibly damaging, offering President Biden a major opportunity to contrast Republicans’ cruel posturing with real solutions that the majority of Americans support.
