Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. _\- HuffPost, 11/8/23_ Team, That headline is exactly why we can’t slow down. After we passed Issue 1 and protected reproductive rights in our state constitution, our not-so-lovely GOP Senator immediately refused to accept the election results and announced that he will not stop trying to strip away access to abortion at the federal level. **[We have to elect Ohio Democrats to Congress next year that will continue to fight for our reproductive freedoms. Can you help by pitching in anything you can afford today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73301192/438043516/-605597782?refcode=odp_em_231113_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2Y1MDFjNi01OTgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PXRcffObUS3YDIn-PBZnLTbhAhxwY-eWvF7lTMCJ6TY=)** We are well aware that Vance is not alone in this mission. Republican senators around the country are going to fight back with everything they’ve got. Since the GOP couldn’t pass their draconian ban in Ohio, they’re going to attempt to get it done in Washington. **[Will you chip in $5 before our mid-month fundraising deadline to help us stop them?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73301193/438043517/-605597782?refcode=odp_em_231113_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2Y1MDFjNi01OTgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PXRcffObUS3YDIn-PBZnLTbhAhxwY-eWvF7lTMCJ6TY=)** Thank you, Liz Walters | | ********[********](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73301194/438043518/-605597782?refcode=odp_em_231113_1&amount=5;email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2Y1MDFjNi01OTgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PXRcffObUS3YDIn-PBZnLTbhAhxwY-eWvF7lTMCJ6TY=)****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73301195/438043519/-605597782?refcode=odp_em_231113_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2Y1MDFjNi01OTgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PXRcffObUS3YDIn-PBZnLTbhAhxwY-eWvF7lTMCJ6TY=) ************

| | Patriot,

---
Last week, President Trump took the witness stand in New York City.
---
And to close out the week, President Trump returned to New York City with Tucker Carlson to step into the UFC arena and show the entire nation that he will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to Make America Great Again!
---
[](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=0df662ca19c34e0382fefebbbc817b07&_e=3TgwEJoE6Gv3dOnKJAGV6nKPTKT-JItuzUGWzPuynSHREIpixNq11kI3xl0xhqpjs_jKbUFjdOjfqIQF8ftnxu95a3vYLt1hJsoX34tfP27v9s39WTsCG3UfO7-GQabNs3LrKOp5SzouM6JV8vgaHFfuyy4HZGHAuTOi68b0w7UqTE2QipD9CETssnfKLLZN1GItOCL_nSmzQb_Kb-LhCnbEmZsSL_j0Hnr-vVmHrUtj73ju660DW1KP3nOCr6J_q-kmaiz7u4BNayWT-jsPA_mcpfJEXABWctlbsdPfPEQ5ON0VfYQoGYGJqBH8mV9C1bU7dbwnUEclAHExlDepaJAXVJfc0h5YWXGiCe4bump4Z9I3hTjYQ7BRn_FTvNlZS9jq1yFK1Ma5Mtv8kbVOtqmWB5F9zLod6geYtXseF7aWzVbwRVUN7JAd_2j89raXZrz2_TwCrBW6chwnIYfpu6_Jt4cnaOgS7434t58RJdS2xkm_9PERd1HD4nan3shL)
---
Upon setting foot in the arena, he was met with an outpouring of love. His defiant return to the city he once built is a reminder that he will never forget his first and most loyal supporters.
---
President Trump’s powerful entrance sent a message to the tyrannical Democrats that they can __NEVER__ break his spirit – even as they try to wrongfully imprison him for life and invoke the “corporate death penalty” upon him to financially destroy him.

---
_And that goes for all of us!_

---
No matter how vicious the Left’s attacks become, we can never lose faith in our mission to save America.

---
Even as it may seem that our country is falling apart, that the world is burning, and that our once great Republic conceived in liberty and justice is transforming into a Third World Dictatorship, we simply cannot give up hope.

---
President Trump has never been more committed to saving our great country. Are you?

---
_If you cannot contribute at this time because of the very sinister people in control of D.C. who want to crush our spirits, then please do not even think about donating. But President Trump will still ask for this one favor: do not, ever, under any circumstances, lose faith!_

---

clean_body: President Trump and Tucker Carlson| | | | | Patriot, Last week, President Trump took the witness stand in New York City. And to close out the week, President Trump returned to New York City with Tucker Carlson to step into the UFC arena and show the entire nation that he will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to Make America Great Again! Upon setting foot in the arena, he was met with an outpouring of love. His defiant return to the city he once built is a reminder that he will never forget his first and most loyal supporters. President Trump’s powerful entrance sent a message to the tyrannical Democrats that they can NEVER break his spirit – even as they try to wrongfully imprison him for life and invoke the “corporate death penalty” upon him to financially destroy him. And that goes for all of us! No matter how vicious the Left’s attacks become, we can never lose faith in our mission to save America. Even as it may seem that our country is falling apart, that the world is burning, and that our once great Republic conceived in liberty and justice is transforming into a Third World Dictatorship, we simply cannot give up hope. President Trump has never been more committed to saving our great country. Are you? If you cannot contribute at this time because of the very sinister people in control of D.C. who want to crush our spirits, then please do not even think about donating. But President Trump will still ask for this one favor: do not, ever, under any circumstances, lose faith! | | Thank you, Team Trump | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Reporting Live
body:
My new Rumble show Loomer Unleashed is taking off - and it has been an absolute blast being able to report directly to the American people without any filters or censorship! | | | | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FCGChf6c6Z7DH9F3UubXLjw%2FJCFZoDC2MuL8Q2e2xkaYKQ/1/0100018bca2d7859-ea7eb107-de45-438f-9b60-e1b3a246fb14-000000/NeEKa32wMwTD6LOr9gYQQYEUuFw=347) | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FCGChf6c6Z7DH9F3UubXLjw%2FJCFZoDC2MuL8Q2e2xkaYKQ/2/0100018bca2d7859-ea7eb107-de45-438f-9b60-e1b3a246fb14-000000/qSjvsDSqShZeDKSN-z3SSIIx1c8=347)
Dear Friend,

My new Rumble show Loomer Unleashed is taking off - and it has been an absolute blast being able to report directly to the American people without any filters or censorship!

But, with anything good, it comes at a price; and in my case, the expenses associated with producing a show and traveling to report on stories of national importance is very real! **[Will you support my in the field investigative reports today with a donation?](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FCGChf6c6Z7DH9F3UubXLjw%2FJCFZoDC2MuL8Q2e2xkaYKQ/3/0100018bca2d7859-ea7eb107-de45-438f-9b60-e1b3a246fb14-000000/Xc88UGAlC-uaolnQLfpGI-y9mkE=347)**

Any amount helps cover production costs and the travel expenses associated with bringing you blockbuster and educational reports, and in the coming weeks, I will be recruiting new talent to further expand my operation. I can only do that with your continued support.

Last week, I was in Hialeah, FL, reporting live from President Trump's rally.

While my friend Roseanne Barr got all the headlines with her hilarious speech, President Trump was on FIRE, and just on my LIVE broadcast of his speech alone, over 150,000 Americans tuned in!

I need to keep reaching people with the TRUTH so I can continue educating the public about the issues that matter most to Americans, including mass migration, election integrity, Big Tech censorship, the dangers of weaponized government, and the rising threats of anti-Semitism and Islamic terrorism in the United States, and around the world.

**[So please, donate today and become a much-needed supporter for my Rumble show that airs twice each week!](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FCGChf6c6Z7DH9F3UubXLjw%2FJCFZoDC2MuL8Q2e2xkaYKQ/4/0100018bca2d7859-ea7eb107-de45-438f-9b60-e1b3a246fb14-000000/SpSwPDpZMDeS46uCif9u1NcX7q4=347)**

You can watch LIVE, every Tuesday and Thursday at 8 pm EST on my Rumble channel.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---

Lake Worth, FL 33460

Today, Abigail launched her campaign to become the next Governor of Virginia. We don’t win elections overnight, and the path to victory starts now. We have an ambitious goal of raising $50,000 before midnight!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73301727/438045412/-1898250603?refcode=BLU-ASFG-20231113-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDRkNzBjM2UtNWI4Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hilnix0EoftL32MFDE8LxFfEBEsaxNjn1XmqMUzsC-E=)

Abigail is the best choice to become the next Governor of Virginia. She was raised in Henrico County, graduated from the University of Virginia, and is raising her three daughters here in the Commonwealth.

And not only does Abigail know Virginia, she knows how to win. Before Abigail won her first race for Congress in 2018, Republicans had held the seat for almost half a century. Reason #2: We’re battling Republican mega-donors who are dumping millions into races nationwide. name: Conservatives Give
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b9e5cc7651104f1483d7769eb9a60694&_e=U3yrO2isFdxofMFzx0EYH1LGX7W9ZB0D0OkZbUk5bcbbIklOpEFZfCunzz5nftAIjz3tyFl8VY1sZ1b4fpsShTsT1rIeMkqvO-O0n0s5ZLlWfc3kGrJys7K4DX2k6zt_5nGABCARM0wS7nlUbYlY9VJnezrYIUaWFG0C6Yx3CAQR3yZbAcxXkR-PFfgN1qPnJfxsrxBI9j-CzhxYRL-b7XlP25ivzQwaxUKr2VsFaNWxE8szwYG4agD42kgRmTe44EndxLntfWtwPDjHMV8zZb5nXdHPIw-9aHfOHw9pQeSG77pwmlE0VoTq1h0QfuySUVb6SeMTmbieXIXl9Z-BXgKx6CkgxroaB6rKO2DyDdyjH8-T1-jSH64tU6N3nRkRd-k61R-BGwIgFT1nZtgcGNtKJhEp71tkwxRRnpEUlI1VN8xt5RVD79QN90IY9Lb0)

| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. name: Alaskans For Honest Elections
subject: How ranked choice voting upended the Boulder mayor's race
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alaskans For Honest Elections, 2521 E Mtn Village Dr #904 Wasilla, AK 99654 Phillip Izon, Director Approved This Message
body:
Please share this with as many people as you can. Share with 5-10 people. | | | [](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65527d231963996effa9b4af&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D65527bd5ae450a0a49d37dfe%26ss_email_id%3D65527d231963996effa9b4af%26ss_campaign_name%3DHow%2Branked%2Bchoice%2Bvoting%2Bupended%2Bthe%2BBoulder%2Bmayor%2527s%2Brace%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-11-13T19%253A47%253A26Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_65527bd5ae450a0a49d37dfe&l=en-US&s=8AzGsgxDsRT8Ly4wuKWFXBSAuMM%3D)
---
|
### **IT’S UP TO YOU ALASKA**
---
### **Tudor Bingo and Big Valley Bingo as new signing locations**
---
#### [**How ranked choice voting upended the Boulder mayor's race**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65527d231963996effa9b4af&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.axios.com%2Flocal%2Fdenver%2F2023%2F11%2F09%2Fboulder-mayor-race-ranked-choice-voting-election&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_65527bd5ae450a0a49d37dfe&l=en-US&s=usmLrCN5Qt92q8VElVtvbJMYODM%3D)
---
In the recent Boulder city election, Bob Yates, a former Republican who became unaffiliated in May 2022, initially led in the mayoral race. However, the introduction of ranked choice voting shifted the results. Incumbent Mayor Aaron Brockett, a liberal Democrat, overtook Yates with a lead of 497 votes and is expected to win. This shift is attributed to the second-choice votes from Nicole Speer's supporters, who finished third. Speer was endorsed by the local Democratic Socialists of America chapter. This election demonstrated the significant impact of ranked choice voting, which pushed Boulder's municipal politics further to the left. Yates, known for his limits on development and growth, had previously won more votes in the 2015 and 2019 council elections than Brockett. Brockett acknowledged that ranked choice voting was a key factor in his likely victory, differentiating it from a plurality winner system.
---
#### **RCV Overview**
Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) leads to confusion, disenfranchisement, and unfairly benefits left-wing candidates. It uses examples from various elections in the U.S. to argue against RCV.RCV as a Means to Left-Wing Power\- Instances where RCV affected election outcomes are highlighted, such as in Boulder, Colorado, where it helped a center-left candidate win.\- RCV is accused of leading to chaos, as seen in New York City’s 2021 election.RCV's Implementation Issues\- Errors and confusion in RCV implementation are cited, with examples like the Oakland School Board and Alameda County elections.\- Utah’s pilot program is mentioned as an example of RCV not delivering promised benefits.Reports and Studies on RCV\- A University of Minnesota report is referenced, claiming RCV fails to meet its proponents' promises.\- The report notes no significant change in voter turnout or diversity in elected officials with RCV.Voter Confusion and Disenfranchisement\- Examples from Oakland and Arlington, Virginia illustrate voter confusion and potential disenfranchisement.\- Low voter turnout, particularly among minority groups, is highlighted in Alaska’s 2022 general election.Opposition to RCV\- The D.C. Democrat party's rejection of RCV over concerns of disenfranchising minority voters is mentioned.\- Legal challenges to RCV are noted, arguing that it violates constitutional rights.Transparency and Majority Issues\- RCV is criticized for reducing transparency and complicating recounts.\- The concept of “ballot exhaustion” can prevent a true majority win.Specific Election Cases\- The role of RCV in Alaska and Maine elections is discussed, with emphasis on how it can alter expected outcomes.\- Cases where RCV led to unexpected winners are highlighted, questioning its effectiveness in reflecting majority preference. Overall, the text argues that RCV complicates the voting process, undermines traditional majority rule, and often benefits specific political groups at the expense of voter clarity and fairness.
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
### [**Read The Article On The Watchman**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65527d231963996effa9b4af&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskawatchman.com%2F2023%2F10%2F13%2Fpro-ranked-choice-voting-group-hit-with-elections-complaint-from-leader-of-repeal-effort%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_65527bd5ae450a0a49d37dfe&l=en-US&s=inaOpFT7-AI4Hwq0CT1nopyVrn4%3D)
---
#### **PSA:**
#### **We submitted a formal complaint to APOC (Alaska Political Office Commission) concerning the actions of the Pro-RCV group in Alaska. While they have accused us of breaching various State Campaign Finance Laws, we assert that this group should also adhere to the same rules and regulations. Contrary to their portrayal, this organization is not grassroots and receives substantial funding from outside of Alaska. Our objective is to hold them responsible for their apparent hypocrisy and their attempts to intimidate and tarnish the image of Alaskans, their organizations, and families. Their efforts to suppress our movement against ranked choice voting should not go unnoticed, and they must answer for potentially breaking the same laws they accuse us of. It's concerning that these well-informed political activists, who have benefited from massive out-of-state donations for their ranked choice voting agenda and campaign finance law changes, manipulate the system to their advantage, expecting regular citizens to falter and then overwhelm them with financial and legal burdens. We trust that the State of Alaska will ensure that these laws are applied uniformly, calling this Pro-RCV group to account for any disregard of Alaskan laws and norms.**
#### **Please see the full 111 page complaint when it is made public by the news and APOC. All of this information is public information.**

clean_body: Please share this with as many people as you can. Share with 5-10 people. | | | | IT’S UP TO YOU ALASKA Tudor Bingo and Big Valley Bingo as new signing locations In the recent Boulder city election, Bob Yates, a former Republican who became unaffiliated in May 2022, initially led in the mayoral race. However, the introduction of ranked choice voting shifted the results. Incumbent Mayor Aaron Brockett, a liberal Democrat, overtook Yates with a lead of 497 votes and is expected to win. This shift is attributed to the second-choice votes from Nicole Speer's supporters, who finished third. Speer was endorsed by the local Democratic Socialists of America chapter. This election demonstrated the significant impact of ranked choice voting, which pushed Boulder's municipal politics further to the left. Yates, known for his limits on development and growth, had previously won more votes in the 2015 and 2019 council elections than Brockett. Brockett acknowledged that ranked choice voting was a key factor in his likely victory, differentiating it from a plurality winner system. RCV Overview Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) leads to confusion, disenfranchisement, and unfairly benefits left-wing candidates. It uses examples from various elections in the U.S. to argue against RCV.RCV as a Means to Left-Wing Power\- Instances where RCV affected election outcomes are highlighted, such as in Boulder, Colorado, where it helped a center-left candidate win.\- RCV is accused of leading to chaos, as seen in New York City’s 2021 election.RCV's Implementation Issues\- Errors and confusion in RCV implementation are cited, with examples like the Oakland School Board and Alameda County elections.\- Utah’s pilot program is mentioned as an example of RCV not delivering promised benefits.Reports and Studies on RCV\- A University of Minnesota report is referenced, claiming RCV fails to meet its proponents' promises.\- The report notes no significant change in voter turnout or diversity in elected officials with RCV.Voter Confusion and Disenfranchisement\- Examples from Oakland and Arlington, Virginia illustrate voter confusion and potential disenfranchisement.\- Low voter turnout, particularly among minority groups, is highlighted in Alaska’s 2022 general election.Opposition to RCV\- The D.C. Democrat party's rejection of RCV over concerns of disenfranchising minority voters is mentioned.\- Legal challenges to RCV are noted, arguing that it violates constitutional rights.Transparency and Majority Issues\- RCV is criticized for reducing transparency and complicating recounts.\- The concept of “ballot exhaustion” can prevent a true majority win.Specific Election Cases\- The role of RCV in Alaska and Maine elections is discussed, with emphasis on how it can alter expected outcomes.\- Cases where RCV led to unexpected winners are highlighted, questioning its effectiveness in reflecting majority preference. Overall, the text argues that RCV complicates the voting process, undermines traditional majority rule, and often benefits specific political groups at the expense of voter clarity and fairness. | | | PSA: We submitted a formal complaint to APOC (Alaska Political Office Commission) concerning the actions of the Pro-RCV group in Alaska. While they have accused us of breaching various State Campaign Finance Laws, we assert that this group should also adhere to the same rules and regulations. Contrary to their portrayal, this organization is not grassroots and receives substantial funding from outside of Alaska. Our objective is to hold them responsible for their apparent hypocrisy and their attempts to intimidate and tarnish the image of Alaskans, their organizations, and families. Their efforts to suppress our movement against ranked choice voting should not go unnoticed, and they must answer for potentially breaking the same laws they accuse us of. It's concerning that these well-informed political activists, who have benefited from massive out-of-state donations for their ranked choice voting agenda and campaign finance law changes, manipulate the system to their advantage, expecting regular citizens to falter and then overwhelm them with financial and legal burdens. We trust that the State of Alaska will ensure that these laws are applied uniformly, calling this Pro-RCV group to account for any disregard of Alaskan laws and norms. Please see the full 111 page complaint when it is made public by the news and APOC. All of this information is public information. | Message To Alaskans THANK YOU, OVER 400+ Petition Books Returned 400 Petition Books Returned So Far... 600+ Still in Circulation Mail your petition book after getting it notarized to:Phil Izon - 4201 Dimond Way Wasilla, AK 99654 - Call if you need helptel:+19078028116 Please continue to send your petition books in notarized. We will be in touch shortly to send out new books. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Emails Show Communications Between Biden Surgeon General and Facebook on Covid Censorship
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 14 pages of emails between U.S. Surgeon General Vivek Murthy and top Facebook executives in 2021 regarding the censorship of user posts about Covid controversies.

| | |

| | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 13, 2023

Justice Arthur Engoron issued an order canceling Trump’s certification to do business in New York. The order stripped Trump of control of the iconic Trump Tower; of a family estate and golf club in Westchester County; and of 40 Wall Street in Lower Manhattan, a lucrative commercial property. At times it seems as if the entire Trump family is on trial. Trump’s two adult sons, Don Jr. and Eric, were called to the stand by the prosecution last week; his daughter Ivanka is slated to testify this week. ### [Photos show ‘filth’ at illegal Chinese-owned California COVID lab: ‘Happening all over US’ ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65799&L=30476&F=H&&hash=fec2a9ed5f214349d8b59a1fb09ea798faf3400dc85f2283595b9b6a09281053) New York Post New photos show the “filth” and unsafe conditions in which an illegal Chinese-owned lab in California carried out risky research on mice genetically altered to carry COVID-19, according to records obtained by a conservative legal group.

The Fresno County Public Health Department revealed the “hazardous and non-compliant conditions” of the illicit lab, which kept SARS-CoV-2 and other “infectious agents.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65799&L=30476&F=H&&hash=fec2a9ed5f214349d8b59a1fb09ea798faf3400dc85f2283595b9b6a09281053)

### [Progressive City Plans to Hand Out ‘Guaranteed Incomes’ To Transgenders, Illegal Immigrants ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65799&L=30467&F=H&&hash=23e0de32e0eed6f11076921d46bdd7e9194f446b99f45e3882d3abd74cd8d15a) Townhall According to 1,719 pages of documents from the City of San Francisco, obtained by Judicial Watch, San Francisco will allocate tax dollars on a preferential basis for black and Latino transgender individuals through a program that offers financial assistance to transgender people, Fox News Digital reported:

The pilot program provides low-income transgender residents with payments of up to $1,200 each month for up to 18 months with the goal of providing “economically marginalized transgender people with unrestricted, monthly guaranteed income as a way to combat poverty.” It uses pre-paid debit cards due to participants potentially not having bank accounts. The amount someone can receive is capped at $4,000. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 14 pages of emails between U.S. Surgeon General Vivek Murthy and top Facebook executives in 2021 regarding the censorship of user posts about Covid controversies. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 13, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 14 pages of emails between U.S. Surgeon General Vivek Murthy and top Facebook executives in 2021 regarding the censorship of user posts about Covid controversies. The emails show Facebook leadership seeking to “better understand the scope of what the White House expects from us on misinformation going forward.” ---|--- | | | | | “The documents show that the Deep State was working hand-in-glove with social media companies to censor speech.” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “That it took a federal lawsuit to uncover this assault on the First Amendment speaks volumes about the Biden administration’s contempt for the rule of law.” ---|--- | | | | | On September 26, one week before the civil action was set to open at trial, the judge in the case delivered a surprise ruling. Justice Arthur Engoron issued an order canceling Trump’s certification to do business in New York. The order stripped Trump of control of the iconic Trump Tower; of a family estate and golf club in Westchester County; and of 40 Wall Street in Lower Manhattan, a lucrative commercial property. At times it seems as if the entire Trump family is on trial. Trump’s two adult sons, Don Jr. and Eric, were called to the stand by the prosecution last week; his daughter Ivanka is slated to testify this week. ---|--- | | | | | As part of the Biden administration’s governmentwide initiative to give criminals a second chance a federal agency plans to eliminate restrictions that prevent convicted felons from conducting investigations that often lead the Department of Justice (DOJ) to take legal action. It involves fair housing testers who help federal authorities gather evidence of bias and discrimination by going undercover in housing transactions that can expose wrongdoing. Technically, housing testers play a key role in government housing probes, and they are supposed to be carefully vetted. ---|--- | | | Hungarian Conservative This is a very schizophrenic situation: the Biden administration says all the right words and they even dispatched an aircraft carrier battle group, a huge navy force. But that’s largely a publicity stunt. That is not a real military threat to anyone. It’s just sort of a demonstration. But while they say things about protecting Israel, they’re frantically engaged in an effort to support Iran, who we know is trying to build a nuclear weapon. New York Post New photos show the “filth” and unsafe conditions in which an illegal Chinese-owned lab in California carried out risky research on mice genetically altered to carry COVID-19, according to records obtained by a conservative legal group. The Fresno County Public Health Department revealed the “hazardous and non-compliant conditions” of the illicit lab, which kept SARS-CoV-2 and other “infectious agents.” Townhall According to 1,719 pages of documents from the City of San Francisco, obtained by Judicial Watch, San Francisco will allocate tax dollars on a preferential basis for black and Latino transgender individuals through a program that offers financial assistance to transgender people, Fox News Digital reported: The pilot program provides low-income transgender residents with payments of up to $1,200 each month for up to 18 months with the goal of providing “economically marginalized transgender people with unrestricted, monthly guaranteed income as a way to combat poverty.” It uses pre-paid debit cards due to participants potentially not having bank accounts. The amount someone can receive is capped at $4,000. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

| | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc34e24ce07c427da1d483e6a459132f&_e=yQvRtO_SH-4t3NnSpgkKk80hO-qFP_Q9Ug01Ub7zNrWz0BNnq3JIcanbyb9n_ENHi9EoQSAtOfx6WN5yji1vG4ESl0EBUG-2fu7ZUZ1XKGpBWP5IkWesEXhTLTkXGC6Rzjx-zl6m0sCGra6Tdu9aFvR8ClWZNThoy1TStAKMn36FMaWw0r4y1kIrawcbEVtASIWmQ8oxBgGYRMYj5--Gm4eecKO7pHPR5PYd44aNU8RQP8giCMGkprgcLW1SIDszJujnrUI4YJqkOOds4n-n2FTnEnLb3dTu28CYDeSm_HRwdXe5THlTaFJxoc24gKbakLUIwNX3zBK_54vBiQ8QDVAAPI_6KlkU06toQDPIvf4LpjsC6lk1eqRVyWUJgdaK0YRN9-YrmZO-A4PcoQ05sj-Qswnfs0EMBV-36GZFPZA%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc34e24ce07c427da1d483e6a459132f&_e=yQvRtO_SH-4t3NnSpgkKk80hO-qFP_Q9Ug01Ub7zNrWz0BNnq3JIcanbyb9n_ENHi9EoQSAtOfx6WN5yji1vG4ESl0EBUG-2fu7ZUZ1XKGpBWP5IkWesEXhTLTkXGC6Rzjx-zl6m0sCGra6Tdu9aFvR8ClWZNThoy1TStAKMn36FMaWw0r4y1kIrawcbEVtASIWmQ8oxBgGYRMYj5--Gm4eecKO7pHPR5PYd44aNU8RQP8giCMGkprgcLW1SIDszuyTvcFfXNYqrVPeRKEIAZN3Fe2RVAYu83_oQRVXaSh_AxgLbDtUE4Z6LELRIpuVxHZ_caPfP42iqJXkrEIVed153stZ2JlivDnAVgypn8DM3rV3PBSawe1XCpUGA1UT0FgClrDQR_JeEU1nZPRQOWkKvFWg9yg5OdYjifBDp7gc%3D)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc34e24ce07c427da1d483e6a459132f&_e=yQvRtO_SH-4t3NnSpgkKk80hO-qFP_Q9Ug01Ub7zNrWz0BNnq3JIcanbyb9n_ENHi9EoQSAtOfx6WN5yji1vG4ESl0EBUG-2fu7ZUZ1XKGpBWP5IkWesEXhTLTkXGC6Rzjx-zl6m0sCGra6Tdu9aFvR8ClWZNThoy1TStAKMn36FMaWw0r4y1kIrawcbEVtASIWmQ8oxBgGYRMYj5--Gm4eecKO7pHPR5PYd44aNU8RQP8giCMGkprgcLW1SIDszBfxFZ1XO3OzGm5qQeqhjTFFo05Cdqgw31Aww2jGKXH8NcLQgfuxdjChuEM9Ao2cWP96jYYPn4hNQxOU7SGFoA1l3CrRwTE12h5FvDLQ0k2nt6BSs3CjqcmqQjVmBZsa-pYGVekgutOXbcbRyeODnuf0enB0HyCTTrfKxDGyHP3c%3D) [NO](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc34e24ce07c427da1d483e6a459132f&_e=yQvRtO_SH-4t3NnSpgkKk80hO-qFP_Q9Ug01Ub7zNrWz0BNnq3JIcanbyb9n_ENHi9EoQSAtOfx6WN5yji1vG4ESl0EBUG-2fu7ZUZ1XKGpBWP5IkWesEXhTLTkXGC6Rzjx-zl6m0sCGra6Tdu9aFvR8ClWZNThoy1TStAKMn36FMaWw0r4y1kIrawcbEVtASIWmQ8oxBgGYRMYj5--Gm4eecKO7pHPR5PYd44aNU8RQP8giCMGkprgcLW1SIDszt2h_HGsK33EERYwS52Hs3PCVN7ggQYwfXLH80-46IbZLA4WcZTZz5LnYmcoi3I5V74tVyfnW1Jh6ftGfN4gPXASb5WzxhoyISE9tfU1pV4AxZEy8GjvJsDgiFh8nCeH9UzkEAinEWM2GH5X0SQPmlJcjBhVkoFJSKFH2MxwPkaE%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc34e24ce07c427da1d483e6a459132f&_e=yQvRtO_SH-4t3NnSpgkKk80hO-qFP_Q9Ug01Ub7zNrWz0BNnq3JIcanbyb9n_ENHi9EoQSAtOfx6WN5yji1vG4ESl0EBUG-2fu7ZUZ1XKGpBWP5IkWesEXhTLTkXGC6Rzjx-zl6m0sCGra6Tdu9aFvR8ClWZNThoy1TStAKMn36FMaWw0r4y1kIrawcbEVtASIWmQ8oxBgGYRMYj5--Gm4eecKO7pHPR5PYd44aNU8RQP8giCMGkprgcLW1SIDszRIxl87sdUg0LTvJaDm_t85hVYafJUU5NRfCBzcAvZosq4Ndau-cpJ1yKNE5zmCoBUBoQNms-5ae9OX0iQeOP-CHEhdq4R4vR16_LW6A1-jnzm78I0ieYORT9ZcvRlal0QfvrCFrwMnNqybOq0bHxjiwSACsppXUO5fZ-08bFSk0%3D)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government? For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Friend, I have to be honest: **we’ve seen a slight dip in our grassroots fundraising over the last few weeks.** Considering many folks are gearing up for the holidays, spending time with family and friends, and taking time away from political news, this isn't very surprising. **But here’s the issue:** Republicans know this too, and they know that the path to holding onto the House majority requires flipping seats like mine in 2024, so they’re working overtime to pour money into this race and attack me. **And here’s the good news:** Our grassroots team is no stranger to tough fights. Last year, we ran a strong campaign all the way to Election Day, electing me as the first woman to represent IL-13 and flipping this seat blue for the first time in decades. **This didn’t happen overnight, friends.** Thousands of grassroots supporters pitched in every month to help power us over the finish line, and I know we can do it again if we start working together now to prepare for the obstacles we’ll face down the road. **[Before our final mid-quarter fundraising deadline of the year expires on Wednesday, can we count on you to chip in $20 or whatever you can to help get my reelection campaign back on track?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73302547/438048530/398268834?amount=20&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20231113_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWY2YmQzYy01ZjgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwt3iP-4qZmasbjE7G8nv0N-ZGzFY76bRg8dx-MPNDE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73302548/438048533/2093963021?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20231113_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWY2YmQzYy01ZjgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwt3iP-4qZmasbjE7G8nv0N-ZGzFY76bRg8dx-MPNDE=) | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73302550/438048535/-407522354?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20231113_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWY2YmQzYy01ZjgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwt3iP-4qZmasbjE7G8nv0N-ZGzFY76bRg8dx-MPNDE=)

Friend, Jim Jordan honestly might be more shameless than even Donald Trump. Fresh off his embarrassing and very public failure to claim the Speaker’s gavel, Jordan is back at his old antics as Chairman of the Judiciary Committee—this time holding a hearing about antisemitism on college campuses, as his Fox News handlers instructed him to do. This is a crucial time in American history. We must stand up, speak out, and shut down all antisemitism. **And again, my friend Eric Swalwell came ready to beat back Jordan’s hypocritical nonsense—and as usual, he brought receipts.**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73302430/438048401/1649708063?refcode=kanyeNGP_photo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjFmNmJkM2MtNWY4Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xVevn1V87fqbIT6sZ5M57PP8nrxiBnrulqFzOkBtl7U=)

_(Left) Eric Swallwell displays a tweet sent out by the Chair of the House Judiciary Committee Congressman Jim Jordan endorsing Kanye West. (Right) One of Kanye West's egregious anti-semetic remarks threatening the Jewish community. _
---

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: I’m humbly asking for your endorsement
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73302589/438048581/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmY2YmQzYy01ZjgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N9DA74WRaxh3dthovns4k0gJDFFtEGiJuTIB_ZwktTo=&emci=3eabdc35-237f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=aff6bd3c-5f82-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek,

I’m proud of the many hats I’ve worn: a third-generation military veteran, an engineer, an entrepreneur, a high school chemistry teacher, and a nonprofit leader. **But more than any other, I’m proud of the time that I’ve served as your****representative to Congress. **

By sticking to the facts and collaborating with colleagues on both sides of the aisle, I’ve been able to secure investments in our local economy, stand up for women’s reproductive rights, protect veterans’ healthcare in our region, and fight back against extremism. We’ve also helped constituents resolve frustrating issues with the IRS and passports, track down lost mail, and get home after being stuck overseas.

But as a representative, I get put to the test every two years at the ballot box – and with my seat up for grabs, **Republicans are looking for any chance they can to undo all of the work we’ve done together in this grassroots movement.**

**We****can’t let misinformation and extremism win – [_but I really want to know you’re standing with me. Will you please take a moment to endorse me as your representative for 2024? Please, don’t wait: I’m hoping for 2,500 responses to stay on track._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73302591/438048584/-1249777823?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk906-su-nd&sustainers=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmY2YmQzYy01ZjgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N9DA74WRaxh3dthovns4k0gJDFFtEGiJuTIB_ZwktTo=&emci=3eabdc35-237f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=aff6bd3c-5f82-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=21278485)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73302592/438048586/-1249777823?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk906-su-nd&sustainers=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmY2YmQzYy01ZjgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N9DA74WRaxh3dthovns4k0gJDFFtEGiJuTIB_ZwktTo=&emci=3eabdc35-237f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=aff6bd3c-5f82-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=21278485)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: At the end of the week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
MAGA Republicans don’t mind imposing pain on American families with a shutdown.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1815%2E4032634%2EMyPhI0)
---
Unless MAGA House Republicans get their act together, the federal government is set to shut down at the end of the week. Tick, tock. How did we get here? Well, they passed a short-term extension after the last near-shutdown. Then they spent about half the time they bought bickering about who’d be their next speaker. And they’ve been too busy playing political theater to come to the table with a plan that can actually keep the government open. Let’s not forget: in their view, causing chaos is good because it could help put Donald Trump back in the White House. So they don’t mind imposing pain on American families. And it shows. In the year since the GOP took over the House, they’ve nearly shut down the government once already and nearly crashed the global economy by defaulting on the national debt. When Democrats had control of both houses of Congress, we capped the cost of insulin for seniors, invested in fighting the climate crisis, put a minimum tax on massive corporate profits, and more. While Republicans keep pushing tax breaks for the wealthy and devastating cuts to critical programs, the Biden-Harris administration and Democrats in Congress will keep working to deliver results. I will do everything in my power to keep our government up and running and put Washington squarely on the side of working people. And I’m grateful to fight by your side. [**If it makes sense for you right now, please make a donation of $28 or any amount to help support our re-election campaign, kick Republican extremists out of power, and make our government work for families, not just the rich and powerful.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/979?amount=28&t=8&akid=1815%2E4032634%2EMyPhI0) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---

---

subject: What I can tell you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Hey Peter, it's John.
**The GOP’s road to winning back the Senate runs right through PA.** In 2022, I had one of the toughest Senate races in the country — and now, CNN ranks PA the #4 most likely Senate seat to flip next year. 😱
That means my friend Bob Casey could be facing hundreds of million$ from Mitch McConnell and the GOP’s shadiest billionaires spent to take him down.
I know this team has Bob’s back, just how the people of Pennsylvania had mine in 2022. I don’t need to tell you that the stakes are high. I think everyone reading this knows how *crucial* defending PA’s Senate seat is.
What I CAN tell you is how to have a *direct* impact on Bob’s chances of winning.
**[If you chip in any amount — even just a few bucks — it will help Bob stay on track and fight back against the GOP’s dark money.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231113-2?refcode=em20231113-2&refcode2=1126_552475_TXFuwD&akid=1126%2E552475%2ETXFuwD)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231113-2?refcode=em20231113-2&refcode2=1126_552475_TXFuwD&akid=1126%2E552475%2ETXFuwD)**
I need Bob fighting right alongside me in the Senate — so please, please, please **[chip in to power his campaign if you can](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231113-2?refcode=em20231113-2&refcode2=1126_552475_TXFuwD&akid=1126%2E552475%2ETXFuwD)**!
Thanks for your support!!!
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: It’s Official—I’m on the Ballot for 2024!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
This weekend, I filed the paperwork for re-election to continue serving the people of Texas’ Seventh Congressional District. That means it’s official—my name will be on the 2024 ballot!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231113?refcode=lpfe231113 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231113?refcode=lpfe231113]
In 2018, we built a broad and diverse coalition together to bring a little more Houston to Washington, D.C. As the first Democrat in more than 50 years, and the first woman ever, to represent Texas’ Seventh Congressional District, I am proud to work with partners across our cities, counties, state, and country to make meaningful progress and to protect our democracy. I am honored to have the support of so many community leaders and organizations who have already endorsed my re-election.
I will continue to bring people together to do the critical work ahead to defend our democracy, ensure equality, and restore our rights, all of which are on the ballot in 2024.
RE-ELECT LIZZIE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231113?refcode=lpfe231113]
Contributions of all kinds matter—from sending postcards and making phone calls to contributing money to help us get the message out. These contributions are all essential to winning. And that’s what we do on #TeamLizzie.
Today, I’d be thrilled if you could make a contribution of $20.24 to mark the moment and prepare for the work ahead. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231113?refcode=lpfe231113&amount=20.24]
It’s all on the line in 2024. Let’s get to work!
Together, we can do anything,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231113?refcode=lpfe231113]

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84aff679df7746b887e9e969c91be948&_e=XaRIk0Eb_0Ef7W5EKEvDPjKtdC88knPsHOgtOgwYwCbfBsvTU_36Pe4oA2hZ1p2NoOVT5vh7FOFg86OxPps9-KqoEvRlM_KT6KjjEwycTcQM8p8BVq-0i5NOlEVrO44l1WP-SLwybhFXb9cOwtDaco3v94q-zUInKlI_oq1ZxR6bIpzldP0RDaYA5T-KdH2oT-uaXDlMeNZj_VAm-2ZupimfDtBsUtlnNTomEllH6OBMz1RS8uOYrNQnZVNq0cp8uZDW1aCfBvegzSkyoZGvC7wskF129dx1oQzXKWjO0gn9Wvv18r6agyQOUgNU8MV5uLwI6zjRUBa1miy5BHzRt2mLqbftmdocc_gQUuuHtnhMh5xJtfDpqVekvJ0xPipCu8zjbYZgXcYmttQkYGktrjfdmka3SkU_OKbYeN26UvIBquDIVJjSyCb9oB9_bs3K)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84aff679df7746b887e9e969c91be948&_e=XaRIk0Eb_0Ef7W5EKEvDPjKtdC88knPsHOgtOgwYwCbfBsvTU_36Pe4oA2hZ1p2NoOVT5vh7FOFg86OxPps9-KqoEvRlM_KT6KjjEwycTcQM8p8BVq-0i5NOlEVrO44l1WP-SLwybhFXb9cOwtDaco3v94q-zUInKlI_oq1ZxR6bIpzldP0RDaYA5T-KdH2oT-uaXDlMeNZj_VAm-2ZupimfDtBsUtlnNTomEllH6OBMz1RS8uOYrNQnZVNq0cp8uZDW1aCfBvegzSkyoZGvC8u24ltkaORrUG8bm-mlEet7L0TL49fpE-bOXdE_Uyi5g862CW_85ZH4VhHAemnp8d0zqeFli_jCAGZfQ7iTCA74-W--7g_BH9FFGpzWp7F3RQvOQj8_saJQLdmOhESzoiaVaMc_N_ZFfoovT6v0lqfdDm3aok0iyauft5LzAoNB)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84aff679df7746b887e9e969c91be948&_e=XaRIk0Eb_0Ef7W5EKEvDPjKtdC88knPsHOgtOgwYwCbfBsvTU_36Pe4oA2hZ1p2NoOVT5vh7FOFg86OxPps9-KqoEvRlM_KT6KjjEwycTcQM8p8BVq-0i5NOlEVrO44l1WP-SLwybhFXb9cOwtDaco3v94q-zUInKlI_oq1ZxR6bIpzldP0RDaYA5T-KdH2oT-uaXDlMeNZj_VAm-2ZupimfDtBsUtlnNTomEllH6OBMz1RS8uOYrNQnZVNq0cp8uZDW1aCfBvegzSkyoZGvC3cduyuY_pV8fMz0mfL96tFXlxpjm-V77-NZtC5tQuVQr-B1JDkE8x60ik0tJ2nBpZfRdP0wTLyXIKcuyqJDaV4CQJimUYjcSKUa_ijm9IUeFSnry90bd9-z19SqfFIb9M-RS7r2POSRwnIXQwQ4ySKpSMyr6QxmsMtys18NIKn3)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84aff679df7746b887e9e969c91be948&_e=XaRIk0Eb_0Ef7W5EKEvDPjKtdC88knPsHOgtOgwYwCbfBsvTU_36Pe4oA2hZ1p2NoOVT5vh7FOFg86OxPps9-KqoEvRlM_KT6KjjEwycTcQM8p8BVq-0i5NOlEVrO44l1WP-SLwybhFXb9cOwtDaco3v94q-zUInKlI_oq1ZxR6bIpzldP0RDaYA5T-KdH2oT-uaXDlMeNZj_VAm-2ZupimfDtBsUtlnNTomEllH6OBMz1RS8uOYrNQnZVNq0cp8uZDW1aCfBvegzSkyoZGvC6LvUt8yx4XlEJroqSfYl9Yh0nsYSdCuNFDoGiL2Xh2P_BpKJ8B8CTbpKZLw4Da0Ox9Dl9qPHJAUQBDPN1KeIgcPHkp5mVnFxaKhOS_lNfDojJ-RdFNh4m5FcNwCcWXtynrPhVio0fdol_f_DjGUyIz6644G5rLklBOf9FkcHsUh).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Freedom Nation Today
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=84aff679df7746b887e9e969c91be948&_t=ia-GNE9DhLFeeZoFIls68ts7FEdSJE_JjJTq1vIYTGpnELGX7dSpSs2jg6LS6PDtg6lK6CtyUaBFL_oCfCBapdsgd3HbB-pu5op4d39TDMlXsQnhuZy0japR2WiwG_6YKhfhMYHFBI57bZQJpQ8L1HDoMSBS0J9sbXqoY_V6w4s%3D)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Sign The Petition: Your voice could help SAVE gray wolves from extinction
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2116258?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **BLOOD across the forest floor. MANGLED limbs from sharp metal leg traps. SUFFOCATED by neck snares. SHOT to death by piercing bullets.** These are only a few horrific ways innocent gray wolves and pups are being **brutally hunted and murdered.** The death of a mother wolf can push the death toll up for these precious animals. Vulnerable young wolf pups are left to suffer and DIE from **_HYPOTHERMIA, STARVATION or PREDATION_ **without their mama wolf present to feed and protect them. In the surrounding regions of Yellowstone National Park, surviving as a gray wolf is unimaginable and deadly due to ruthless trophy hunters who are**_SLAUGHTERING_ **these iconic canines for sport. They find murdering wolves exhilarating — **luring them with bait and then using weapons like crossbows, shotguns, and rifles to kill them.**_They are even DYNAMITING nursing wolf mothers and pups in their dens! _ **_Please Friend, if we do not ACT NOW, our beloved gray wolves will only continue to suffer cruel deaths and could soon diminish to complete EXTINCTION._[We urgently need your help to SAVE these iconic creatures from vicious trophy hunters. Add your name now to DEMAND stronger federal protections for gray wolves! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2116259?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2116260?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
If you’re as upset reading this as we are, then you must agree that hunting innocent gray wolves for sport using inhumane killing methods should be against the law. But in several states, including those bordering Yellowstone, it’s **completely LEGAL** for trophy hunters to _**violently massacre**_ these iconic animals without mercy.
Gray wolves are easily one of North America’s most treasured animals. We cannot allow cruel trophy hunters to wipe out these beloved canines. Saving gray wolves means __**EXPANDING and STRENGTHENING ESA protections**__. Every moment of inaction could mean another defenseless wolf pup suffering needlessly at the hands of ruthless trophy hunters.
[**Can innocent gray wolves count on you to speak up for them today, Friend? Sign our petition before 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to urge the Biden Administration to uphold Endangered Species Act protections for gray wolves before it’s too late >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2116261?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | BLOOD across the forest floor. MANGLED limbs from sharp metal leg traps. SUFFOCATED by neck snares. SHOT to death by piercing bullets. These are only a few horrific ways innocent gray wolves and pups are being brutally hunted and murdered. The death of a mother wolf can push the death toll up for these precious animals. Vulnerable young wolf pups are left to suffer and DIE from HYPOTHERMIA, STARVATION or PREDATION without their mama wolf present to feed and protect them. In the surrounding regions of Yellowstone National Park, surviving as a gray wolf is unimaginable and deadly due to ruthless trophy hunters who areSLAUGHTERING these iconic canines for sport. They find murdering wolves exhilarating — luring them with bait and then using weapons like crossbows, shotguns, and rifles to kill them.They are even DYNAMITING nursing wolf mothers and pups in their dens! Please Friend, if we do not ACT NOW, our beloved gray wolves will only continue to suffer cruel deaths and could soon diminish to complete EXTINCTION.== | == If you’re as upset reading this as we are, then you must agree that hunting innocent gray wolves for sport using inhumane killing methods should be against the law. But in several states, including those bordering Yellowstone, it’s completely LEGAL for trophy hunters to violently massacre these iconic animals without mercy. Gray wolves are easily one of North America’s most treasured animals. We cannot allow cruel trophy hunters to wipe out these beloved canines. Saving gray wolves means EXPANDING and STRENGTHENING ESA protections. Every moment of inaction could mean another defenseless wolf pup suffering needlessly at the hands of ruthless trophy hunters. == == Thanks for being a voice for gray wolves, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

Fellow American,

We are closer to World War III than we have ever been before. The Neocons and war hawks are pushing for more and more global intervention when we haven’t even learned from the mistakes of our past yet.

Establishment Republicans and Democrat cronies racked up $7 trillion in national debt to send America’s sons and daughters to fight pointless wars in the Middle East that hurt America.

_**Now,**_ we have a new wave of Establishment hacks beating the drum and war mongering for their own shameless profit. [**It’s time to say No to Neocons and keep America out of war.**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=e29e1af334564992a68367e5d8b2d61a&_e=RGGDWnPj48sxMIUdecawzav1cx4mZLKoC4ZGJn3uAEhP-IP8YTmBPb5fsJzzEzrghmg9Tju7MaoGdxrx3DdYXH9FycBxE801AFDDicOP2oPbfALFEDq0d9x6AElRmmxjHHHCrz6ccGLttcntYU_y8YB8GFJhW9cX7JgXqthEOgAz7wjMbjYIGflAfJYScRIe7LHsw2eBh6VqBn8EMTOu_kHp_6nBCPIswAd-tuBLLl1bl-gSowPGf3_7DtGUxDaqMAQPsWHoXqyM5hIZQRt9Yg0pEsbOFD4QsChplbqOMWmKtBKwgURoyml-qNfv5HyvughiuwRr3yvQs0GR9kcvWIHN9IHh7X11qzJ1GK9RRhiT0SENPrPFPFmBuW1nS6zJHuonCVcnIAyWgTLzFnkR7w%3D%3D)

| [** NO TO NEOCONS **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=e29e1af334564992a68367e5d8b2d61a&_e=RGGDWnPj48sxMIUdecawzav1cx4mZLKoC4ZGJn3uAEhP-IP8YTmBPb5fsJzzEzrghmg9Tju7MaoGdxrx3DdYXH9FycBxE801AFDDicOP2oPbfALFEDq0d9x6AElRmmxjHHHCrz6ccGLttcntYU_y8YB8GFJhW9cX7JgXqthEOgAz7wjMbjYIGflAfJYScRIe7LHsw2eBh6VqBn8EMTOu_kHp_6nBCPIswAd-tuBLLl1bl-gSowPGf3_7DtGUxDaqGHLAurGVDbYBxYaqIctfFV7GRuuDExhDHWfzfQTeIp-6sWb4_i0TB2RdiUHtGHylEGPAxCwAat1rdVtnBbBZuJPGm_j9HisSk-80mzC4vvnT6KRiKbIDbvj1zrOteeoAYQIhMVTxln_7RZ7WSKkLJw%3D%3D)

Neocon ideology cost the US trillions and killed millions in pointless wars that didn’t advance our interests. There is another way, a realist foreign policy.

**1\. Avoiding WW3 is a vital national objective
2\. Declare independence from Communist China
3\. Defend the American homeland: nuclear missile, super EMP, cyber & space defense capabilities.**

_**Now,**_ is the moment for freedom-loving American patriots everywhere to stand up and take back the country we love from a corrupt group of politicians who are marching us toward World War III. [**Peace isn’t a passive movement though.**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=e29e1af334564992a68367e5d8b2d61a&_e=RGGDWnPj48sxMIUdecawzav1cx4mZLKoC4ZGJn3uAEhP-IP8YTmBPb5fsJzzEzrghmg9Tju7MaoGdxrx3DdYXH9FycBxE801AFDDicOP2oPbfALFEDq0d9x6AElRmmxjHHHCrz6ccGLttcntYU_y8YB8GFJhW9cX7JgXqthEOgAz7wjMbjYIGflAfJYScRIe7LHsw2eBh6VqBn8EMTOu_kHp_6nBCPIswAd-tuBLLl1bl-gSowPGf3_7DtGUxDaqNZvozFQ3EyXVThQPtSPd1zwRIptE3xltCtjRu4exCRkiPPZ3_vMmkquUndv--cvxUXJAx4amMlgbOO_90W6-93h1n2lOcVEku6M4yu1UjtNcLmnjGm5q9sxPtL0mN7J5AiG5j_tf8VVDhqgil8i5oQ%3D%3D)

We need the **TRUTH** on Ukraine spending and to find out who is profiting from efforts to keep sending billions of taxpayer dollars overseas. We need to let the world know that the US-Israel relationship will be deeper and stronger than ever because it won’t be a client relationship, it will be a true partnership. We need to sensibly decouple from Communist China and independently strengthen the American economy, energy, and technology again.

[**Fellow American, that’s not anti-Israel. That’s not anti-Ukraine. It’s pro-America.**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=e29e1af334564992a68367e5d8b2d61a&_e=RGGDWnPj48sxMIUdecawzav1cx4mZLKoC4ZGJn3uAEhP-IP8YTmBPb5fsJzzEzrghmg9Tju7MaoGdxrx3DdYXH9FycBxE801AFDDicOP2oPbfALFEDq0d9x6AElRmmxjHHHCrz6ccGLttcntYU_y8YB8GFJhW9cX7JgXqthEOgAz7wjMbjYIGflAfJYScRIe7LHsw2eBh6VqBn8EMTOu_kHp_6nBCPIswAd-tuBLLl1bl-gSowPGf3_7DtGUxDaqmVm44sv6aeIX5wozv5RupVWRyu3tv-pWRh65mjvfqD-8nALkQ-abffVGjAB9obDPh2lBRMb--xEI01VgetcHclqkFCFsSWLJZOdCrAHEDYEpDpFeVMe0p0mLowhh_Mce5IFy-ovqHYh8EBNh-Esy2g%3D%3D)

If you’re ready to break away from the Establishment hacks who want another 20 years of American lives serving on the line, [**stand with me today.**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=e29e1af334564992a68367e5d8b2d61a&_e=RGGDWnPj48sxMIUdecawzav1cx4mZLKoC4ZGJn3uAEhP-IP8YTmBPb5fsJzzEzrghmg9Tju7MaoGdxrx3DdYXH9FycBxE801AFDDicOP2oPbfALFEDq0d9x6AElRmmxjHHHCrz6ccGLttcntYU_y8YB8GFJhW9cX7JgXqthEOgAz7wjMbjYIGflAfJYScRIe7LHsw2eBh6VqBn8EMTOu_kHp_6nBCPIswAd-tuBLLl1bl-gSowPGf3_7DtGUxDaqCVcNjckhs9xlrYXfAI3iTV_dHRo_zHyWsFt4UNBAlt8ujH3FJGjzWKYr9P7Wy03zdVK8QT3DV-H8F64dnzYzyyf8RTe9yPdDJc-Li_RxnzlUWNRVqd4JaHJkW46UYGVElzvGNElP0pZhQwvUdFFCtA%3D%3D)

For America,

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=e29e1af334564992a68367e5d8b2d61a&_e=RGGDWnPj48sxMIUdecawzav1cx4mZLKoC4ZGJn3uAEhP-IP8YTmBPb5fsJzzEzrghmg9Tju7MaoGdxrx3DdYXH9FycBxE801AFDDicOP2oPbfALFEDq0d9x6AElRmmxjHHHCrz6ccGLttcntYU_y8YB8GFJhW9cX7JgXqthEOgAz7wjMbjYIGflAfJYScRIe7LHsw2eBh6VqBn8EMTOu_kHp_6nBCPIswAd-tuBLLl1bl-gSowPGf3_7DtGUxDaqa_SDRTsBVayjvrXdt5AIBzmGNKtFkKFw1aRzJtp_BraJQv5Rv2uZQiGlp0_HAOO8-mCNX7z9WA_MWebGWKqqi91ksJAbaacqH3D3_TCPtaNpdNTltJPNoSdHDn_pCC5voT6iDJ67QL70KAm68uzyoQ%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** PEACE THROUGH TRUTH **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=e29e1af334564992a68367e5d8b2d61a&_e=RGGDWnPj48sxMIUdecawzav1cx4mZLKoC4ZGJn3uAEhP-IP8YTmBPb5fsJzzEzrghmg9Tju7MaoGdxrx3DdYXH9FycBxE801AFDDicOP2oPbfALFEDq0d9x6AElRmmxjHHHCrz6ccGLttcntYU_y8YB8GFJhW9cX7JgXqthEOgAz7wjMbjYIGflAfJYScRIe7LHsw2eBh6VqBn8EMTOu_kHp_6nBCPIswAd-tuBLLl1bl-gSowPGf3_7DtGUxDaqbhfu8P88-Xj0Av1U8I24i6OcCmRxzWQJ1deGmwWk5l1WOmp2wB5Sr583qRXMTn1ukj-r3I0hEbJWAU0U-5SOeW53TkP6C1iZ-mvBdh7cUYQdXmDhVW6q-OxfgHwXEACMTCyY24fnL7cXqL5knCmPxw%3D%3D)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=e29e1af334564992a68367e5d8b2d61a&_e=RGGDWnPj48sxMIUdecawzav1cx4mZLKoC4ZGJn3uAEhP-IP8YTmBPb5fsJzzEzrghmg9Tju7MaoGdxrx3DdYXH9FycBxE801AFDDicOP2oPbfALFEDq0d9x6AElRmmxjHHHCrz6ccGLttcntYU_y8YB8GFJhW9cX7JgXqthEOgAz7wjMbjYIGflAfJYScRIe7LHsw2eBh6VqBn8EMTOu_kHp_6nBCPIswAd-tuBLLl1bl-gSowPGf3_7DtGUxDaqJtRQ8ggZKlzPqBTt-_ihlOaiV1wSRAGa8tuyiSJzN2z3PKDFwNsKRBXhNPNOV0uS8k4HaxzoScYWVPAMIBu_jHQotO74E-B6scOu2WUnKqaCq5Edo3U2v8FoLqVT0HapAkmp4ihW2o4AtECzG_c1cg%3D%3D)

Peter - We need to support our working and middle class. And, we do that by supporting our labor unions. The labor movement in the United States grew out of the need to protect the common interest of workers. **And, in a time of one of the greatest periods of income inequality** —**that fight continues today.** **We're proud to announce that the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW) has contributed to our campaign the financial resources we need to oust Rep. Bergman, who cares more about special interests than our workers here at home.** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73305220/438058106/-1758524140?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20231113_fr_IBEW_team_kw_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzcyY2E3ZTEtNjc4Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZRrcFmNx8grCTB5TY0Phgi0LqT2X13x-8Zgxj8mhq78=)

_Callie stands alongside members of Local 906, Local 692, Local 498, and Local 876._

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.
My fellow Americans – this is Mike Johnson.
| |

---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=0341d37aad49446692bde7144538c8b9&_t=KI3qi6vo3P8xwuPozW3AwbCLzPLJFDBo2JNrT4sisYEMqf9_79dXqDYQ54zIK6MEpb_i-J1cXh4J6YyrCZiFHcB5l6tqSSKOfYBxahEaUqw%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=0341d37aad49446692bde7144538c8b9&_t=KI3qi6vo3P8xwuPozW3AwbCLzPLJFDBo2JNrT4sisYEMqf9_79dXqDYQ54zIK6MEpb_i-J1cXh4J6YyrCZiFHcB5l6tqSSKOfYBxahEaUqw%3D)

| My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0341d37aad49446692bde7144538c8b9&_e=OnkI1HBeHi2XVZyRNre1qqY_Xqwz8lntB-baNmyWJjNX8aDvNgPcKeCd5YVkAwGVBOKWxNFTfOeFj2lOh_2SN5lI5BWORoQCeF11J1Sm0uWZELsWGZDjE8U_Qmo69WdOSnM9i0VWh50DJXyEaAhhKOP_BSAo1TVs0BcLupGRHX8NQSmMmU8xz2zPzomUKzxaPivtjz6VJPObMWFBQwCJQ-by_ZgUmov0HR5yIspT8YPFpCVItIXhFnD55XZSh8I-r8VKl3nPbkL7BCfQQsvkwXmcxUvnqgOnXVZ01vNZ5kE2S0Hjznz4evN_ibDGyQoLc5ZdyTDvGY6HgQpjqA0bYITN0lhjaLZxUd9xSwUrA3CrU1XVBNuYYha-dYC1QHR2rL8YmK7tbezQai39uDa5gXy2p0G62iS7d5dkueMg9q4%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0341d37aad49446692bde7144538c8b9&_e=OnkI1HBeHi2XVZyRNre1qqY_Xqwz8lntB-baNmyWJjNX8aDvNgPcKeCd5YVkAwGVBOKWxNFTfOeFj2lOh_2SN5lI5BWORoQCeF11J1Sm0uWZELsWGZDjE8U_Qmo69WdOSnM9i0VWh50DJXyEaAhhKOP_BSAo1TVs0BcLupGRHX8NQSmMmU8xz2zPzomUKzxaPivtjz6VJPObMWFBQwCJQ-by_ZgUmov0HR5yIspT8YPFpCVItIXhFnD55XZSh8I-ID3ue0BA-9SvQdIMPB3E1FIVpvJTiXNXxzmdSXulia7PdI4Se7WvcYjw1SfjcgF7LZuJViR-ughe-eXtgaPDTCxqx58NGk7UrKzGG_Sh_1BBaGYUBubCD7PrQB197yfLyrzO1S49PfFzaMof6ynEKfwlXTk6zE_av6yIfoyhSzw%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0341d37aad49446692bde7144538c8b9&_e=OnkI1HBeHi2XVZyRNre1qqY_Xqwz8lntB-baNmyWJjNX8aDvNgPcKeCd5YVkAwGVBOKWxNFTfOeFj2lOh_2SN5lI5BWORoQCeF11J1Sm0uWZELsWGZDjE8U_Qmo69WdOSnM9i0VWh50DJXyEaAhhKOP_BSAo1TVs0BcLupGRHX8NQSmMmU8xz2zPzomUKzxaPivtjz6VJPObMWFBQwCJQ-by_ZgUmov0HR5yIspT8YPFpCVItIXhFnD55XZSh8I-2hh8RJy1wpOmXMmuLdRapWKxGDd5-jppAONJIHF4A4kBKQMse0VyW_2xIfdXPussRzmQwMbLpx0mR8T2k9hnAiLQxERs0cEXg1vCmqWiKTj0vWs-oov33Rv8uZeS5kprZxzxqss3bk1WEcfDGP7GRQEeXRkmpzyRHv1n_t_da4I%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?

Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,
Speaker Mike Johnson
