clean_body: This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish. My fellow Americans – this is Mike Johnson. | | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish." Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me. The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC. Politico fired off this headline: " Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson." And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports. Look: These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not really the goal... The real goal of this political ambush is two-fold: 1) smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and 2) scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats. It 's about power and money. Nothing else. That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country. If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority. So here's my final pitch to you: We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now. The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this. Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | "Speaker Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY" at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | "START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY >>" | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. You can donate via mail by sending a check to: 320 First Street SE 2nd Floor Washington, DC 20003

Friend,
---
With Election Day less than one year away, our race is in full swing.
---
Dark money left-wing groups have run five TV attack ads in Milwaukee already this year.
---
They have made false claims about cutting social security, gas prices, prescription drugs, and attacked me for supporting Speaker Johnson.
---
Needless to say, I’m one of their top targets in 2024.
---
And for us to be ready to go blow for blow with them, we are starting our GOTV Fund early to ensure we start 2024 off on the right foot.
---

clean_body: We’re launching our Get Out The Vote Fund now to stay ahead. | Friend, With Election Day less than one year away, our race is in full swing. Dark money left-wing groups have run five TV attack ads in Milwaukee already this year. They have made false claims about cutting social security, gas prices, prescription drugs, and attacked me for supporting Speaker Johnson. Needless to say, I’m one of their top targets in 2024. And for us to be ready to go blow for blow with them, we are starting our GOTV Fund early to ensure we start 2024 off on the right foot. Thank you, Rep. Bryan Steil PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC 1818 MILTON AVE. #1448 JANESVILLE, WI 53545

name: Andy's Fight
subject: Urgent: Join the Fight to Hold Social Media Accountable!
body:
|

|

|

Dear Friend,

I’m sure you’ve heard of my unwavering commitment to combat the injurious effects of what I call the confluence of "Guns & Google" ( https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/29628?id=65063.37.1.e19356676431cfddb24b35f5d4ef1751 ). I'm excited to announce that Senator Mark Warner has become a powerful ally in this fight. He has sent a demand letter ( https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/29628?id=65063.38.1.c85c8f804620554964dd4ec0198166ca ) to the Federal Trade Commission on my behalf and for the countless others who have suffered due to Google and Meta.

In his words:

"It has been over three years since Mr. Parker and the Georgetown University Law Clinic filed their first complaint regarding this case, and Mr. Parker continues to endure harassment as a result of the videos remaining on these platforms. Given the practices outlined above, I ask that your agency consider all possible avenues to ensure that companies like Google and Meta uphold their Terms of Service, not only in Mr. Parker’s case but also in other instances where their platforms may host violent and harmful content."

In my recent Substack essay ( https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/29628?id=65063.39.1.374f1b18aff9da56496eadcf167c263e ) I provide a primer on Section 230, the culprit that allows these platforms to get away this abuse. This struggle is reminiscent of a modern-day David vs. Goliath battle, where my aim is to hold Google, Meta, and Twitter (X) accountable for their dangerous and disgraceful behavior. As history has shown, sometimes David does emerge victorious. Senator Warner's assistance marks a significant first step, but it's clear that a sustained lobbying effort is required to achieve our ultimate goals. We have the means in Warner’s SAFE TECH bill ( https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/29628?id=65063.40.1.78f2021b50a8b1862246c7d6b1779249 ), and I am engaged in a bipartisan effort to secure its passage.

|

|

|

|

|

|

It's been over eight years since my daughter Alison was tragically gunned down on live television and knowing that videos of her death can still be found on social media platforms is gut-wrenching. Countless others endure the same pain because of what has happened to their loved ones.

Today, I‘m asking you to take that extra step and support my lobbying efforts through a contribution ( https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/29628?id=65063.41.1.a84b7b570e24a9af9868a47d263badee ) to the Andy’s Fight ( https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/29628?id=65063.42.1.374131c3c686fd27f1c7090f74532d53 ) 501(c)(4). Once SAFE TECH becomes law, we can shift our full attention to passing common-sense gun legislation, such as universal background checks and bans on assault-style weapons and high-capacity magazines.

Help me cross the finish line. For your family. For Alison.

With profound gratitude,

Andy

|

|

|

->

( https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/29628?id=65063.43.1.7746b4881b9f97ec32a75500e5f486ee )

( https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/29628?id=65063.44.1.63e9c6ceba0d7f08562ae486c90c22bd )

<-

|

|

|

PO BOX 1207

unsubscribe ( https://gem.godaddy.com/opt_out?pact=65063-177326762-ceb3f27f-4d42-4439-8a7f-5da47d186713-139d692d1d29f10975da1669fc727efd90cafaae )

name: Katie Porter
subject: From my flight this morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=33074%2E3422442%2EUZEEie)
Derek,
While on my flight from LAX to DC this morning, I checked our fundraising numbers. Honestly, fundraising has been slow this month, so I set a goal of raising **$50,000 by the 15th** , which marks the halfway point of this fundraising quarter.
I did a little back of the napkin math to see how many supporters we need to chip in:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231113-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_BON_20231113_V1_F&refcode2=33074_3422442_UZEEie&akid=33074%2E3422442%2EUZEEie)
[**Our average donation is $28, so with 1,786 donations we should be able to reach our goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231113-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_BON_20231113_V1_F&refcode2=33074_3422442_UZEEie&akid=33074%2E3422442%2EUZEEie)**[Can you chip in $28 or $56 today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231113-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_BON_20231113_V1_F&refcode2=33074_3422442_UZEEie&akid=33074%2E3422442%2EUZEEie)** Because I don’t take any money from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists, **every supporter plays a really important role in helping us meet these goals, which will allow us to WIN this race.**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231113-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_BON_20231113_V1_F&refcode2=33074_3422442_UZEEie&akid=33074%2E3422442%2EUZEEie)
Thanks team!
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAN23_1_BON_20231113_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=33074_3422442_UZEEie&akid=33074%2E3422442%2EUZEEie)**

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0h9_-Lz6tFhD8tkNyt1gCA~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0h9_-Lz6tFhD8tkNyt1gCA~~/AARclAA~~~)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0h9_-Lz6tFhD8tkNyt1gCA~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0h9_-Lz6tFhD8tkNyt1gCA~~/AARclAA~~~).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with ~~. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~_

| | Have you heard the news, Peter??? _**Maryland Matters:**_
[_**Maryland confirmed as pick for new FBI headquarters**_](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7692?t=7&akid=661%2E52803%2E1Fg42c) This is tremendous news for Maryland, Peter. **From a geography, infrastructure, and cost standpoint, building the new FBI headquarters right here in Greenbelt, Maryland was the right decision, no doubt about it.** With 7,500 jobs and $4b in economic activity, this is also going to be a huge economic boon for Marylanders, and it’s a step towards a more equitable distribution of government priorities. That’s why Team Maryland and I fought so hard for so long to make sure the federal government chose Maryland and specifically Prince George’s County as the site for the new FBI HQ. I just wanted to make sure you heard the news, Peter, because there are big things happening here in Maryland! body:

| |

Peter, We are sure you get a lot of scary emails about all the horrible things the GOP is doing, but let's remember what Democrats do when we win elections. While Iowa Republicans are rolling back child labor laws, Minnesota Democrats are passing free school lunches so kids can focus on learning. While Florida and Texas ban books that suppress our history, Illinois is banning book bans to ensure that all students have a right to read about our nation's past and learn from it. Republicans are moving America backward, but in states with strong, but narrow, legislative majorities, we are moving forward. In Minnesota's state senate, we have a 1 seat majority. subject: Question for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Jirair Ratevosian for Congress
body:
| | Hi Peter, it's Jirair.

You may have heard me talk about the American dream, what it means to me and my family, and how it feels out of reach for many. **[But today, I want to hear from YOU, Peter! What does the American dream mean to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73306224/438062046/-782035106?refcode=SBD_JR_EM_ENG_111323_AmericanDreamSurvey_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjc2NWIxZTctNmI4Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uvXdjUYxuIlNgGzkAeGIcOk5od7QR2pQR72djGrtv3s=&emci=b065b1e7-6b82-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b765b1e7-6b82-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=1770913)** | [Tell me what you think](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73306225/438062047/-782035106?refcode=SBD_JR_EM_ENG_111323_AmericanDreamSurvey_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjc2NWIxZTctNmI4Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uvXdjUYxuIlNgGzkAeGIcOk5od7QR2pQR72djGrtv3s=&emci=b065b1e7-6b82-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b765b1e7-6b82-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=1770913)
---
More than ever, Americans are struggling to afford their homes, pay for education, access healthcare, and keep good-paying jobs. This has become even harder as MAGA Republicans continually attack women, LGBT+ communities, and communities of color.

That’s why I’ve put together a legislative framework that I’ll introduce on my first day of Congress to address some of the hurdles getting in the way of attaining the American dream. The framework includes specific provisions to build an economy for all, provide equitable access to a clean and healthy environment, revitalize our cities, and protect the rights of women and LGBTQ+ individuals.

**[I’m determined to fight for CA-30 and make the American dream feel possible again. Please take a moment to let me know what the American dream means to you so I can bring your voices and stories with me to enact real progress in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73306226/438062048/-782035106?refcode=SBD_JR_EM_ENG_111323_AmericanDreamSurvey_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjc2NWIxZTctNmI4Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uvXdjUYxuIlNgGzkAeGIcOk5od7QR2pQR72djGrtv3s=&emci=b065b1e7-6b82-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b765b1e7-6b82-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=1770913)**
[LET ME KNOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73306227/438062049/-782035106?refcode=SBD_JR_EM_ENG_111323_AmericanDreamSurvey_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjc2NWIxZTctNmI4Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uvXdjUYxuIlNgGzkAeGIcOk5od7QR2pQR72djGrtv3s=&emci=b065b1e7-6b82-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b765b1e7-6b82-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=1770913)

name: Team Pramila
subject: November is flying by
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It's on us to show up for this movement and keep up our power and momentum with our year-round grassroots support.
#
November is flying by, Peter.
Our finance team has been hard at work planning our campaign's path to victory and reaching out to supporters like you to help us boost our funds ahead of the end of the year.
After looking at the numbers,**we're still behind where we need to be this time of the month — and we need to raise an additional $2,759 ahead of our November 15 mid-month fundraising deadline if we want to keep up our momentum.**
**Even though we're in an off-year, reaching our goal now means we'll have the resources we'll need come 2024 — which is now _less than two months away_. **So we need a massive push from our grassroots supporters to keep us on track. I'm running for Congress to fight for everyday people in our district — can you donate $3 today so I can stand up for workers and families in Washington?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73306333/438062530/1183499175?refcode=2023-11-13-strike&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=2366db7e-6c82-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjM2NmRiN2UtNmM4Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PsKV0y8f5aJoz50mi5x5buH4lidx_KKmKPE867b2Ozg=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73306334/438062531/1183499175?refcode=2023-11-13-strike&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=2366db7e-6c82-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjM2NmRiN2UtNmM4Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PsKV0y8f5aJoz50mi5x5buH4lidx_KKmKPE867b2Ozg=) With the cost of living rising, everyday workers need leaders in Congress who will fight for them. That's why I support policies that make a difference in the lives of working families, from supporting the right to organize to funding child care and job trainings. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: I’m running for Governor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73306621/438063260/-1138428062?amount=20&source=EM_NBI_SD_20231113_FR_1.1_0_1MO_surrogate_NA_NA_spanbergersplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWVjMTc4Ny02ZDgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Cl2J5Y9CNU3OpjMvNiGj7s7_q_ywe1Mq_CcOKCvDlw=) Dear Friend,

Let me put the bottom line upfront: I am running for Governor, and I need your support! **_[Will you split a contribution between my campaign and Sharice Davids today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73306622/438063261/-1138428062?amount=20&source=EM_NBI_SD_20231113_FR_1.1_0_1MO_surrogate_NA_NA_spanbergersplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWVjMTc4Ny02ZDgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Cl2J5Y9CNU3OpjMvNiGj7s7_q_ywe1Mq_CcOKCvDlw=)_**

Now, let me tell you why: Years ago, I swore my first oath to our Constitution. I enthusiastically embarked upon a journey and a career of public service — first in law enforcement and then at CIA. I worked at home and abroad to keep our country safe and protect the country I love.

When my husband Adam and I moved our three daughters home to Virginia – just miles from where we had grown up – I thought my days of public service had come to a close. But after the 2016 election, our country was at a crossroads, and I envisioned what it could be if we flipped Virginia’s 7th District and made clear that the people of our district deserved stronger representation. I worked hard, we built an extraordinary team driven by purpose and principle, and in 2018, our district elected a Democrat – me – for the first time since 1968.

I have served proudly through some extraordinarily consequential moments in our history, and I have endeavored to do right by my constituents every day. I am proud of the work I have done, the laws I have passed, and the difference I have made.

And now, our Commonwealth is at another crossroads – do we continue moving backward with attacks on our rights, our kids’ education, and our communities’ sense of security — or do we move forward on a path of progress? Last week, Virginia’s elections showed that Virginians want to move forward, but we need a new Governor to be driving that progress.

I am running for Governor, because I know what I will bring to the job – a deep and abiding love for our Commonwealth, a relentless work ethic, and a focus on bringing people together to solve the real challenges facing Virginians.

**_[It is a long road to the 2025 Governor’s election, but will you join me now as a Founding Donor and support my campaign and Sharice Davids with a contribution? clean_body: | = Dear Friend, Let me put the bottom line upfront: I am running for Governor, and I need your support! = Now, let me tell you why: Years ago, I swore my first oath to our Constitution. I enthusiastically embarked upon a journey and a career of public service — first in law enforcement and then at CIA. I worked at home and abroad to keep our country safe and protect the country I love. When my husband Adam and I moved our three daughters home to Virginia – just miles from where we had grown up – I thought my days of public service had come to a close. But after the 2016 election, our country was at a crossroads, and I envisioned what it could be if we flipped Virginia’s 7th District and made clear that the people of our district deserved stronger representation. I worked hard, we built an extraordinary team driven by purpose and principle, and in 2018, our district elected a Democrat – me – for the first time since 1968. I have served proudly through some extraordinarily consequential moments in our history, and I have endeavored to do right by my constituents every day. I am proud of the work I have done, the laws I have passed, and the difference I have made. And now, our Commonwealth is at another crossroads – do we continue moving backward with attacks on our rights, our kids’ education, and our communities’ sense of security — or do we move forward on a path of progress? Last week, Virginia’s elections showed that Virginians want to move forward, but we need a new Governor to be driving that progress. I am running for Governor, because I know what I will bring to the job – a deep and abiding love for our Commonwealth, a relentless work ethic, and a focus on bringing people together to solve the real challenges facing Virginians. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail * | = Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. The second one is where we’re going to need all hands on deck | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73306950/438064430/1530338443?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlYzkzODhmLTZmODItZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eEjkNniURY2YKa08-23Ww0vHl6EjxfSnkgA69K-60JY=) | We’ll keep this short, Peter. Congress is four days away from a government shutdown because extremists in the House have so far chosen to put partisan politics over our nation’s economic well-being. The Blue Dogs are working this from two angles.
1. We’re not giving up on bipartisanship. As long as there are folks on the other side who genuinely want to find a way forward, we’ll be working with them to try to hammer out a solution.
2. We’re going to replace the extremists who refuse to come to the table.

On the first point, we promise you we’re doing everything we can. How will the surge in mortgage rates impact home prices, consumer spending, and the trajectory of the economy?

# [Mortgage Mayhem Creating Consumer Chaos?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=138814630&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4ODE0NjMwLCJpYXQiOjE2OTk5MTI4ODYsImV4cCI6MTcwMjUwNDg4NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.oJCjdDkuTeC9V-SrIQtRKhRHnBqbAuwSnWYWoPTsRyI)
### How will the surge in mortgage rates impact home prices, consumer spending, and the trajectory of the economy?
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/redirect/650689f9-01c6-4425-8dae-5b45233171c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Nov 13
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/650689f9-01c6-4425-8dae-5b45233171c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=138814630&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4ODE0NjMwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTY5OTkxMjg4NiwiZXhwIjoxNzAyNTA0ODg2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTY2MTk5OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.1eGBTCIJME2f35c2ZfOhDWU_5S3cO417GUpN33qWj9s&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=138814630&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4ODE0NjMwLCJpYXQiOjE2OTk5MTI4ODYsImV4cCI6MTcwMjUwNDg4NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.oJCjdDkuTeC9V-SrIQtRKhRHnBqbAuwSnWYWoPTsRyI&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=138814630&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4ODE0NjMwLCJpYXQiOjE2OTk5MTI4ODYsImV4cCI6MTcwMjUwNDg4NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.oJCjdDkuTeC9V-SrIQtRKhRHnBqbAuwSnWYWoPTsRyI)
---
| | [](https://substack..6Zc3uWohKBwwi-1qN9SRGszz8qPHG4CCOoX3rqyeEXM?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/mortgage-mayhem-creating-consumer?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/048ef521-a9f2-4831-a552-0ffa39b87bd2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In a quest to control inflation in the US economy, the Federal Reserve Bank has raised interest rates to levels not seen in decades. As a result, mortgage rates have also surged, creating pressures that will almost certainly impact real estate prices. [The average 30 year fixed mortgage rate hit 8% ](https://substack.com/redirect/fde3ccb7-1622-4c32-83e0-18e0c0f07bd8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)before recently falling slightly. To put this in context, that rate was below 3% in the fall of 2021 as seen in the chart below.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7adee069-cd6b-4ed4-bf82-70c3044a39a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
30 Year Fixed Rate Mortgage Average in the United States, November 1999 to the present; Source: [https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/MORTGAGE30US#](https://substack.com/redirect/da3eaac5-51fa-49f9-ad33-ca2915cf8620?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
And because most home buyers use financing to buy their properties, mortgage rates have an impact on home prices. To get a sense of the potential impact, let's consider a simple example. Let's say a young couple saves $100,000 to use as a downpayment to purchase a home. In October 2021, they buy a home for $500,000 using their savings and a $400,000 mortgage (30 year fixed for 3%), which obligates them to a payment of around $1700 per month.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..j-7upB0OplSaAF3Urpe6cWMIL203mDLvg1xveTHe47M?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=138814630)
Now suppose they were trying to buy a home today. With 8% rates, their monthly payment on a $400,000 mortgage would be slightly less than $3500 per month, more than double their payment at 3%. This increase in monthly payment might keep the home purchase out of reach until the couple either saved more money or was able to afford the higher monthly payment. _Bottom line, all else equal, higher rates reduce demand for housing_.
An alternative analysis, however, can yield substantial insights into the magnitude of a potential housing price correction. How large a mortgage could the couple afford if they were willing to pay the same monthly payment? Assuming a 30 year fixed mortgage at 8%, and a monthly payment of $1686.42 (the exact monthly payment for a 30 year, 3% mortgage of $400,000), the amount they could borrow would be less than $230,000, meaning they could purchase the home for $330,000. Simply put, this fixed budget analysis implies **a house price drop of 34% since 2021**.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a4ca342e-d5b3-49f9-ae68-19cee7ea1359?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: [https://dictionaryblog.cambridge.org/2023/02/08/making-ends-meet-and-feeling-the-pinch-money-idioms-part-2/](https://substack.com/redirect/05a5fc4d-97c6-470e-b033-d1f2a9f68ffb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
So does this mean that prices would fall by a third? Probably not, because the couple might increase their housing budget by reducing their spending on other items, enabling them to offer more than $330,000. Alternatively, they might also use the higher cost of living to negotiate higher wages, enabling higher payments and a higher offer price. _**Regardless of the magnitude, it seems clear that, all else equal, demand for housing at a particular price drops as mortgage rates climb.**_ This is, in fact, exactly what we see in the data.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..j-7upB0OplSaAF3Urpe6cWMIL203mDLvg1xveTHe47M?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=138814630)
Late last month, the _Wall Street Journal_ noted the mortgage market was suffering one of its worst busts ever. [The article noted how one of the leading mortgage companies, Guaranteed Rate, was asking employees to return signing bonuses less than two years after hiring them as mortgage activity has hit its lowest level in nearly 30 years](https://substack.com/redirect/47b7305f-faf5-4e54-ba99-7a3984e3c951?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The Bureau of Labor Statistics has pointed out that [the mortgage industry has already shed more than 80,000 jobs and the Mortgage Bankers Association anticipates another 40,000 losses](https://substack.com/redirect/47b7305f-faf5-4e54-ba99-7a3984e3c951?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Unsurprisingly, existing home sales have plunged to a level not seen since the Global Financial Crisis.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7afd4220-eeba-4c63-bcb1-2ba48cf99c23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Existing Home Sales - United States 2013-2023; Source: [https://tradingeconomics.com/united-states/existing-home-sales](https://substack.com/redirect/d2221632-3878-4434-9c0c-ae8293f7a3c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_**All else equal, less demand for housing implies lower** prices._**** But of course, all else is not equal, and there's another dynamic we must consider. When interests rates rise as rapidly as they have, however, [many potential sellers are reluctant to give up their low-cost mortgages](https://substack.com/redirect/22ffb72f-7550-43c1-80ff-d7f80bab8196?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and buy a new home with a higher priced one. [This effect was first noted by economist John Quigley when mortgage rates spiked from 9% to over 18% in the early 1980s, something he called the "lock-in" effect](https://substack.com/redirect/ada5c640-6ae4-4326-8fa1-9fab24c49853?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [According to a report by real estate firm Redfin, almost 92% of homeowners with a mortgage have a rate of less than 6%](https://substack.com/redirect/433a8f9a-b0f9-4334-843d-dc0b2b7f7d7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The chart below shows that most of those low cost loans are actually less than 4%.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e097fc0d-e6ce-410d-a6c9-2fa9af6b430d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: [https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2023-11-02/housing-crisis-gets-worse-for-americans-on-mortgage-lock-in-effect](https://substack.com/redirect/22ffb72f-7550-43c1-80ff-d7f80bab8196?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..j-7upB0OplSaAF3Urpe6cWMIL203mDLvg1xveTHe47M?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=138814630)
[The result of this "lock-in" is fewer sellers and plunging inventories of available properties](https://substack.com/redirect/f76ea553-5e60-4cd1-af56-fa5f7ff32f22?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Again, this is exactly what we see in the data with the number of available homes listed for sale running well below historical levels and [home sales recently hit the lowest pace since 2010](https://substack.com/redirect/af1a2638-ad87-4f5d-9d03-2ce6c78b9039?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). _[Bloomberg](https://substack.com/redirect/22ffb72f-7550-43c1-80ff-d7f80bab8196?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ noted that there were only around 15 homes for sale in Amherst, Massachusetts, a town of 40,000 people. A local real estate professional notes the market is "cuckoo" given the historical level of available properties was around 100 houses at any time](https://substack.com/redirect/22ffb72f-7550-43c1-80ff-d7f80bab8196?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And Moody's[ chief economist Mark Zandi warns "The single-family housing market is in a deep freeze" and a normal market is unlikely before 2028](https://substack.com/redirect/22ffb72f-7550-43c1-80ff-d7f80bab8196?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). _**All else equal, less supply of housing implies higher housing prices.**_
| | POLL
---
Which do you think is most likely to happen to home prices in the United States over the next two years?
| [Housing prices will fall](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.NrocpzS6WgqlVx7lpN6oKCh9fOcla6x_dK6cFvvntGA?)
---
[Housing prices will rise](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.Zv7h7HFpeRSauzFrjHJb3zsNXwsRNnkc7X0upZU2HqA?)
[Housing prices won't do much](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.EJcfJoRF5O15oIpNVxe-N-VWg4Y6W3Q2rMh_nyW1R7U?)
[No idea, please tell me!](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.zTChJouoJJyiUH4J5xpZot7rij667rvug5PVa0QOeTA?)
Ultimately, however, real estate is not a commodity determined merely by supply and demand pressures because each property is unique and buyers and sellers have their own circumstance. If someone is forced to sell, for instance, then they may be forced to lower the price until a buyer steps in. Likewise, if someone must buy a house and there is limited inventory, they may be forced to buy at the currently offered price. While it's impossible to know for sure, I fear selling pressure will exceed buying pressure and that could lead to a step-function down in real estate prices.
## So what?
Navigating the uncertainty of mortgage ripples through the housing market and the economy is no trivial undertaking. One thing that appears certain, however, is the real estate brokerage and mortgage industries are going to face headwinds for some time to come. T[he Missouri court ruling against realtors suggests that commissions may be under pressure](https://substack.com/redirect/8ab434bb-ae2c-4584-b485-6f433637155e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and transaction volumes don't appear likely to rise anytime soon, creating a double-whammy or lower commissions on fewer transactions. The mortgage market faces similar challenges as plunging volumes have spurred industry consolidation and layoffs. Let's also not forget how big the real estate brokerage industry is. [The Association of Real Estate License Law Officials estimates that there are over 3 million active real estate licensees in the United States](https://substack.com/redirect/ed89b1b2-6715-4bc5-be14-2846a986ae10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). **If you were a younger person starting your career, would you enter the real estate brokerage business?** Is it possible that 50% of these professionals will have to find another job? If that happened over one year, that would imply the loss of more than 100,000 jobs each month!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..j-7upB0OplSaAF3Urpe6cWMIL203mDLvg1xveTHe47M?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=138814630)
Another ramification to consider is the impact of housing on labor markets. Yes, the pandemic spurred a massive shift to remote work for many, but not for all. Think about workers in construction, hospitality, warehouse logistics, or food service -- remote work is simply not possible for most functions in those industries. **Might the housing market exacerbate already problematic labor market inefficiencies as workers get locked in to their homes and are reluctant to move?** Could this drive wage pressure, leading to more inflation and higher rates? Bloomberg noted how lock-in decreases labor mobility:
> _[The lock-in effect threatens to prevent younger owners from moving to larger homes and expanding their families while causing empty nesters to put off downsizing. And decreased mobility makes for a less efficient labor market, as workers will be less likely to move for new jobs if they don't want to give up their old mortgages.](https://substack.com/redirect/22ffb72f-7550-43c1-80ff-d7f80bab8196?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
Given the possibility of a housing price collapse, it's also worth asking what plunging home prices might mean for the consumer and the economy in general. According to the National Association of Homebuilders, [the housing market directly accounts for around 16% of America's GDP (via construction, renovation, rent, and utilities).](https://substack.com/redirect/f18cb329-fb4c-45c9-a857-16c2b86fdd6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) And[ given average Americans have around 70% of their net worth in real estate](https://substack.com/redirect/f5894c23-dad4-4119-8c17-048683e65e9d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), falling house prices would decrease consumer confidence.
Behavioral economists have called this relationship the "[wealth effect](https://substack.com/redirect/2321e269-bbc8-48a1-9982-27bedeadafaf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)," and it's proven an important macroeconomic force that has a big impact on the economy. Because of this indirect effect and the reality that consumption is responsible for more than two-thirds of economic activity in the United States, I firmly believe house prices are among the most important drivers of the American economy.**Could mortgage mayhem crush consumer confidence and be a catalyst for a recession? Or could a drop in house prices lead to a banking crisis as home equity evaporates and leads to a wave of foreclosures?**
Or might the opposite happen? After all, given many first time homebuyers are feeling locked-out of the real estate market, might they spend the money they'd otherwise be saving for a downpayment? [A recent ](https://substack.com/redirect/af1a2638-ad87-4f5d-9d03-2ce6c78b9039?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[Wall Street Journal](https://substack.com/redirect/af1a2638-ad87-4f5d-9d03-2ce6c78b9039?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ article described how some are "finding other ways to use the money they'd been saving." It noted a 15% increase in the number of new 529 college savings accounts opened, suggesting people were investing in the future for family members. The article also quoted a wealth management advisor noting "people are taking their frustrations out by using that money on vacations and enjoying life."](https://substack.com/redirect/af1a2638-ad87-4f5d-9d03-2ce6c78b9039?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) And because [it's now one of the worst times to buy instead of renting](https://substack.com/redirect/8ca30af1-da5c-4782-8192-4689d01e44d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), perhaps lower homeownership rates is the new normal, leading to greater consumer spending? **Could a real estate slowdown actually lead to more consumer spending, helping the US economy avoid a recession?**

How will the surge in mortgage rates impact home prices, consumer spending, and the trajectory of the economy? | | | Nov 13 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- In a quest to control inflation in the US economy, the Federal Reserve Bank has raised interest rates to levels not seen in decades. As a result, mortgage rates have also surged, creating pressures that will almost certainly impact real estate prices. recently falling slightly. To put this in context, that rate was below 3% in the fall of 2021 as seen in the chart below. | | ---|---|--- 30 Year Fixed Rate Mortgage Average in the United States, November 1999 to the present; Source: And because most home buyers use financing to buy their properties, mortgage rates have an impact on home prices. To get a sense of the potential impact, let's consider a simple example. Let's say a young couple saves $100,000 to use as a downpayment to purchase a home. In October 2021, they buy a home for $500,000 using their savings and a $400,000 mortgage (30 year fixed for 3%), which obligates them to a payment of around $1700 per month. Now suppose they were trying to buy a home today. With 8% rates, their monthly payment on a $400,000 mortgage would be slightly less than $3500 per month, more than double their payment at 3%. This increase in monthly payment might keep the home purchase out of reach until the couple either saved more money or was able to afford the higher monthly payment. Bottom line, all else equal, higher rates reduce demand for housing. An alternative analysis, however, can yield substantial insights into the magnitude of a potential housing price correction. How large a mortgage could the couple afford if they were willing to pay the same monthly payment? Assuming a 30 year fixed mortgage at 8%, and a monthly payment of $1686.42 (the exact monthly payment for a 30 year, 3% mortgage of $400,000), the amount they could borrow would be less than $230,000, meaning they could purchase the home for $330,000. Simply put, this fixed budget analysis implies a house price drop of 34% since 2021. | | ---|---|--- Source: So does this mean that prices would fall by a third? Probably not, because the couple might increase their housing budget by reducing their spending on other items, enabling them to offer more than $330,000. Alternatively, they might also use the higher cost of living to negotiate higher wages, enabling higher payments and a higher offer price. Regardless of the magnitude, it seems clear that, all else equal, demand for housing at a particular price drops as mortgage rates climb. This is, in fact, exactly what we see in the data. Late last month, the Wall Street Journal noted the mortgage market was suffering one of its worst busts ever. . The Bureau of Labor Statistics has pointed out that . Unsurprisingly, existing home sales have plunged to a level not seen since the Global Financial Crisis. | | ---|---|--- Existing Home Sales - United States 2013-2023; Source: All else equal, less demand for housing implies lower prices.** But of course, all else is not equal, and there's another dynamic we must consider. When interests rates rise as rapidly as they have, however, and buy a new home with a higher priced one. . . The chart below shows that most of those low cost loans are actually less than 4%. | | ---|---|--- Source: . Again, this is exactly what we see in the data with the number of available homes listed for sale running well below historical levels and . . And Moody's. All else equal, less supply of housing implies higher housing prices. | | POLL Which do you think is most likely to happen to home prices in the United States over the next two years? | ? ? ? ? Ultimately, however, real estate is not a commodity determined merely by supply and demand pressures because each property is unique and buyers and sellers have their own circumstance. If someone is forced to sell, for instance, then they may be forced to lower the price until a buyer steps in. Likewise, if someone must buy a house and there is limited inventory, they may be forced to buy at the currently offered price. While it's impossible to know for sure, I fear selling pressure will exceed buying pressure and that could lead to a step-function down in real estate prices. So what? Navigating the uncertainty of mortgage ripples through the housing market and the economy is no trivial undertaking. One thing that appears certain, however, is the real estate brokerage and mortgage industries are going to face headwinds for some time to come. T and transaction volumes don't appear likely to rise anytime soon, creating a double-whammy or lower commissions on fewer transactions. The mortgage market faces similar challenges as plunging volumes have spurred industry consolidation and layoffs. Let's also not forget how big the real estate brokerage industry is. . If you were a younger person starting your career, would you enter the real estate brokerage business? Is it possible that 50% of these professionals will have to find another job? If that happened over one year, that would imply the loss of more than 100,000 jobs each month! Another ramification to consider is the impact of housing on labor markets. Yes, the pandemic spurred a massive shift to remote work for many, but not for all. Think about workers in construction, hospitality, warehouse logistics, or food service -- remote work is simply not possible for most functions in those industries. Might the housing market exacerbate already problematic labor market inefficiencies as workers get locked in to their homes and are reluctant to move? Could this drive wage pressure, leading to more inflation and higher rates? Bloomberg noted how lock-in decreases labor mobility: Given the possibility of a housing price collapse, it's also worth asking what plunging home prices might mean for the consumer and the economy in general. According to the National Association of Homebuilders, And, falling house prices would decrease consumer confidence. Behavioral economists have called this relationship the "," and it's proven an important macroeconomic force that has a big impact on the economy. Because of this indirect effect and the reality that consumption is responsible for more than two-thirds of economic activity in the United States, I firmly believe house prices are among the most important drivers of the American economy.Could mortgage mayhem crush consumer confidence and be a catalyst for a recession? Or could a drop in house prices lead to a banking crisis as home equity evaporates and leads to a wave of foreclosures? Or might the opposite happen? After all, given many first time homebuyers are feeling locked-out of the real estate market, might they spend the money they'd otherwise be saving for a downpayment? And because , perhaps lower homeownership rates is the new normal, leading to greater consumer spending? Could a real estate slowdown actually lead to more consumer spending, helping the US economy avoid a recession?** | | POLL How will the real estate market impact the US economy? | ? ? ? While it's impossible to know exactly what will happen, thinking through various scenarios and the possible implications should prove useful as we attempt to make sense of today's mortgage mayhem. | | POLL What do you think about Dr. Mansharamani's piece "Mortgage Mayhem Creating Consumer Chaos"? | ? ? ? We're entering another critical phase that will shape the future of fair representation. From coast to coast, as many as 10 congressional districts across 7 states could change as a result of litigation before voters go to the polls next fall. With so much changing over the next few months, we want to update you on what to expect. **During this call, we will:**
* Dive deep into the heart of democracy, exploring how it will evolve and ensuring every voice is heard loud and clear.
* Uncover strategies to ensure that every corner of our nation is represented.
* And explore the current cases that are paving the way for a fairer democracy.

| Peter,

Mike Johnson is everything wrong with the Republican party.

I ran for office after a long career as a labor rights attorney, ensuring families like mine had fair pay and safe working conditions. In Congress, I’ve worked tirelessly to ensure working families get their fair share.

Peter, Mike Johnson’s leadership as House Speaker could set our efforts back. As the chair of the Republican Study Committee, Johnson supported cuts to Medicare and Social Security. **Working families can’t afford his extremism.**

Taking back the House next year is critical in ensuring working families are protected. **But we need all hands on deck. I’m working tirelessly to make progress on the issues that matter most and electing progressives up and down the ballot.[_Can I count on your support with a $10 contribution? clean_body: Working families can’t afford Mike Johnson's extremism. | = | Peter, Mike Johnson is everything wrong with the Republican party. I ran for office after a long career as a labor rights attorney, ensuring families like mine had fair pay and safe working conditions. In Congress, I’ve worked tirelessly to ensure working families get their fair share. Peter, Mike Johnson’s leadership as House Speaker could set our efforts back. As the chair of the Republican Study Committee, Johnson supported cuts to Medicare and Social Security. Working families can’t afford his extremism. Taking back the House next year is critical in ensuring working families are protected. But we need all hands on deck. I’m working tirelessly to make progress on the issues that matter most and electing progressives up and down the ballot.= | | | = | = | = | = | = Grateful, Linda * | | = Paid for by Stand with Sanchez Stand with Sánchez P.O. No compromises. Our tax dollars do not belong in the hands of terrorists. **_**_**_**_[**_Do you agree?_**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b31810e039ed4112a661b30eeaef19f9&_e=gRDS8mRJfnhEDIMSDSCWhJE3YULKF1Td2ipA8WCXs-s8I1cCYxS-1gtrXXv6LkxyX-iN8vAd9ybRYsr9VfJZQWM0CmQyCYnqoT1rqxYSk-5_VYf6cW1Iesr2eaJ2xRX30gvZL5-b5oFvzkoD6xtU3rS1y6Cmd3GzB8sWGMR3dhIcVH4A7UjahTbxR-_vkD7mK98AEdiYyO2Ciftw9vsHCFHv-xv0L_i37Rkkwv62_GSUnbo0BDZoI4sjPgllfeaOOEyEb_e0GTN11MlOUNSZ-_SSUs1Xe-LEojVrAzCRxcuuabCOaMR6PJKT7prHhPoG8vAAJquRmGGzn3GwpryGR5MW2vsQvSWUXn-O3A7dJhpsCdt059r5TDI5gKwuVTWlglnkupIRY1k8L2HknhvQ2nsNvJI-IA0jJSz6PuJKQHqUz3Tg-552gqb7dEli2Q1mT7NLgLXbgVa2QssVJyCXow%3D%3D)_**_**_**_** \- Team DeSantis

| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b31810e039ed4112a661b30eeaef19f9&_e=gRDS8mRJfnhEDIMSDSCWhJE3YULKF1Td2ipA8WCXs-s8I1cCYxS-1gtrXXv6LkxyX-iN8vAd9ybRYsr9VfJZQWM0CmQyCYnqoT1rqxYSk-5_VYf6cW1Iesr2eaJ2xRX30gvZL5-b5oFvzkoD6xtU3rS1y6Cmd3GzB8sWGMR3dhIcVH4A7UjahTbxR-_vkD7mK98AEdiYyO2Ciftw9vsHCFHv-xv0L_i37Rkkwv62_GSUnbo0BDZoI4sjPgllfeaOOEyEb_e0GTN11MlOUNSZ-_SSUs1Xe-LEojVrAzCRxcuuabCOaMR6PJKT7prHhPoGdLSC1g7ga9AWqe8ehKHdXFd4-fKolmF3B5rsePAWfwo7Ud18RF6f9oBIPFJYF6WlYb-osIj4CEkqHX2-8qLnSdFKtzXK-_QVByJFIxH-HCgjr4cV-nch2wGU6Hd4Mj0haRGdTae0PIzKdqJfpqwDXw%3D%3D)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b31810e039ed4112a661b30eeaef19f9&_e=gRDS8mRJfnhEDIMSDSCWhJE3YULKF1Td2ipA8WCXs-s8I1cCYxS-1gtrXXv6LkxyX-iN8vAd9ybRYsr9VfJZQWM0CmQyCYnqoT1rqxYSk-5_VYf6cW1Iesr2eaJ2xRX30gvZL5-b5oFvzkoD6xtU3rS1y6Cmd3GzB8sWGMR3dhIcVH4A7UjahTbxR-_vkD7mK98AEdiYyO2Ciftw9vsHCFHv-xv0L_i37Rkkwv62_GSUnbo0BDZoI4sjPgllfeaOOEyEb_e0GTN11MlOUNSZ-_SSUs1Xe-LEojVrAzCRxcuuabCOaMR6PJKT7prHhPoG7NAqpm3TYobi2J9w9zdQEqj_fG44-qjaqwbw9UQ4MXt2HQFr5_2w4sQ7Jsb6Tlcnz0dabYWUVCHwg8nX62-dSzi0i8GyZR1aAaQDBx6e4CgwHbBioVbbFKxpEPXw-T2_ca6cnM3XYcAnL75YFnEr5w%3D%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315

| | | | If you haven't chosen AMAC over AARP yet, you may want to reconsider.

Dear Fellow Friend,

I wanted to bring your attention to an important issue that affects many of us as we approach our senior years. Recently, Republican Senator Rand Paul shed light on the concerning transformation of AARP (formerly known as the American Association of Retired Persons), which has raised questions about its true mission and commitment to seniors. I'd like to share some of Senator Paul's quotes from his article from Townhall, which highlight the issues at hand:
---

| | | | _"Today, AARP primarily functions as a marketing and advocacy tool for United Health, the largest health insurance company in the United States."_

_"AARP's revenue is not primarily derived from membership dues but from lucrative corporate royalty arrangements, notably their highly profitable deal with UnitedHealth, one of the nation's largest health insurance conglomerates."_

_"During the heated Obamacare debate, AARP threw its support behind it, despite the strong opposition of its members. It seems apparent that the allure of mandatory, subsidized health insurance proved to be a significant triumph for UnitedHealth."_

_"AARP strategically invests hundreds of millions of dollars in advertising and events that align with the Democratic Party's policy priorities, subtly influencing voting preferences."_
---

| | | | These quotes underscore the fact that AARP may no longer be the organization it once was, prioritizing the well-being of seniors. Instead, it seems to be more focused on advancing the interests of corporate entities and aligning with partisan politics.

As freedom-loving patriots, we deserve an organization that genuinely advocates for our needs and values - for the values enshrined in our Constitution - that have made America the greatest nation on earth. That's why I'd like to introduce you to the Association of Mature American Citizens (AMAC), the conservative alternative to AARP. AMAC offers comparable services while embracing a more free-market perspective and avoiding any liberal bias.

_First and foremost, AMAC stands for conservative values._

AMAC's commitment to advocacy is evident through AMAC Action, its sister nonprofit organization that advances conservative initiatives at all levels of government. Members can participate in grassroots advocacy efforts to support AMAC's mission, ensuring that the voices of its two million members are heard in Congress, the White House, and the national media.

AMAC Action has participated in over one thousand in-person meetings with congressional leaders, ensuring that your voice is heard on Capitol Hill. AMAC Action is actively fighting for you on the issues that matter - like censorship and suppression on our First Amendment rights, election integrity, stopping the left's efforts to indoctrinate our children and grandchildren at school, and defending the sanctity of human life at all stages.

_Second, AMAC provides members with exceptional money-saving benefits._

Joining AMAC gives you access to a host of money-saving benefits including special rates on cell phones and plans, insurance products, travel and lodging discounts, vision and dental products, financial products, health and wellness products, and so much more!

_Third, AMAC is a source of uncensored information that you can trust._

All AMAC members receive our bi-monthly AMAC Magazine and access to fresh website content powered by the AMAC Newsline team, our Better For America Podcast featuring interviews with America's thought leaders, newsletters, video content, and an app that delivers insightful coverage of the news and issues that matter most.

Here are some key findings from a recent poll conducted by McLaughlin and Associates for American Commitment, which reveal concerns among voters aged 55 and older:
* Over 80% of AARP members worry that the organization receives billions in corporate royalties from health insurance giants like United Healthcare, all while actively lobbying lawmakers and government officials on matters related to drug and insurance costs.
* Shockingly, 80% of these members are unaware that AARP endorsed and supported Biden's Inflation Reduction Act, which brought about changes to Medicare.
* An overwhelming 85% express concerns that these changes could hinder the development of groundbreaking medical advancements and cures for chronic diseases.

It is clear that many seniors have concerns about AARP's financial ties and alignment with certain political interests. Therefore, I encourage you to consider joining AMAC, a senior organization that remains committed to defending constitutional rights, fiscal responsibility, federal solvency, and accountability in government.
---

| | | | | |

| | | | By making the switch to AMAC, you can be part of an organization that truly advocates for the well-being of seniors and promotes conservative values. Together, we can ensure that our voices are heard, and our interests are prioritized.

It's time to stand up for America. [Join AMAC today!](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j7GOnTAQRb_GdIvsGS88CookiBQrpUgTpULGHhY_MZi1TdD-fQQiac-99txjeFv89NmK-qsAmL1LAkDgFwHw8fvguD_57fvL289fLx_VD349Q_gmAPLnRv-b9yclsfHLSeuucC1OTuqCWlU1TaN0o1Qxtw3IkcykR10p3dhXqyeEurEO7QPrURa-BQmolEIABC1LwkcNasIHgqkfRgotrzulYYreGpXyYWIMgUsbuFjaOectXcN6Ab1hY8s9Ceifwa8nw37PPITxSTb7PySwY-KRYpr9Nqx0CKjOQgp7tGd6W13QGt6Mf18FdsdMi1lvzuT8zgK7e9Qw-ZjycJg4nMv-vQ5rpjUL7Bw5b00md4liEVu3HX5ZfKpqoeX7JWgD_w0AAP__QViEFA)

Trillion dollar big government spending bills have only increased the uncertainty and instability and are core reasons for the persistently high unemployment rate and why the household incomes of Americans have declined so much. AMAC - The Association of Mature American Citizens - believes we can do much better. As a steadily growing alternative to groups like AARP, and with an expanding influence in the Nation's Capital, we aim to champion the interests of Mature Americans, seniors, and prospective retirees. We believe in religious freedom, free enterprise, and support common sense solutions to our Nation's largest challenges.

Bottom line - our livelihoods, our families' future prosperity, and our standards of living should not be threatened by bad policies emanating from Washington, DC.

As AMAC continues to grow and build a presence in DC, we're able to stand up to the tremendous lobbying power of AARP on behalf of concerned conservative Americans like you. Over two million Americans are now part of the AMAC family.

If you want to belong to an organization that takes its marching orders from its members and speaks out for conservative values, [JOIN AMAC NOW!](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j7GOnTAQRb_GdIvsGS88CookiBQrpUgTpULGHhY_MZi1TdD-fQQiac-99txjeFv89NmK-qsAmL1LAkDgFwHw8fvguD_57fvL289fLx_VD349Q_gmAPLnRv-b9yclsfHLSeuucC1OTuqCWlU1TaN0o1Qxtw3IkcykR10p3dhXqyeEurEO7QPrURa-BQmolEIABC1LwkcNasIHgqkfRgotrzulYYreGpXyYWIMgUsbuFjaOectXcN6Ab1hY8s9Ceifwa8nw37PPITxSTb7PySwY-KRYpr9Nqx0CKjOQgp7tGd6W13QGt6Mf18FdsdMi1lvzuT8zgK7e9Qw-ZjycJg4nMv-vQ5rpjUL7Bw5b00md4liEVu3HX5ZfKpqoeX7JWgD_w0AAP__QViEFA)

Sincerely,

_**Rebecca Weber, AMAC CEO**_

For a limited time, a 5-year membership is available for less than $1 a month, and you'll have access to exclusive AMAC benefits - such as the members-only auto and home insurance program, the AMAC Roadside Assistance Program, travel, and much more!
---

But here’s something you might not know: Yard signs in Alaska cost way more than they do in the lower 48 , and they often have to be delivered to my supporters by mail.
Peter, I want my supporters to be able to get the word out about our campaign no matter where they live in Alaska. But without your support, our reach will be limited, and we risk losing this seat to an extremist.

name: Team Foushee
subject: Republicans aren’t letting up in their assault on voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
This year, Republicans in North Carolina voted to overturn the Governor’s veto on key bills addressing elections and voting.

Peter,

North Carolina is a battleground state for voting rights. What happens on the ground here has the potential to impact elections across the country.

* _SB 747_ undermines the right to vote by limiting the voter registration window in elections

* _SB 749_ strikes down the Governor’s ability to appoint members to the state board of elections

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Alternative to pro-trans Scholastic book fairs
body:
[Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=c76e7eb65e4947e5a793008d84adf999&_t=HLXM9D4eOuYUycvAwCJgL2zszXuBcuObnYNMajZwPkNjBTvI3dwIC139Qg-RmYaisdHVa1JWgLD2odCY1HtexJywb3AzBifwR_U6q8ZVg6k%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=c76e7eb65e4947e5a793008d84adf999&_t=HLXM9D4eOuYUycvAwCJgL2zszXuBcuObnYNMajZwPkNjBTvI3dwIC139Qg-RmYaisdHVa1JWgLD2odCY1HtexJywb3AzBifwR_U6q8ZVg6k%3D)

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c76e7eb65e4947e5a793008d84adf999&_e=OKXfQgPbZSpcQiv2_s6Rvn6mWHYyxPvW8JqRiF1cfVCENY6pf1hKR0lFf67uXGxrDW2NhXexHAzFK7t2hoCRklp6HUvVSzRRb7ksimb_6K4-wdi4tciWpkB2Tp88IDO7-cvEUCmsUXiI49kjnqDzq0qG42uKmbk8_hVpXUFgvVqXzZjobOs2eWIhdS9Ea2X5iJTDbPfpOlTmHkFUaongQLYnHEsQ4sUOyI2zbnTIbpI%3D "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Fellow Conservative,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c76e7eb65e4947e5a793008d84adf999&_e=OKXfQgPbZSpcQiv2_s6Rvn6mWHYyxPvW8JqRiF1cfVCENY6pf1hKR0lFf67uXGxrDW2NhXexHAzFK7t2hoCRkhOAse8FlMxfheoQvmv_ve19FabuDTtOKv4yzAG4HVGuHsexqdZCBKlA-eyxlXr1dCOHheHcz1WCYpYk8Huhps327qtmUasRLpuXtTNSD6_YtMEQDhMYQbTlph4STyB3SLttzhE9j7Jyor_JWEvVNdU%3D)[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c76e7eb65e4947e5a793008d84adf999&_e=OKXfQgPbZSpcQiv2_s6Rvn6mWHYyxPvW8JqRiF1cfVCENY6pf1hKR0lFf67uXGxrDW2NhXexHAzFK7t2hoCRkhPei4oteRMsCW7_ruz7mRJNGQM-gTiVarSrtAvQoS79E4RGZjxrWV7bqJW_zN44lh5K2p4_QL0Vs4jAF6nZp7Txc0KjCqEP8wVWiMD75_8f0pinfcy8cY-1zZR4mQP-6eyVX6VO74J0lonRbRH2MAw%3D)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c76e7eb65e4947e5a793008d84adf999&_e=OKXfQgPbZSpcQiv2_s6Rvn6mWHYyxPvW8JqRiF1cfVCENY6pf1hKR0lFf67uXGxrDW2NhXexHAzFK7t2hoCRkuW25nUzzZfAR9Af-D6cgWPhA1qIQ4UizXUH_pmpUyIydKD9Fq3NVb1TTevT8-xcWomagn2uG8pNwyZwneCeXvRyUF4-B6j1RkmhCPmhuF2avLOMmYgItho14Vs6t80FVZKnAP-4xglAwO3VdPSvZSw%3D)

[Donate](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c76e7eb65e4947e5a793008d84adf999&_e=OKXfQgPbZSpcQiv2_s6Rvn6mWHYyxPvW8JqRiF1cfVCENY6pf1hKR0lFf67uXGxrDW2NhXexHAzFK7t2hoCRks7rkPMA7qOoqqa1-KdEq1PjWn1Q8XWmzLMF4R_AJITQsYVTw03zQQuZcZHAqOHD0Mq-DQ6jVse5OySXZa-8QqlYQ2nBj4L9RG-GGQedarya_n9_2N74wSEILSGl72hNOunWoPtASrFTJXdeP1nC_hk%3D)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it's working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

[Donate $10 >>](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c76e7eb65e4947e5a793008d84adf999&_e=OKXfQgPbZSpcQiv2_s6Rvn6mWHYyxPvW8JqRiF1cfVCENY6pf1hKR0lFf67uXGxrlpUmpuqXQdqcU3ynOY5BqnwoK9mu57Q1bJhYBncYDApYL2giyPg2ROWrpS6iZM2y4qK6Ax1cbgYsbGL-IUqqj_ymz3DJIKoZHzomEKoqHFccixkkFBdBJG59tlxo1asjXxhGUPx8Br8iS9eQ53BplZL2tt0zLQeVNWWfMfUd3sQ%3D)

clean_body: | "SkyTree Book Fairs" Fellow Conservative, SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries. Here's what we're up against. These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material): Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda. Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children. Here is the solution: SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda. Here's how you can help. SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic. And it's working! SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA! No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character. SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!! We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country. Let's bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination. It's not complicated! It's what you and I grew up with. Thank you for helping us offer schools an alternative to Scholastic! God bless, Kirk Cameron P.S. Scholastic's monopoly on school book fairs has ushered in woke and inappropriate books to kids across the nation. I've partnered with SkyTree Book Fairs to give schools a positive alternative to scholastic. A reminder of what we're up against: It's time to fight back. You and I cannot afford to do nothing and let the woke mob indoctrinate millions of children. SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023.

And in one of the most consequential elections in history, we just can’t afford for them to gain any more ground.
We need passionate changemakers like you in this fight for the long haul. Because if the GOP (and a certain orange creep) returns to full power, we can kiss our democracy goodbye.
**[We’re counting on you. | | As we head into the busy holiday season, USPS mail carriers nationwide are _still_ being overworked to a dangerous degree.

**I need to know how many people are standing by their postal workers.**
---
**[Peter, do you support your postal workers in your area?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73309928/438074346/-853040128?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1254-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTFmYmIwZi03OTgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VyS6XAWPUiDsdOGSzvQFuH7cJcPdFLh5909ltKzJI4I=&emci=72cca122-3482-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=411fbb0f-7982-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**
