| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73309929/438074347/-853040128?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1254-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTFmYmIwZi03OTgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VyS6XAWPUiDsdOGSzvQFuH7cJcPdFLh5909ltKzJI4I=&emci=72cca122-3482-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=411fbb0f-7982-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73309930/438074348/-853040128?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1254-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTFmYmIwZi03OTgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VyS6XAWPUiDsdOGSzvQFuH7cJcPdFLh5909ltKzJI4I=&emci=72cca122-3482-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=411fbb0f-7982-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
---
Peter, from the moment the USPS Board of Governors selected GOP megadonor and Trump supporter Louis DeJoy as postmaster general, our nation’s postal service has suffered.

In fall 2020 – a moment when, in a swell of true democracy, there was a record number of mail-in ballots – mail delivery slowed _drastically_ under DeJoy's control. In some areas, on-time mail delivery fell to 60% during the election months.
**But Louis DeJoy’s worst offense by _far_ ****is his treatment of USPS mail carriers.**

DeJoy is overworking mail carriers, cutting their pay, and _refusing_ to staff up after many employees quit due to deteriorating working conditions. This has, in turn, led to the remaining carriers being overworked to a dangerous and sometimes _deadly_ degree.

And with temperatures beginning to plummet as we head into winter, the vast majority of all USPS trucks don't even have an adequate heating system. While DeJoy forced overworked mail carriers to broil in the incredibly hot summer months, he is now letting them shiver through the busy holiday months ahead.
DeJoy’s harsh working conditions are putting the lives of mail carriers on the line – but I'm committed to protecting them against this harsh mistreatment. And, Peter, I need to know if _you're_ in this fight with me.**I'm calling on 5,000 fearless fighters to respond to my flash poll before midnight tonight, so tell me:**
| | **Do you support your postal workers in your area?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73309931/438074349/-853040128?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1254-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTFmYmIwZi03OTgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VyS6XAWPUiDsdOGSzvQFuH7cJcPdFLh5909ltKzJI4I=&emci=72cca122-3482-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=411fbb0f-7982-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73309932/438074350/-853040128?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1254-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTFmYmIwZi03OTgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VyS6XAWPUiDsdOGSzvQFuH7cJcPdFLh5909ltKzJI4I=&emci=72cca122-3482-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=411fbb0f-7982-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)

Thank you.

– Letitia

name: Team Cornel West 2024
subject: Brother West’s Policy Pillars
body:
Join our Zoom rally!

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231109all_reintro&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, We extend our profound gratitude for your support of Dr. Cornel West's 2024 presidential campaign. Your unwavering commitment to justice, equality, and a transformative future fuels the heartbeat of our movement. As we approach a pivotal moment in our collective history, we know that the interlinked challenges of our time - climate/environmental, economic, access to and increased justice in healthcare, racial and reproductive justice, and increased domestic and global militarism - we know that we need an intersectional set of solutions that increase interdependence through a set of policy remedies guided by a moral compass that leads us all to better lives and puts us in a position to leave a better world for our children and generations to come. **We are proud of our comprehensive policy pillars, arguably the most progressive and transformational of any presidential campaign in U.S. history. wish to elucidate the intricate tapestry of Dr. West's vision by drawing from his comprehensive policy pillars.** The brilliant sister, Dr. Kimberly Crenshaw coined the epochal paradigm of intersectionality in 1989 to demonstrate the irrefutable fact that white “supremacy “ ideology, patriarchy, and colonization are ensconced in the current U.S. legal and socioeconomic systems. It’s in that spirit that our campaign developed an interdependent set of policy pillars to advance myriad forms of justice - economic, environmental/climate, labor/workers, transformative, health, and global. **We are excited to invite you to an enlightening Zoom Rally on November 16th, where Dr. West will delve into these policies and engage in meaningful discourse. Join us in shaping a future rooted in truth, justice, and love.[RSVP HERE](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/zoomrally?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231109all_reintro&n=2) to participate.** As we navigate this transformative journey, your generous contributions play a pivotal role. [Support Dr. West's campaign by making a donation.](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231109all_reintro&n=3) Thank you for being integral to this movement. Together, let us forge a path towards a more just and equitable society and the breakup of the duopoly’s chokehold on our democracy. As we navigate this transformative journey, your generous contributions play a pivotal role. Please support our people-powered, grassroots campaign rooted in truth, justice and love by clicking the donate button below.
---
Onward Together, Onward to Justice, **Team Cornel West 2024**
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231109all_reintro&n=4 "CONTRIBUTE") [CONTRIBUTE](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231109all_reintro&n=4)

Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=462220458b8a4b3885e853828f8660be&_e=pmyNX2BJOOSRusmjngbx4eUIatpgxoKgI4bOQBlbR8Vbo1QMlwtM_6g7ktxGoZNswAVMTN-j0SAQ5gEzbTjm58nO0z_35JpbwijmWjLwaUve4u8RATvkOoYaMK_RB7CX4Lt62LO9yvxmwoHIElYkOPcpoamz0pPFqQokjL_9QKdzl9l0lpgLceQMJafNgdTww1tKzxmi8Puk02ndSQE7EQgLhEo-1KpKw3iVXqKPZp-EH0_6FdfSgS-cNoJzY1tIDepu0RTpuTKohRTLqgX4UqU2SmBgu5ywZgQ9o6UI5d2QAE2pAYzypiSxmlcM7tAV0eWEwLC6Q0tsiPoAN59DuoJ4_FbmEV-Ujivyhg_E5PQtZcfZv8D7DQNduaCDxlo1)
The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals.

I intend to make you proud.

God Bless,

clean_body: Friend... | . Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today. I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

If we’re going to get as many Trump patriots as possible to the polls next November, we need to raise the necessary funds to win the White House and restore our Senate majority. Our mid-month deadline is coming up, and we can’t afford to miss this goal. | | | | | | The dollars we raise go directly towards winning for America First Republicans in 2024. clean_body: | | | | Peter – In the final stretch of this race, the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) and Speaker Mike Johnson are rushing in to boost our opponent. = = = Because of national GOP figures and interest groups closing ranks around Celeste Maloy, she's now been able to regain a cash-on-hand advantage in this race. But, Peter, national Republicans and their new House Speaker wouldn't be getting involved in a district that Trump carried by 17 percent if they weren't worried. Celeste Maloy, Mike Johnson, and the NRCC are running scared in the wake of last week's elections, polling showing me within single digits, and the clear momentum that our grassroots campaign has sustained since Day One. The results last Tuesday from Kentucky to Mississippi to Ohio showed that there are no "safe red" states. And if Celeste Maloy wants to embrace the extreme politics — no-exception abortion bans, repealing marriage equality, and cuts to Social Security and Medicare — of her campaign's top funders, it's not going to play here in Utah's 2nd District. I'm proud to run a campaign driven by the small-dollar donations of thousands of Utahns who believe in our message of unity and reject far-right extremism. = Thank you, Kathleen | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for and authorized by Riebe for Congress. |

subject: Will you reply to this email with what you're thankful for?

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_email?refocde=wrapper_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_email?refocde=wrapper_hdr]
Hi team!

November is all about giving thanks for what we've got, and spending time with the ones we love most.

Here at Team Pascrell, we're thankful for the bold work Bill Pascrell and House Democrats are doing for the middle class: reducing inflation 3%, creating over 14,000,000 jobs, lowering prescription drug costs, and leading an economic recovery which currently tops all G-7 countries!

Now, we'd like to hear from you: What are you most thankful for this year? It doesn't have to be political. It could be a personal milestone of yours — we just want to take this time to check in and share some positivity.

Reply to this email and share what you're most thankful for. We might even share some responses in an upcoming email!

And if you don't feel like sharing, will you support our mission to push real solutions for workers and families in the House and win this seat in 2024 by chipping in? Even as little as $3 means a lot. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_email?refcode=23113_ph_reply_l1]

CHIP IN $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_email?refcode=231113_ph_reply_b1]

Thankful for your support always! 🧡

Looking forward to hearing from you.

– Pascrell HQ
The toughest member of Congress is progressive New Jersey fighter Bill Pascrell. Bill is leading our battle to protect Social Security and Medicare. Bill wants to rebuild New Jersey's aging roads, bridges, and tunnels. And Bill Pascrell is our strongest advocate for tax fairness and restoring the state and local tax deduction for our middle-class families.
Will you have Bill's back and chip in today?

name: Greg Casar
subject: I just filed my paperwork
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
Big news, Peter!
**This weekend I filed to officially be on the March primary ballot to continue serving the people of Texas’s 35th District!**
_**This was a big moment for me.**_ I’m honored to represent the people of TX-35 in Congress – and couldn’t be more excited about running for reelection in 2024. We can restore abortion rights, tackle the climate crisis, pass gun violence prevention policies, and so much more.
We’re building a big, bold movement for working people in the heart of Texas, and I’m proud to have you by my side as I file to appear on the ballot again (with some added inspiration from Henry B. González & Barbara Jordan!).
[**Can you chip in $35 to help me kick-off my TX-35 reelection campaign? name: Team AOC
subject: A lot of classist, ageist, misogynist, and racist people are mad.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
I am the youngest woman in U.S. history to be elected to Congress. I was a waitress. I am Latina. I come from a low income background and am one of just a few working class people who get elected to Congress.
That makes a lot of classist, ageist, misogynist, and racist people mad.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231113.qzqXFK&refcode=em20231113-5310-P_FND_EGR_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5310%2E2526796%2E3iUiRW)
But together, we’ve built a movement fighting for transformative change — from Medicare for All to democratizing fundraising power in politics.
[If you’d like to help support our movement, could you donate $5 or anything you can afford right now to keep our movement strong? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231113.qzqXFK&refcode=em20231113-5310-P_FND_EGR_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5310%2E2526796%2E3iUiRW)

| | Patriot,

---
If the 2024 election were held today, we would win in a landslide.
---
**_THREE_** separate polls now show that __we__ (I certainly can’t take all the credit myself, Patriot) would beat Crooked Joe in the many battleground states that will decide the outcome of the 2024 election.
---
But make no mistake: these brand new polls will only motivate Crooked Joe and the Democrats to ramp up the witch hunts even more.
---
Crooked Joe may not know much, but he _knows_ that he could never beat me in a fair fight.

---
So, the Democrats’ only hope is to launch witch hunt after witch hunt to try and cheat their way to victory.

---
But remember this...

---
**_If it’s not close, they can’t cheat._**

---
_That’s why we need to keep surging higher in the polls so that we can overcome anything – and I mean anything – that the Democrats throw at us between now and November 5, 2024.
_
---
_While all the other Republican candidates are burning through millions just to finally make it over 10% of the vote in the GOP primary, our campaign is ALREADY focused on laying the infrastructure needed to WIN in the most important battleground states._

---
And it’s paying off! With your support right now, we will surge even higher with the most critical election of our lifetime now less than 1 year away.

---

clean_body: Remember: If it’s not close, they can’t cheat!| | | | | Patriot, If the 2024 election were held today, we would win in a landslide. THREE separate polls now show that we (I certainly can’t take all the credit myself, Patriot) would beat Crooked Joe in the many battleground states that will decide the outcome of the 2024 election. But make no mistake: these brand new polls will only motivate Crooked Joe and the Democrats to ramp up the witch hunts even more. Crooked Joe may not know much, but he knows that he could never beat me in a fair fight. So, the Democrats’ only hope is to launch witch hunt after witch hunt to try and cheat their way to victory. But remember this... If it’s not close, they can’t cheat. That’s why we need to keep surging higher in the polls so that we can overcome anything – and I mean anything – that the Democrats throw at us between now and November 5, 2024. While all the other Republican candidates are burning through millions just to finally make it over 10% of the vote in the GOP primary, our campaign is ALREADY focused on laying the infrastructure needed to WIN in the most important battleground states. And it’s paying off! With your support right now, we will surge even higher with the most critical election of our lifetime now less than 1 year away. | | - Thank you, Donald J. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Eric Hovde is as extreme as they come
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| The GOP has been hard at work recruiting their ideal candidate to run for Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate seat.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1526%2E35263%2EiOErWi)
Peter: The GOP has been hard at work recruiting their ideal candidate to run for Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate seat — **and they may have found their man in California megamillionaire Eric Hovde.** **[I’ll tell you more about the GOP’s hand-selected challenger gearing up to jump into this race — but before I do, would you consider making a donation to help me defend Wisconsin and our Democratic Senate majority?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-nov23.TOAtRC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20231113_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1526%2E35263%2EiOErWi)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-nov23.gM21RB&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20231113_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1526%2E35263%2EiOErWi)
---
[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-nov23.wghvI8&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20231113_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1526%2E35263%2EiOErWi)
---
| [CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-nov23.pqbcfC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20231113_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=1526%2E35263%2EiOErWi)
---
[CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-nov23.9Vn_TD&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20231113_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=1526%2E35263%2EiOErWi)
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-nov23._WexNZ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20231113_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=1526%2E35263%2EiOErWi)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-nov23.TOAtRC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20231113_PM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=1526%2E35263%2EiOErWi)
---
Eric Hovde is as extreme as they come. He is **“totally opposed to abortion.”** He “absolutely” wants to **cut Social Security benefits.** And he’s said that he would **fully repeal the _Affordable Care Act_.**
The cherry on top for the GOP? Hovde is prepared to self-fund his campaign to the tune of **_$20 million_** from his own deep pockets to make up for what his extreme agenda lacks in grassroots support.
I’ll put it plain and simple, Peter. With Republicans now all but guaranteed to pick up West Virginia’s Senate seat, losing this seat would secure the Senate majority for Republicans, and Eric Hovde would fall right in line to help the GOP enact their far-right agenda.
If we want to have any shot at defending our narrow Senate majority, we have to come together to defend Wisconsin. There’s _far too much at stake_ to let Eric Hovde pay his way to victory and clinch the Senate majority for the GOP.
**[If you’re able to spare any amount, can I count on you to pitch in to my reelection campaign? We have 2 days left before our final mid-quarter deadline of 2023, and a lot of ground to cover in the meantime.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-nov23.TOAtRC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20231113_PM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=1526%2E35263%2EiOErWi)**

| Peter, I wanted to tell you a bit about my first campaign for Congress. [**If you don’t have time to read it, I hope you’ll consider making a donation before our mid-month deadline to keep me fighting for you in Congress »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73310458/438076206/236453838?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20231113_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2FlN2Q5Mi03YzgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cr58gfNQQNUW6i4TbdlDF6H0aMNTMomRGOrfpzihZVs=) | [$5,000 MID-MONTH GOAL: CHIP IN TO HELP MARK STAY IN CONGRESS AND HELP DEMOCRATS TAKE BACK THE HOUSE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73310459/438076213/236453838?amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=MTFC_20231113_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2FlN2Q5Mi03YzgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cr58gfNQQNUW6i4TbdlDF6H0aMNTMomRGOrfpzihZVs=)
---
Peter, in my first campaign for Congress, I ran against Republican Ken Calvert. I was ultimately unsuccessful in my first bid, and he’s still in Congress now.

But part of the reason I was unsuccessful is something that might seem unbelievable now in 2023 – _**Ken Calvert outed me as gay in a time when being openly gay was extremely dangerous.**_

It’s so hard to be forced to come out before you’re ready, _especially when that choice is taken from you by someone maliciously trying to hurt you._

In a bright pink series of mailers, Ken Calvert took away my autonomy and my right to share my sexuality when I was ready:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73310460/438076220/236453838?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20231113_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2FlN2Q5Mi03YzgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cr58gfNQQNUW6i4TbdlDF6H0aMNTMomRGOrfpzihZVs=)
The fact that someone like that is still in Congress today – **that someone so blatantly homophobic is making our laws** – is absolutely horrifying.

But I’m working every single day to fight back against the MAGA Party’s extreme anti-LGBTQ rhetoric and policies – and I can’t keep fighting without your help.

[**If you’re as horrified by the extreme homophobic and transphobic agenda of the far-right, I hope you’ll chip in before my mid-month deadline to ensure Republicans like Ken Calvert no longer hold the House Majority »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73310461/438076227/236453838?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20231113_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2FlN2Q5Mi03YzgyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cr58gfNQQNUW6i4TbdlDF6H0aMNTMomRGOrfpzihZVs=)

clean_body: | Peter, I wanted to tell you a bit about my first campaign for Congress. = | = Peter, in my first campaign for Congress, I ran against Republican Ken Calvert. I was ultimately unsuccessful in my first bid, and he’s still in Congress now. But part of the reason I was unsuccessful is something that might seem unbelievable now in 2023 – Ken Calvert outed me as gay in a time when being openly gay was extremely dangerous. It’s so hard to be forced to come out before you’re ready, especially when that choice is taken from you by someone maliciously trying to hurt you. In a bright pink series of mailers, Ken Calvert took away my autonomy and my right to share my sexuality when I was ready: = The fact that someone like that is still in Congress today – that someone so blatantly homophobic is making our laws – is absolutely horrifying. But I’m working every single day to fight back against the MAGA Party’s extreme anti-LGBTQ rhetoric and policies – and I can’t keep fighting without your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you, Mark | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Hi there Friend,

It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

_**I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. **_

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values.

I'm honored to serve as Speaker of the House and to work with you to expand our conservative Majority in 2024.

I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice. I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree. As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values. | | | | "Generic Button" But most importantly, I am husband to my wife Kelly and father to our four amazing children. | | | | "Generic Button" I'm honored to serve as Speaker of the House and to work with you to expand our conservative Majority in 2024. We have so much work to accomplish, and I can't wait to get started. But I need to ask you one favor. I set a goal of activating 5,000 grassroots donors so I can hit the ground running. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Chicken Little
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Let me get this out of the way: The sky is not falling.
#

Peter —
Let me get this out of the way: The sky is not falling.
All hope is not lost.
A few polls might look bad. But they’re just a snapshot.
Our margin in the Senate is especially slim now, with the news that Manchin is out. But that’s why we’re running.
Our fundraising has slowed down this month. But since this morning we’ve had a lot of people chip in to help us close the gap.
Now they’re hoping you’ll do the same. Please, use this link:
[**Can I count on you to contribute $3 to our campaign before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231113-2&t=1&akid=1433%2E734936%2EMjmRSO)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-nov23.eTtrZ1&amount=3&refcode=em231113-2&t=2&akid=1433%2E734936%2EMjmRSO)**
---
****
| **[DONATE OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-nov23.eTtrZ1&refcode=em231113-2&t=3&akid=1433%2E734936%2EMjmRSO)**
---
****
Honestly, it’s humbling to know just how many people are with us. How cool is it that thousands of people across the country are coming together to act in support of our shared goal?
Strangers. Maybe even neighbors. All chipping in right now to save the Senate, to fight for our democracy, to prove the polls wrong.
Join them.
At a time when we need it most.
[**Use this link to contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today, to help us close the gap on our mid-month fundraising goals before it’s too late.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231113-2&t=4&akid=1433%2E734936%2EMjmRSO)

| | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-nov23.aZOhHW&refcode=em231113-2&t=23&akid=1433%2E734936%2EMjmRSO)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-nov23.Qbnb2l&refcode=em231113-2&t=24&akid=1433%2E734936%2EMjmRSO)**

****

---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-nov23.Vx4UJF&refcode=em231113-2&t=26&akid=1433%2E734936%2EMjmRSO)**

| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-nov23.eTtrZ1&refcode=em231113-2&t=28&akid=1433%2E734936%2EMjmRSO)**

Semper Fi,

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Can A Christian "HAVE" A Demon?
body:
Can A Christian "HAVE" A Demon? A prevalent question right now is: "Can a Christian have a demon?" There are many opinions circulating about this.
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3521190.1168.1.59924a984f3aba8ddb414d426252c7df) |
---
## Can A Christian "HAVE" A Demon?
---
A prevalent question right now is: **"Can a Christian have a demon?"** There are many opinions circulating about this. I believe **the best commentary on the Bible is the Bible** I took 10 minutes to shoot a video about this topic. Watch it here: [https://youtu.be/z21RgXNHAbY](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3521190.1169.1.e50c245974352a75ffef0087f840535a)
---
| | [ Watch: Can A Christian "HAVE" A Demon? ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3521190.1170.1.ae65da12ef6baa8dfd0d45f5e1489fa9)
---
---
## 7 Signs Of The Times
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3521190.1171.1.f52d604e5fe4063f2401467b8e14ef3e)
---
There is so much talk about **End Times Biblical Prophecy** with all that is happening in our world, _and rightfully so_.
Here you can learn what the 7 Signs are: [https://youtube.com/live/TuNK8YzJBRY?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3521190.1172.1.c0f9f26c077c58909d2a158fd0b661fb)
| | [ Watch: 7 Signs Of The End Times ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3521190.1173.1.75add554d56cc684d29fe489134abff3)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3521190.1174.1.c013d49c6fd5db402996ef76142d2dd5)
---
Recently at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3521190.1175.1.fbe8648788affbabe3189b3c6b60128c) Tulsa & OKC, I committed the entire sermon to explaining **End Times Biblical Prophecy** and where we are on the timeline.
I addressed **Ezekiel 38** from an in-depth perspective along with the **Israel/Hamas War** that we are witnessing.
This message I know will benefit you and help you understand what the Bible says _MUST_ take place in the **Last Days**..
Watch it here: [The End Times EXPLANIED](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3521190.1176.1.ddf771165bd1eee0f9eb727cf84d5c04)
| | [ Watch: Ezekiel 38 ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3521190.1177.1.dff458765a85aa76cf10331b86eeac17)
---
|
---
---
## New Building Updates
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3521190.1178.1.a3e8191d89ec4d235b81e01274d459ac)
---
It has been a little over a month since we moved to our new facility and the progress has been GREAT!
**Here are the upcoming projects to look for:**
**Auditorium**
-TV's to be added throughout the auditorium for the purpose of lyrics & Bible verses
-More lighting in auditorium
**Lobby**
-New ceiling & flooring
**Restrooms**
-The men of Sheridan know what needs to be removed and replaced...
**Kids & Youth**
-Both nursery's will be complete and youth room will be updated with new carpet and layout
These are the updates that we plan to complete here in the near future.
We are doing this entire renovation on a cash basis.
Thank you for your generosity that has accomplished so much and please consider continuing to partner with us so we can get the job done!
You can give at [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3521190.1179.1.5b213198b8889fe48d6be8a96a3e5e4f)
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3521190.1180.1.b8d4b9457381146c8c10259ba0767609), GAB, [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3521190.1181.1.6f707b5767d38577484754a534c530a8), [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3521190.1182.1.9c163ab623efd637b6ef440c53e90b11), [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3521190.1183.1.2cff52c345f37e942fff65c221a89857), [Telegram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3521190.1184.1.0a28271c8cbe5cb41f24d6df1e8c941a), GETTR & [YouTube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3521190.1185.1.ea5f6d476fa9804b923d0995228c683e)).
